name: =?utf-8?Q?Michelle=20Benson?=
subject: Neil Shah Donated to Tim Walz & The Democrats
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR MINNESOTA COMMITTEE
body:
Whose side is he really on? | | | | [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=7fa559597f&e=9d6926af69)
---
| | |
**Neil Shah has traveled the state as a candidate that stands for our values, but does he really?**

In the past several years, Shah donated to Tim Walz and the Democrats.**** According to campaign finance reports, Shah donated **$1500 to Democrat groups in 2017 alone.**

While the Republicans and our grassroots fought hard to hold on to the slim majority in the Senate - **Shah was giving money to Democrats** who were just a single seat from taking control.

****

In 2018, Shah even donated to Tim Walz **AFTER** Jeff Johnson had been nominated as the endorsed Republican candidate for Governor.

**How can we trust someone to honor your endorsement now, if he didn't support it just four years ago?** Is Neil Shah a Democrat or just a political opportunist?

I will stand for our values and I will continue to **fight for you in St. Paul as Governor.**

**[Join with me and fellow Minnesota Conservatives by volunteering with our team!](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=91be99306d&e=9d6926af69)**

Sincerely,
[](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=52e4636a04&e=9d6926af69)
**Michelle Benson **
[Candidate for Minnesota Governor](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=180f3841fa&e=9d6926af69)

name: John + Gisele Fetterman
subject: Lycoming, Union, Snyder, Columbia, Carbon, and Schuylkill, oh my!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We'd *love* to share some updates from the road with yinz.
#
Hey Derek, it’s John + Gisele here to report back on another weekend on the road!
We spent this weekend visiting 6️⃣ counties across PA, and we’re *still* overwhelmed with gratitude.
First stop: Lycoming County 👇
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45416?refcode=em20220316-4998&t=1&akid=4998%2E434096%2EKgw186)
Next up: Shout out to yinz in Union County for the support + the petition signatures.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45416?refcode=em20220316-4998&t=2&akid=4998%2E434096%2EKgw186)
Snyder County showing up even in the sleet + snow. ❄️
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45416?refcode=em20220316-4998&t=3&akid=4998%2E434096%2EKgw186)
Last stop from Saturday: Columbia County!
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45416?refcode=em20220316-4998&t=4&akid=4998%2E434096%2EKgw186)
On Sunday, we snuck off for a quick lunch date in beautiful Jim Thorpe. ❤️
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45416?refcode=em20220316-4998&t=5&akid=4998%2E434096%2EKgw186)
We had a full capacity crowd out in Carbon County. 😍
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45416?refcode=em20220316-4998&t=6&akid=4998%2E434096%2EKgw186)
And to end on an incredible note — 5️⃣ full pages of petition signatures in Schuylkill County, all thanks to our intrepid volunteer, Rose.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45416?refcode=em20220316-4998&t=7&akid=4998%2E434096%2EKgw186)
There’s a *lot* of cynics who’d tell us that putting another few hundred miles on John’s Ram to visit these four towns is a waste of time. Well, the hundreds of inspiring supporters + donors we met last weekend prove they’re wrong.
People shared their real concerns with us: About our crumbling roads and bridges, about access to broadband in rural areas, and affording health care. And we shared how John plans to prioritize these core issues as a U.S. Senator.
**Our campaign’s motto is every county, every vote — and we mean it.** No town is too small, rural, or “red” for us to count out. We’re running a 67 County campaign because every Pennsylvanian deserves someone to fight for them.
**Grassroots contributions — most of which come in response to emails like this one — are what allow us to travel to all of these campaign stops. You're literally keeping this show on the road!** So now that we’re just two weeks away from our next public reporting deadline with the FEC, I must ask once more:
[**_Will you fund more campaign events like these by chipping in your first $5 right now? Whatever you can afford to chip in will help us reach every voter, including areas that are often forgotten by the political elite._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45416?amount=5&refcode=em20220316-4998&t=8&akid=4998%2E434096%2EKgw186)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45416?amount=5&refcode=em20220316-4998&t=27&akid=4998%2E434096%2EKgw186)**
Thank you so much for all you do for our campaign, Derek.
With love + gratitude,
John + Gisele Fetterman
P.S. **We're just two weeks away from our next public reporting deadline with the FEC,** so it'd be incredible if you could chip in any amount you can spare to this email. Keeping fundraising steady is how we can stay on the road meeting voters — which is where Gisele and I really need to be! **[So please chip in $5 if you can today.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45416?amount=5&refcode=em20220316-4998&t=28&akid=4998%2E434096%2EKgw186)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220316-4998-footer&t=29&refcode2=4998_434096_Kgw186&akid=4998%2E434096%2EKgw186)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=30&akid=4998%2E434096%2EKgw186)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=31&akid=4998%2E434096%2EKgw186)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

Hi Peter, As the Trump-endorsed, far-right darling in the race for WA-03 continues to pander to his white nationalist supporters, national media outlets are focusing more and more on our race. Especially because Washington state has "jungle primaries" \-- which means whichever two candidates (regardless of political party) receive the most amount of votes will advance to the general. _Newsweek_ covered our race's most recent polling, which shows I'm in that number one spot, but QAnon-loving Joe Kent is polling just points behind me. In that same poll, the inaccessible incumbent, Rep. Jaime Herrera Beutler, would lose the primary to Kent 26 to 22 percent. [**Rush $250, $100, $50, $25, or any amount you can to fund the strategy that will keep me ahead in the polls. >>**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zdG1fUgG8aFKTw4TdAFcV3OYIkIXLeXYGdiD76HGOclWZYG428h3SLdZNmun5o9X7MtTDE9F9bYyCrU8iJkLFtZjrhAone1GTqrLDWp6GlHBo01mFCXzejk5pz7wfS-O2kWSeqpdjX8qdd_Dcpub8f9PCflh8h80Tjnr_hJbQZKL1u9iSR4cQK9oGAWpMO6fYiY8CiNzjhhTdxcIikW2U-IMotaKF4__bM2HwvxljZhWO2n8fg-8hYUKcF4_sr93aUYnHutlibCB3RodrEjyMY3vwbmpoSPVgx6DLMzfd4VPRfmB2OmWQtrlkKIU_Wl20PIYEUtKZMhK9HA8AYc9E2-miWnCaBpd6qfLhc7vTd8w/3kf/Gexqd4JbQ_CIZwGyEaL5uA/h1/mMxlQ2arVKGdqDqC_nPx-0L-s1Ml3iGiTPGaXwVypfY) We CAN NOT allow the far-right to gain more ground in Congress and take control of WA-03. We need to work together to heal Washington and ensure extremists like Joe Kent don't join Marjorie Taylor Greene and Madison Cawthorn in Congress. Kent has earned the support of Congressman Paul Gosar, who maintains deep ties to white nationalists, along with coup-supporting and conspiracy theorists Michael Flynn, Rep. Matt Gaetz, Donald Trump Jr., and failed former president Donald Trump. We know Kent will have Big Trump Money powering his race to defeat GOP Rep. Herrera Beutler, who voted for impeachment. We expect Trump to stump for Kent in the district as we get closer to Election Day, too. We're going up against corrupt powers in this race, and I am asking you to add your name to my campaign to flip WA-03 blue and stop extremism in Washington state and D.C. **Tonight my team and I have set a mid-month benchmark to fund our direct mail and digital ad campaigns that will keep me polling above Kent and Herrera Beutler. clean_body: You’ll regret sitting this one out. | | Hi Peter, As the Trump-endorsed, far-right darling in the race for WA-03 continues to pander to his white nationalist supporters, national media outlets are focusing more and more on our race. Especially because Washington state has "jungle primaries" \-- which means whichever two candidates (regardless of political party) receive the most amount of votes will advance to the general. Newsweek covered our race's most recent polling, which shows I'm in that number one spot, but QAnon-loving Joe Kent is polling just points behind me. In that same poll, the inaccessible incumbent, Rep. Jaime Herrera Beutler, would lose the primary to Kent 26 to 22 percent. We CAN NOT allow the far-right to gain more ground in Congress and take control of WA-03. We need to work together to heal Washington and ensure extremists like Joe Kent don't join Marjorie Taylor Greene and Madison Cawthorn in Congress. Kent has earned the support of Congressman Paul Gosar, who maintains deep ties to white nationalists, along with coup-supporting and conspiracy theorists Michael Flynn, Rep. Matt Gaetz, Donald Trump Jr., and failed former president Donald Trump. We know Kent will have Big Trump Money powering his race to defeat GOP Rep. Herrera Beutler, who voted for impeachment. We expect Trump to stump for Kent in the district as we get closer to Election Day, too. We're going up against corrupt powers in this race, and I am asking you to add your name to my campaign to flip WA-03 blue and stop extremism in Washington state and D.C. Tonight my team and I have set a mid-month benchmark to fund our direct mail and digital ad campaigns that will keep me polling above Kent and Herrera Beutler. We have $1,240 left to raise. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: We cannot do this without you -- and there is far too much at stake to sit this one out. -Brent | You can also follow Brent's campaign by clicking on the links below: | | | | | Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington ---|--- (C)2022 Brent Hennrich for Washington, all rights reserved Our mailing address is: Brent Hennrich for Washington PO BOX 820070 Vancouver, WA 98682 We hate to see you go, but if you believe you received this email in error, or you no longer wish to receive our emails you can | | Sent via . name: Steve Chabot
subject: Is it Really Putin’s Price Hike?
body:
Spoiler Alert! It's all Biden! No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-tymtytk-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tymtytk-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tymtytk-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Is it Really Putin's Price Hike?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tymtytk-kujkulhluu-j/)
The Democrats want you to believe that higher prices at the pump, at the grocery store, and record inflation, are all Putin's fault, not Biden's. Here's the truth. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tymtytk-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tymtytk-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Too Little. Too Late?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tymtytk-kujkulhluu-d/)
The Russians continue their relentless campaign against Ukraine. Innocents are being slaughtered, particularly from the air. What should we do about it? Read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tymtytk-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tymtytk-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Ukraine](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tymtytk-kujkulhluu-u/)
The battle for Ukraine is literally life or death. You can read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tymtytk-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tymtytk-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [A Wave is Coming](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-tymtytk-kujkulhluu-n/)
Democrats have screwed up a lot of things since they took over complete control of the government. None more so than our children's education. You can read about it in this week's blog. | | **Hello from the Darin Harbick campaign for Oregon senator! **

We wanted to say thank you to everyone that has been volunteering around the state! Darin has been meeting people in all his stops that are excited about the upcoming election.
**LARGE SIGNS!**

Have frontage property space next to a high traffic area that Darin could place a large sign? We have large 4' x 8' signs, medium 32" x 48" signs, and of course the normal 18" x 24" yard signs. If you need a _large or medium sign delivered_ , or could even help us deliver and place the large or medium signs, can you

**Reply to this email, with your _name_ , _phone_ number,_address_ and _size_ of sign needed?**
**CAN YOU VOTE FOR DARIN IN THE PRIMARY?**

Did you know that Oregon has closed primaries? This means that only Republicans are allowed to vote for Darin in the primary on 5/17/22.If you want to check your party affiliation, you can go to [sos.oregon.gov](https://harbickforussenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3dd8e7fd3b4e92c0bcc1988f&id=982650e481&e=97f786938b) and specifically [https://secure.sos.state.or.us/orestar/vr/showVoterSearch.do](https://harbickforussenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3dd8e7fd3b4e92c0bcc1988f&id=b686f2f51f&e=97f786938b) to verify and/or change your affiliation for the primary. Remember, you can always change your affiliation after the primary.

If you have any questions about needing large signs, or changing your affiliation, please email:

[derek@harbickforussenate.com](mailto:derek@harbickforussenate.com)
Thanks!
Derek French
Contact Management Coordinator

body:
"Everybody is now paying attention to this, except for the fake news media."
Peter, when Devin Nunes sounds the alarm, WE LISTEN.
Well he just went on Fox News to issue this important message about the Durham Report: _" Everybody is now paying attention to this, except for the fake news media."_
For years, the Liberal Media told us President Trump cried wolf. They said Trump LIED about being spied on... They said he LIED about his ties to Russia...
**Now, we 're only scratching the surface. WE NEED THE TRUTH!**
**[DEMAND THE TRUTH FROM JOHN DURHAM>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59853429:Jd6GyQoNg:m:1:3317145305:5EE6C98084AE79145BBBC57F1B6CD119:r)**
Experts say the initial reports are just the tip of an iceberg.
We expect the FULL and COMPLETE truth to go way beyond what we hear in the news -- just like Devin Nunes said.
[**We only ask that you join the thousands of your fellow Patriots in demanding John Durham's FULL report be made public to the American People.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59853429:Jd6GyQoNg:m:1:3317145305:5EE6C98084AE79145BBBC57F1B6CD119:r)

name: Patriot Health Alliance
subject: Wife Saves Husband - Stuns Doctors
body:
What is this drink that's helping thousands feel young again?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z95q5vot75fr4d9uttvarhvg4okbcagi3pnkj0ao_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cli64p34c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s3i68oj6cpjedibct76cdjj2dj66mr66c5me4qraotncooj4ohh61hj9o3l6tjrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3aollmgo7coj662qb6oj7m2qmash5u)

# Wife Saves Husband -
Stuns Doctors
_**" He's turning into a shell of his former self."**_ Lee had become so frail that it took every ounce of energy just to hoist himself out of his scooter and into his favorite Lazy Boy. But Lee hadn't always been this way... When he was serving our country during World War II, he was a strapping 225 lb. guy. But now he was so weak that his spouse was forced to wait on him around-the-clock at the Veterans residence. After watching her husband's body slowly deteriorate, Lee's spouse had finally had enough. In a fit of desperation, she started to research natural remedies for something that would give her husband his vitality back. After a month of not having any luck, she finally stumbled upon a "rejuvenation" drink that sounded promising. After reading about the drink, she started whipping up a 6 oz glass of it each morning for her husband. "What could it hurt?" she thought. **She didn 't expect much at first, but just 12 days later, she couldn't believe what she was seeing.** She arrived at Lee's room one morning and much to her surprise, Lee was already up and trekking his way across the Veterans house. But that's not all. Later that night, he had enough energy to make the half-mile venture to the dining hall to eat dinner. That might not seem like much to you, but previously Lee was so frail that he was spending every waking minute in his bed. So getting out of his room wasn't even an option. She couldn't believe the turnaround she was seeing. _**" I am watching my husband _come back to life_. Energy better, breathing better, communication better, attitude better. I didn't expect noticeable improvements like this"**_ Lee's results were stunning, and I can't assure that everyone will get results like his... But if this drink did all of this for Lee, then just imagine what it could do for you. | Tony W. from Nashville writes...

_" Within 2 weeks of using the drink, the amount of pain, swelling and subsequent stiffness I had is reduced to almost _zero_."_
---
Mike B. writes...

_" Susie's joints feel much better as evidenced by her ability to navigate the stairs in my house. My back pain has nearly disappeared and I sleep better."_
---
Michael W. writes...

_" I am a truck driver who cannot go without your Greens. I am 75 years old and an old Army Para trooper. I have suffered from knee pain, but since taking the Patriot Power Greens, I have no more pain."_
---

**So what is this drink that 's helping Lee and thousands of others feel young again?**
It's a Doctor-formulated super-drink that was originally created to give our fighting men and women in the military more energy, more stamina and better focus.
It's so easy-to-use and it has been so effective for the soldiers that it's made their achy joints, bad knees and stiff muscles a thing of the past.
Now they wake up each morning feeling fresh, full of energy and ready to go all day.
And as you can see from the stories, folks are thanking their lucky stars for this drink.
If you're looking for more energy, help for everyday aches and pains, inflammation support or an easy way to add vital nutrition...
Please act fast - because when we first offered this delicious, easy-to-prepare superfoods drink, we SOLD OUT fast.
[**Grab Your Patriot Power Greens and Your $207 Worth of Bonus Gifts Today Before They 're All Gone**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z68n8t20to96dope0a0f6lbt7jti1ldp8r4iqaco_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cli64p34c5h2bs)
- Jeff Reagan, Founder
Patriot Health Alliance
P.S. More than 234,997 seniors swear by this drink after it's made their achy joints, stiff muscles and lack of energy a thing of the past.
_**What do they know that _you_ don't?**_
I'll reveal their secret [**right here**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2mcok2aomgj1v3qdoe5uuvpk4st7nvm7gt58f88_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cli64p34c5h2bs).
P.P.S. 67-year-old ex-cop Timothy C. has no pain and he's down 35 lbs. after starting to take this new drink...
_" I have amazed the medical folks by being in perfect health, no medical issues, perfect lab results and no medications."_
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z04urt8m0o62r3fg6iqq4j44864jp4clf4e1ct9o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cli64p34c5h2bs)
_You can learn more about the new drink that helped Timothy C.[**right here**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z05njck86spah71uib1dnve6q6fpc6805d6n3tio_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cli64p34c5h2bs)._
| **Linda S.** I love the greens. I have seen such a huge difference in my energy and it's even helped me slim down. I am so pleased with my results and can't wait to get the Double Strength when I run out of the regular.*
---|---
| **Elaine L.** Greens make a huge difference in my energy, aches and pains. Both me and my husband take it. We both have bad joints and can tell a difference if we miss it.*
---|---
| **Joseph E.** I cannot get enough of your Greens. I used to be so tired before rehearsals, but these days I have so much more energy. I even lost 20lbs just because I have more energy. The band mates and my fans are so very thankful. Cheers.*
---|---
| **Eleanor L.** Greens helped me with my digestion and has more energy by taking the double strength Greens. I do not get as sleepy in the afternoon like I used to. My joint aches have stopped and I'm 72 years old.*
---|---
| **James B.** I've been taking greens for a couple of months presently, and have had some very good results. My joint problems have seemed to disappear and also my weight seems to be maintaining itself, I am very pleased. My spouse and I both take it. What we like most about it is that it supports our troops.*
---|---
[**Grab Your Patriot Power Greens and Your $207 Worth of Bonus Gifts Today Before They 're All Gone**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5j16i0f2onaleta9h18vcfr6i8s8panhoug1c38_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cli64p34c5h2bs)

* Results may vary. Everyone's experience with this product is different. Lee's name changed for privacy.

body:
# **Fight to Win **
**NEW PODCASTS** Join Paige Willey on THIS IS YOUR COUNTRY as she takes us back to the 2020 presidential campaign to investigate the collusion of the mainstream media and Big Tech companies in paving Joe Biden's road to the White House - and how to prevent their interference in the future. On AMERICA'S MOMENT, Molly McCann breaks down the deluge of propaganda goading the United States towards intervention in Ukraine. **LISTEN NOW! **[Apple Podcasts](https://americanfirebrand.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bttjhtk-ihhjkhtyud-r/)[ ](https://americanfirebrand.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bttjhtk-ihhjkhtyud-y/) [Spotify ](https://americanfirebrand.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bttjhtk-ihhjkhtyud-j/) | **New Podcast **
# Low Energy Joe
**March 14th ** This episode explores media and big tech efforts during the 2020 campaign season to disguise Joe Biden's decades of failure in Washington and obfuscate his true policy stances on substantial issues--including foreign policy and energy. Now, the chickens are coming home to roost as the populace contends with the consequences of his regime of managed decline. [Watch Now](https://americanfirebrand.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bttjhtk-ihhjkhtyud-t/)
---

**New Podcast **
# Propaganda on Ukraine Pushes Us Towards War
**March 15th **Molly shares some of the reasons various commentators believe that Brent Renaud was killed by Ukrainian forces not Russians, and explains why the West needs to be on the alert for manipulated media and propaganda calibrated to push us toward a catastrophic war. [Watch Now](https://americanfirebrand.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bttjhtk-ihhjkhtyud-i/)
---

# Help Firebrand Fight to Win
[Donate Now](https://americanfirebrand.cmail20.com/t/y-l-bttjhtk-ihhjkhtyud-d/)

# Wife Saves Husband -
Stuns Doctors
_**" He's turning into a shell of his former self."**_ Lee had become so frail that it took every ounce of energy just to hoist himself out of his scooter and into his favorite Lazy Boy. But Lee hadn't always been this way... When he was serving our country during World War II, he was a strapping 225 lb. guy. But now he was so weak that his spouse was forced to wait on him around-the-clock at the Veterans residence. After watching her husband's body slowly deteriorate, Lee's spouse had finally had enough. In a fit of desperation, she started to research natural remedies for something that would give her husband his vitality back. After a month of not having any luck, she finally stumbled upon a "rejuvenation" drink that sounded promising. After reading about the drink, she started whipping up a 6 oz glass of it each morning for her husband. "What could it hurt?" she thought. **She didn 't expect much at first, but just 12 days later, she couldn't believe what she was seeing.** She arrived at Lee's room one morning and much to her surprise, Lee was already up and trekking his way across the Veterans house. But that's not all. Later that night, he had enough energy to make the half-mile venture to the dining hall to eat dinner. That might not seem like much to you, but previously Lee was so frail that he was spending every waking minute in his bed. So getting out of his room wasn't even an option. She couldn't believe the turnaround she was seeing. _**" I am watching my husband _come back to life_. Energy better, breathing better, communication better, attitude better. I didn't expect noticeable improvements like this"**_ Lee's results were stunning, and I can't assure that everyone will get results like his... But if this drink did all of this for Lee, then just imagine what it could do for you. | Tony W. from Nashville writes...

---
Michael W. writes...

_" I am a truck driver who cannot go without your Greens. I am 75 years old and an old Army Para trooper. I have suffered from knee pain, but since taking the Patriot Power Greens, I have no more pain."_
---

**So what is this drink that 's helping Lee and thousands of others feel young again?**
It's a Doctor-formulated super-drink that was originally created to give our fighting men and women in the military more energy, more stamina and better focus.
It's so easy-to-use and it has been so effective for the soldiers that it's made their achy joints, bad knees and stiff muscles a thing of the past.
Now they wake up each morning feeling fresh, full of energy and ready to go all day.
And as you can see from the stories, folks are thanking their lucky stars for this drink.
If you're looking for more energy, help for everyday aches and pains, inflammation support or an easy way to add vital nutrition...

name: American Update
subject: Wife Saves Husband - Stuns Doctors
body:
What is this drink that's helping thousands feel young again? [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9622%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=s3%2fk1BsD0v%2bvgxKBR2xYpg&sysid=1)
# Wife Saves Husband -
Stuns Doctors
_**"He's turning into a shell of his former self."**_ Lee had become so frail that it took every ounce of energy just to hoist himself out of his scooter and into his favorite Lazy Boy. But Lee hadn't always been this way... When he was serving our country during World War II, he was a strapping 225 lb. guy. But now he was so weak that his spouse was forced to wait on him around-the-clock at the Veterans residence. After watching her husband's body slowly deteriorate, Lee's spouse had finally had enough. In a fit of desperation, she started to research natural remedies for something that would give her husband his vitality back. After a month of not having any luck, she finally stumbled upon a "rejuvenation" drink that sounded promising. After reading about the drink, she started whipping up a 6 oz glass of it each morning for her husband. "What could it hurt?" she thought. **She didn't expect much at first, but just 12 days later, she couldn't believe what she was seeing.** She arrived at Lee's room one morning and much to her surprise, Lee was already up and trekking his way across the Veterans house. But that's not all. Later that night, he had enough energy to make the half-mile venture to the dining hall to eat dinner. That might not seem like much to you, but previously Lee was so frail that he was spending every waking minute in his bed. So getting out of his room wasn't even an option. She couldn't believe the turnaround she was seeing. _**"I am watching my husband _come back to life_. Energy better, breathing better, communication better, attitude better. I didn't expect noticeable improvements like this"**_ Lee's results were stunning, and I can't assure that everyone will get results like his... But if this drink did all of this for Lee, then just imagine what it could do for you. | Tony W. from Nashville writes...

_"Within 2 weeks of using the drink, the amount of pain, swelling and subsequent stiffness I had is reduced to almost _zero_."_
---

Mike B. writes...

_"Susie's joints feel much better as evidenced by her ability to navigate the stairs in my house. My back pain has nearly disappeared and I sleep better."_
---

Michael W. writes...

_"I am a truck driver who cannot go without your Greens. I am 75 years old and an old Army Para trooper. I have suffered from knee pain, but since taking the Patriot Power Greens, I have no more pain."_
---

**So what is this drink that's helping Lee and thousands of others feel young again?**
It's a Doctor-formulated super-drink that was originally created to give our fighting men and women in the military more energy, more stamina and better focus.
It's so easy-to-use and it has been so effective for the soldiers that it's made their achy joints, bad knees and stiff muscles a thing of the past.
Now they wake up each morning feeling fresh, full of energy and ready to go all day.
And as you can see from the stories, folks are thanking their lucky stars for this drink.
If you’re looking for more energy, help for everyday aches and pains, inflammation support or an easy way to add vital nutrition...
Please act fast - because when we first offered this delicious, easy-to-prepare superfoods drink, we SOLD OUT fast.
[**Grab Your Patriot Power Greens and Your $207 Worth of Bonus Gifts Today Before They're All Gone**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26651%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MyyR2sYXKx%2fRq%2fKRs9v6WA&sysid=1)
- Jeff Reagan, Founder
Patriot Health Alliance
P.S. More than 234,997 seniors swear by this drink after it's made their achy joints, stiff muscles and lack of energy a thing of the past.
_**What do they know that _you_ don't?**_
I'll reveal their secret [**right here**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26652%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XfJihAvWAEaRi7IZciRqBg&sysid=1).
P.P.S. 67-year-old ex-cop Timothy C. has no pain and he's down 35 lbs. after starting to take this new drink...
_"I have amazed the medical folks by being in perfect health, no medical issues, perfect lab results and no medications."_
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26653%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3WuByqj8CEjglE8mgmRHYg&sysid=1)
_You can learn more about the new drink that helped Timothy C.[**right here**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26652%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XfJihAvWAEaRi7IZciRqBg&sysid=1)._
| **Linda S.** I love the greens. I have seen such a huge difference in my energy and it's even helped me slim down. I am so pleased with my results and can't wait to get the Double Strength when I run out of the regular.*
---|---
| **Elaine L.** Greens make a huge difference in my energy, aches and pains. Both me and my husband take it. We both have bad joints and can tell a difference if we miss it.*
---|---
| **Joseph E.** I cannot get enough of your Greens. I used to be so tired before rehearsals, but these days I have so much more energy. I even lost 20lbs just because I have more energy. The band mates and my fans are so very thankful. Cheers.*
---|---
| **Eleanor L.** Greens helped me with my digestion and has more energy by taking the double strength Greens. I do not get as sleepy in the afternoon like I used to. My joint aches have stopped and I'm 72 years old.*
---|---
| **James B.** I've been taking greens for a couple of months presently, and have had some very good results. My joint problems have seemed to disappear and also my weight seems to be maintaining itself, I am very pleased. My spouse and I both take it. What we like most about it is that it supports our troops.*
---|---
[**Grab Your Patriot Power Greens and Your $207 Worth of Bonus Gifts Today Before They're All Gone**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c26651%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MyyR2sYXKx%2fRq%2fKRs9v6WA&sysid=1)

* Results may vary. Everyone's experience with this product is different. Lee's name changed for privacy.

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: American Action News
subject: Ben Stein’s FREE Guide to SurvivingBiden’s Double-Digit Inflation
body:
Many Americans are now wondering, “Just how bad is it?” It’s bad. Really bad.
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
URGENT Inflation Alert for Americans Over 60 |
---
| | | **URGENT INFLATION REPORT**
---
| **Americans Over 60 Must Do THIS Now!**
---
| **LOS ANGELES, Calif.** \-- As inflation grips the U.S. many Americans are feeling the pinch.

**Prices of numerous consumer goods have exploded** in just a few weeks. Gasoline is up 56 percent. Beef is up 2.3 percent in just one month. And used car prices are up 30 percent.

**“When serious inflation hits, it hits everyone,”** says Ben Stein.

While you might be able to avoid buying a used car, it’s difficult to avoid buying _gas or electricity_ for your car.

Many Americans are now wondering, _“Just how bad is it?”_

_It’s bad. Really bad._

**Overall inflation is up 5 percent in a year** — the largest increase since 2008 — and the _fastest rate_ of increase since 1982.

If your income hasn’t increased at least 5 percent in the last 12 months, then your money just doesn’t go as far today as it did last year. In other words, **you’re going backwards**. _You’re losing purchasing power._

Wolf Richter (a noted wall street investor) argues that inflation is actually higher than reported. Worse, this lost purchasing power is _**NOT**_ coming back. Richter writes:
---
| “The actual loss of purchasing power of the consumer dollar
is **far worse** than even these very ugly inflation data [...]
And this loss of purchasing power is _permanent_.”
---
| **Unfortunately, inflation will continue for at least the next 2 years unless something unheard of happens.** Biden’s trillions in stimulus money continues to flood the economy, making inflation worse. And the Fed doesn’t plan to raise interest rates until 2023 at the earliest.

**Between now and then, inflation will continue to run HOT** — possibly even _hotter_ than right now. Which means higher prices at the pump, the grocery store, the dealership — anywhere you normally buy goods and services.

**Fortunately, Ben Stein has some suggestions to protect you** from Biden’s runaway inflation. He explains it all in his **NEW report called “Inflation, Debt & Disaster”.**

This report is 100% FREE, and you can [**download it in seconds right here**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm713756kdg4jd3od6jgb7nu8b8ot4ijth66bb38_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cli62o74clh2bs).

**This no-nonsense report to protecting your wealth in retirement** will teach you how to avoid the destructive power of inflation — and possibly even benefit from it.

**Ben Stein knows what he’s talking about.** He’s lived through multiple inflationary periods and wrote extensively about them for the last 45 years. He studied economics at Columbia and Yale, and taught economics at 3 major universities and has written 5 best selling books and hundreds of articles in Barrons, Walls Street Journal, and The American Spectator about inflation.

So don’t wait, **get Ben Stein’s FREE REPORT** to protect your wealth from runaway inflation...
**= > **[**"Inflation, Debt & Disaster?" — Download Ben Stein's Free Report TODAY!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3tj5k3rjjmtnb8ge04b2hdsat4s63hf7jal5840_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cli62o74clh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zne7rtpelk4p8t1rvc4ppk4v25r1s7al8p6qsav8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cli62o74clh2bs)
---
| **P.S.** Thanks to Biden, the U.S. is experiencing rapid price increases unlike almost anything in the last 39 years. That’s why it’s so important to **ACT NOW** to preserve your retirement wealth, _especially_ if you’re over 60. Click the link above to get started immediately.
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2zkkijahi6sctqnidr62e55kkkav2r1nut88uepcg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1pl06u78nmd2e79paojogic7d7oeihvirlo19e8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cli62o74clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Patriot Health Alliance
subject: Wife Saves Husband - Stuns Doctors
body:
What is this drink that's helping thousands feel young again?
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
# Wife Saves Husband -
Stuns Doctors
_**"He's turning into a shell of his former self."**_ Lee had become so frail that it took every ounce of energy just to hoist himself out of his scooter and into his favorite Lazy Boy. But Lee hadn't always been this way... When he was serving our country during World War II, he was a strapping 225 lb. guy. But now he was so weak that his spouse was forced to wait on him around-the-clock at the Veterans residence. After watching her husband's body slowly deteriorate, Lee's spouse had finally had enough. In a fit of desperation, she started to research natural remedies for something that would give her husband his vitality back. After a month of not having any luck, she finally stumbled upon a "rejuvenation" drink that sounded promising. After reading about the drink, she started whipping up a 6 oz glass of it each morning for her husband. "What could it hurt?" she thought. **She didn't expect much at first, but just 12 days later, she couldn't believe what she was seeing.** She arrived at Lee's room one morning and much to her surprise, Lee was already up and trekking his way across the Veterans house. But that's not all. Later that night, he had enough energy to make the half-mile venture to the dining hall to eat dinner. That might not seem like much to you, but previously Lee was so frail that he was spending every waking minute in his bed. So getting out of his room wasn't even an option. She couldn't believe the turnaround she was seeing. _**"I am watching my husband _come back to life_. Energy better, breathing better, communication better, attitude better. I didn't expect noticeable improvements like this"**_ Lee's results were stunning, and I can't assure that everyone will get results like his... But if this drink did all of this for Lee, then just imagine what it could do for you. | Tony W. from Nashville writes...

_"Within 2 weeks of using the drink, the amount of pain, swelling and subsequent stiffness I had is reduced to almost _zero_."_
---

Mike B. writes...

_"Susie's joints feel much better as evidenced by her ability to navigate the stairs in my house. My back pain has nearly disappeared and I sleep better."_
---

Michael W. writes...

_"I am a truck driver who cannot go without your Greens. I am 75 years old and an old Army Para trooper. I have suffered from knee pain, but since taking the Patriot Power Greens, I have no more pain."_
---

**So what is this drink that's helping Lee and thousands of others feel young again?**
It's a Doctor-formulated super-drink that was originally created to give our fighting men and women in the military more energy, more stamina and better focus.
It's so easy-to-use and it has been so effective for the soldiers that it's made their achy joints, bad knees and stiff muscles a thing of the past.
Now they wake up each morning feeling fresh, full of energy and ready to go all day.
And as you can see from the stories, folks are thanking their lucky stars for this drink.
If you’re looking for more energy, help for everyday aches and pains, inflammation support or an easy way to add vital nutrition...
Please act fast - because when we first offered this delicious, easy-to-prepare superfoods drink, we SOLD OUT fast.
[**Grab Your Patriot Power Greens and Your $207 Worth of Bonus Gifts Today Before They're All Gone**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znvliap7sr41d26mop0t0b7vmh75ne1agtvldtmg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cli62o73chh2bs)
- Jeff Reagan, Founder
Patriot Health Alliance
P.S. More than 234,997 seniors swear by this drink after it's made their achy joints, stiff muscles and lack of energy a thing of the past.
_**What do they know that _you_ don't?**_
I'll reveal their secret [**right here**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn2h70rgt67vf52fo71dopg8c3h88qn94t7h43e8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cli62o73chh2bs).
P.P.S. 67-year-old ex-cop Timothy C. has no pain and he's down 35 lbs. after starting to take this new drink...
_"I have amazed the medical folks by being in perfect health, no medical issues, perfect lab results and no medications."_
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znrcgoiqj881adbdqqmert2v9isj68n7bb2ag28o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cli62o73chh2bs)
_You can learn more about the new drink that helped Timothy C.[**right here**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zanfk1muog73j77pgpprh732jvn8kpi50v2qm8i0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cli62o73chh2bs)._
| **Linda S.** I love the greens. I have seen such a huge difference in my energy and it's even helped me slim down. I am so pleased with my results and can't wait to get the Double Strength when I run out of the regular.*
---|---
| **Elaine L.** Greens make a huge difference in my energy, aches and pains. Both me and my husband take it. We both have bad joints and can tell a difference if we miss it.*
---|---
| **Joseph E.** I cannot get enough of your Greens. I used to be so tired before rehearsals, but these days I have so much more energy. I even lost 20lbs just because I have more energy. The band mates and my fans are so very thankful. Cheers.*
---|---
| **Eleanor L.** Greens helped me with my digestion and has more energy by taking the double strength Greens. I do not get as sleepy in the afternoon like I used to. My joint aches have stopped and I'm 72 years old.*
---|---
| **James B.** I've been taking greens for a couple of months presently, and have had some very good results. My joint problems have seemed to disappear and also my weight seems to be maintaining itself, I am very pleased. My spouse and I both take it. What we like most about it is that it supports our troops.*
---|---
[**Grab Your Patriot Power Greens and Your $207 Worth of Bonus Gifts Today Before They're All Gone**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq0m9hakcuko5b07d4imojcfr51adlpif1bf0rjg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cli62o73chh2bs)

* Results may vary. Everyone's experience with this product is different. Lee's name changed for privacy.
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.icyminews.com/prefs/9z2z7egtr56u0hd9r7os4cpu69fncevtor49f9firso).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf1te3lndjbfgnh2jiipsvdhd68eqtm8mu3gvm60_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cli62o73chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: 9 leftists arrested
body:
Peter, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It's never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That's why it's of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I'm no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](
https://yaf.revv.co/6dcc66cc90974a93?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220316_BDG_YAF_BSBSL2_REV_SMC-SMC) Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn't disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event, with the likely intent to do harm.

It's no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It's about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn't have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony, a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left's attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that's more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren't for the **Young America's Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university,**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America's universities has not yet been broken. **Young America's Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation's leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](
https://yaf.revv.co/6dcc66cc90974a93?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220316_BDG_YAF_BSBSL2_REV_SMC-SMC)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America's Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, "Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness." YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they're told to trust. YAF's team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here's why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF's Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D'Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes,** Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O'Keefe,** NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News's**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan's ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan's lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America's Foundation._ _That's why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can't do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it's become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn't want a fair discussion of ideas. But that's why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment's notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF's rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](
https://yaf.revv.co/6dcc66cc90974a93?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220316_BDG_YAF_BSBSL2_REV_SMC-SMC) Peter, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can't be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can't think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, "There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds." I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America's Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](
https://yaf.revv.co/6dcc66cc90974a93?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220316_BDG_YAF_BSBSL2_REV_SMC-SMC) [**DONATE**](
https://yaf.revv.co/6dcc66cc90974a93?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220316_BDG_YAF_BSBSL2_REV_SMC-SMC) [](
https://yaf.revv.co/6dcc66cc90974a93?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220316_BDG_YAF_BSBSL2_REV_SMC-SMC) | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59857152:6Jt0oQoNj:m:1:3317145305:A7CE3E4ED741B266940B19446A0A97E6:r) | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59857153:6Jt0oQoNj:m:1:3317145305:A7CE3E4ED741B266940B19446A0A97E6:r) | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59857154:6Jt0oQoNj:m:1:3317145305:A7CE3E4ED741B266940B19446A0A97E6:r)
---|---|---

11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor
Reston, VA 20191-1556

Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America's Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, "Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness." YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they're told to trust. YAF's team is the best at what they do. They are #1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America. Here's why: YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, YAF's Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President Mike Pence, Dinesh D'Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes, Lt. Col.Allen West , SpeakerNewt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O'Keefe, NFL star and Congressman Burgess Owens, Star Parker, Fox News'sJesse Watters, and many others. YAF teaches millions of students across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!) And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan's ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan's lasting accomplishments. No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America's Foundation. That's why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events. They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can't do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it's become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn't want a fair discussion of ideas. But that's why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment's notice. Peter, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can't be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can't think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, "There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds." I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro | | | | ---|---|--- 11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor Reston, VA 20191-1556 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 1, 2022. name: Patriot Health Alliance
subject: Wife Saves Husband - Stuns Doctors
body:
What is this drink that's helping thousands feel young again?
_Sponsored message_
# Wife Saves Husband -
Stuns Doctors
_**"He's turning into a shell of his former self."**_ Lee had become so frail that it took every ounce of energy just to hoist himself out of his scooter and into his favorite Lazy Boy. But Lee hadn't always been this way... When he was serving our country during World War II, he was a strapping 225 lb. guy. But now he was so weak that his spouse was forced to wait on him around-the-clock at the Veterans residence. After watching her husband's body slowly deteriorate, Lee's spouse had finally had enough. In a fit of desperation, she started to research natural remedies for something that would give her husband his vitality back. After a month of not having any luck, she finally stumbled upon a "rejuvenation" drink that sounded promising. After reading about the drink, she started whipping up a 6 oz glass of it each morning for her husband. "What could it hurt?" she thought. **She didn't expect much at first, but just 12 days later, she couldn't believe what she was seeing.** She arrived at Lee's room one morning and much to her surprise, Lee was already up and trekking his way across the Veterans house. But that's not all. Later that night, he had enough energy to make the half-mile venture to the dining hall to eat dinner. That might not seem like much to you, but previously Lee was so frail that he was spending every waking minute in his bed. So getting out of his room wasn't even an option. She couldn't believe the turnaround she was seeing. _**"I am watching my husband _come back to life_. Energy better, breathing better, communication better, attitude better. I didn't expect noticeable improvements like this"**_ Lee's results were stunning, and I can't assure that everyone will get results like his... But if this drink did all of this for Lee, then just imagine what it could do for you. | Tony W. from Nashville writes...

_"Within 2 weeks of using the drink, the amount of pain, swelling and subsequent stiffness I had is reduced to almost _zero_."_
---

Mike B. writes...

_"Susie's joints feel much better as evidenced by her ability to navigate the stairs in my house. My back pain has nearly disappeared and I sleep better."_
---

Michael W. writes...

_"I am a truck driver who cannot go without your Greens. I am 75 years old and an old Army Para trooper. I have suffered from knee pain, but since taking the Patriot Power Greens, I have no more pain."_
---

**So what is this drink that's helping Lee and thousands of others feel young again?**
It's a Doctor-formulated super-drink that was originally created to give our fighting men and women in the military more energy, more stamina and better focus.
It's so easy-to-use and it has been so effective for the soldiers that it's made their achy joints, bad knees and stiff muscles a thing of the past.
Now they wake up each morning feeling fresh, full of energy and ready to go all day.
And as you can see from the stories, folks are thanking their lucky stars for this drink.
If you’re looking for more energy, help for everyday aches and pains, inflammation support or an easy way to add vital nutrition...
Please act fast - because when we first offered this delicious, easy-to-prepare superfoods drink, we SOLD OUT fast.
[**Grab Your Patriot Power Greens and Your $207 Worth of Bonus Gifts Today Before They're All Gone**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd2qfqilh8enhprdp636qa7391dnukoeicuee3l0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cli61ob6c5h2bs)
- Jeff Reagan, Founder
Patriot Health Alliance
P.S. More than 234,997 seniors swear by this drink after it's made their achy joints, stiff muscles and lack of energy a thing of the past.
_**What do they know that _you_ don't?**_
I'll reveal their secret [**right here**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq5r55f1d0qqgi47ukoltdcdvqiunvvaafbaa91g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cli61ob6c5h2bs).
P.P.S. 67-year-old ex-cop Timothy C. has no pain and he's down 35 lbs. after starting to take this new drink...
_"I have amazed the medical folks by being in perfect health, no medical issues, perfect lab results and no medications."_
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4gvbatokmk6nqruj6iuakurlpes6rbqvbuj1np0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cli61ob6c5h2bs)
_You can learn more about the new drink that helped Timothy C.[**right here**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zibeeld9hsvsbqss57ljv66ja0ui7ljunj33joko_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cli61ob6c5h2bs)._
| **Linda S.** I love the greens. I have seen such a huge difference in my energy and it's even helped me slim down. I am so pleased with my results and can't wait to get the Double Strength when I run out of the regular.*
---|---
| **Elaine L.** Greens make a huge difference in my energy, aches and pains. Both me and my husband take it. We both have bad joints and can tell a difference if we miss it.*
---|---
| **Joseph E.** I cannot get enough of your Greens. I used to be so tired before rehearsals, but these days I have so much more energy. I even lost 20lbs just because I have more energy. The band mates and my fans are so very thankful. Cheers.*
---|---
| **Eleanor L.** Greens helped me with my digestion and has more energy by taking the double strength Greens. I do not get as sleepy in the afternoon like I used to. My joint aches have stopped and I'm 72 years old.*
---|---
| **James B.** I've been taking greens for a couple of months presently, and have had some very good results. My joint problems have seemed to disappear and also my weight seems to be maintaining itself, I am very pleased. My spouse and I both take it. What we like most about it is that it supports our troops.*
---|---
[**Grab Your Patriot Power Greens and Your $207 Worth of Bonus Gifts Today Before They're All Gone**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkdg9ihns38k4vhrloaq89v857adki551a3opqlg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7cli61ob6c5h2bs)

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, MARCH 17, 2022
34N22 RELEASES NEW AD HITTING WARNOCK ON SKYROCKETING GAS PRICES
---
| |
---
| ATLANTA - 34N22, a political action committee supporting Herschel Walker for U.S. Senate, released a new digital advertisement slamming far-left incumbent Raphael Warnock's disastrous record that has caused gas prices to soar across Georgia. In the Senate, Warnock has voted four times against the Keystone XL Pipeline, killing thousands of jobs and contributing to skyrocketing gas prices. The ad also features [newly uncovered footage](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o4jfEIHjKVJ_qlBv0HCSf7t_l5dnsKqn-G6Olksm3mI73LYMW_KhtaoPwveGbHFhcKGLheubyOOYZ-OU94M9NGkKVi9Mi5jY4wnzE_gk-oBUaIAuKKTU3DA094vgRYnUtReyPPnon1bmHh2okyQw83r8KBJczYqe4TbpohtVkDcuW7GEGLF-wcEM0bsnANQiilKljp767vjf-aHg4VQkHqL9h1DPmMuKbLfhmXKBovo=&c=oNyNnz_NZ9sd6tUIWCXbjsZSlfps8QxDrkkPML3Mg1FU__-s92j83A==&ch=RTM-B-N3q2slj2d2o9h0KDbDg7oPpl_pcW4EITXiJHrqHviY6ainsg==) of Warnock advocating for the elimination of all fossil fuels, further illustrating how disconnected he is from the pain at the pump working families are feeling--including in Metro Atlanta, where gas prices are among the highest in the nation.
"Raphael Warnock helped kill the Keystone Pipeline and American energy development--causing Georgia's gas prices to spike and our country to lose its energy independence," said 34N22 spokesperson Stephen Lawson. "Now it's clear that it was all part of his radical, far-left agenda from the very beginning. As Georgians watch the meter on the pump skyrocket and struggle to put gas in their car, they know exactly who's to blame--and see why Warnock isn't working."
Click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o4jfEIHjKVJ_qlBv0HCSf7t_l5dnsKqn-G6Olksm3mI73LYMW_KhtaoPwveGbHFh4USyngCnF7ecz42zqOg8erDHWRE-DYWrcTbSAAdPGN3Oq-kO9y5CCVMkcPYH32toCzcK7wl5OCj93SE7LBcNg30ccCOOcKBaaCyhUFgIgEwg4y46eYJStA==&c=oNyNnz_NZ9sd6tUIWCXbjsZSlfps8QxDrkkPML3Mg1FU__-s92j83A==&ch=RTM-B-N3q2slj2d2o9h0KDbDg7oPpl_pcW4EITXiJHrqHviY6ainsg==) or below to view the ad:

BACKGROUND In 2021, Warnock Voted Four Times Against Advancing The Keystone XL Pipeline
On February 4, 2021, Warnock Voted Against An Amendment To Approve The Importation Of Oil From Canada Via The Keystone XL Pipeline. (S. Amdt. 678 To S. Con. Res. 5, [Roll Call Vote #32](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o4jfEIHjKVJ_qlBv0HCSf7t_l5dnsKqn-G6Olksm3mI73LYMW_KhtXKh-pFmsHFXaEETY5cK-q6_dIBGfE2hQO95Vu2Ao68xLSyduokirRAJgiHVMWaNZX-EUrA-Zuwc0KK_I9rGc9MufpIKcN86nHMSbH_hKdZUDOY_-iNlZOWcF5VG7Zfs3BqMVr3m-d-94GEnG4k6GDT0oXm8mpIt7X3V7oopcSxUnbJi9bVNMwdrUtC4u67eTCUyFKjiI_djbmXWHLN-ev7u-TRH-4eL9-GQyyzhLkg3&c=oNyNnz_NZ9sd6tUIWCXbjsZSlfps8QxDrkkPML3Mg1FU__-s92j83A==&ch=RTM-B-N3q2slj2d2o9h0KDbDg7oPpl_pcW4EITXiJHrqHviY6ainsg==): Agreed To 52-48, 2/4/21, Warnock Voted Nay, [CQ Summary](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o4jfEIHjKVJ_qlBv0HCSf7t_l5dnsKqn-G6Olksm3mI73LYMW_KhtXKh-pFmsHFXB_F5pE2ahZA8BqA176pBj5O7ClQHzDCxP6akbnTH5gTt-P-TlNrXu5rrPtluJk7NrYFNS1T0omhBynoeTyNA67dK0y6KngiIVHo33xiWxak=&c=oNyNnz_NZ9sd6tUIWCXbjsZSlfps8QxDrkkPML3Mg1FU__-s92j83A==&ch=RTM-B-N3q2slj2d2o9h0KDbDg7oPpl_pcW4EITXiJHrqHviY6ainsg==), Accessed 5/13/21)
On February 5, 2021, Warnock Voted To Kill An Adopted Provision To Approve The Importation Of Oil From Canada Via The Keystone XL Pipeline. (S.Amdt. 889 to S.Con.Res. 5, [Roll Call Vote #53](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o4jfEIHjKVJ_qlBv0HCSf7t_l5dnsKqn-G6Olksm3mI73LYMW_KhtXKh-pFmsHFXZKYfUM3XfJ-qwKviWbQar7BtjJ_LjgZIR-AvIf3F5E0QQ4URon1YwvpgJy6jynqD_ecQTu9h16int7sJcf3PjX35qrGisUZIwE0nhbwJ3WajMXxwN8vCzxir9ztuBSA9N9l8Uc7N3mjHqRLntKHA5xltH8Jtuw5z7iiP4Ke3QwzctgZbHt6QnNyV6gciMaLYOXt3rfAlN2T9ZkOvt5URtymoXysgA_9e&c=oNyNnz_NZ9sd6tUIWCXbjsZSlfps8QxDrkkPML3Mg1FU__-s92j83A==&ch=RTM-B-N3q2slj2d2o9h0KDbDg7oPpl_pcW4EITXiJHrqHviY6ainsg==), Rejected 50-50, 2/5/21, Warnock Voted Nay; [CQ Summary](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o4jfEIHjKVJ_qlBv0HCSf7t_l5dnsKqn-G6Olksm3mI73LYMW_KhtXKh-pFmsHFXusYjbDc_RckZSyxGsXVx-sjop0a6I8laaZlv46EgLmi6bpG-YD8390DbaUrwhjASDYjCZnAJS9xAE6VM7TR_IDB6qP8h50inNz2yWsLrv6A=&c=oNyNnz_NZ9sd6tUIWCXbjsZSlfps8QxDrkkPML3Mg1FU__-s92j83A==&ch=RTM-B-N3q2slj2d2o9h0KDbDg7oPpl_pcW4EITXiJHrqHviY6ainsg==), Accessed 5/13/21)
On March 6, 2021, Warnock Voted Against An Amendment To Require Biden To Review And Approve The Keystone XL Pipeline Permit If The Project Would Create Jobs And Increase Revenues In Areas Impacted By COVID-19. (S.Amdt. 1197 To S.Amdt. 891 To H.R. 1319, [Roll Call Vote #83](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o4jfEIHjKVJ_qlBv0HCSf7t_l5dnsKqn-G6Olksm3mI73LYMW_KhtXKh-pFmsHFXYYV8eT5A2U2jUVRBZkfuMt3mpAuplQMPY7S1MSVMgG1Gc5ps1rJRMaWvxNdxRkRzECPeuFDO_puhCxczm6KxjVjv-ZEo4OJRvN-rFfW9y1p-fbHJBNKp-zZpjsLs08LitMQtnTr1ie-pcJAQQhhs6CY4SfjW0ZvonOyL9izI_Q-61vfS1zvELP1RY84sR_OYTdR185_MA-0wH1Zdlqm2EPFBCqOTau2A&c=oNyNnz_NZ9sd6tUIWCXbjsZSlfps8QxDrkkPML3Mg1FU__-s92j83A==&ch=RTM-B-N3q2slj2d2o9h0KDbDg7oPpl_pcW4EITXiJHrqHviY6ainsg==): Passed 51-48 3/6/21, Warnock Voted Nay; [CQ Summary](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o4jfEIHjKVJ_qlBv0HCSf7t_l5dnsKqn-G6Olksm3mI73LYMW_KhtXKh-pFmsHFXLWITttSMEnVSzfyk8HKGiCPlKymEEl-CLnjJ3mbsbHHpIiCBSnJli1X4Q1GP0HBGU3AERTJ7nMWqfS-KV2Nmiygo45XpYtjOEzPCuHmd5ek=&c=oNyNnz_NZ9sd6tUIWCXbjsZSlfps8QxDrkkPML3Mg1FU__-s92j83A==&ch=RTM-B-N3q2slj2d2o9h0KDbDg7oPpl_pcW4EITXiJHrqHviY6ainsg==), Accessed 5/13/21)
On March 6, 2021, Warnock Voted Against A Proposal To Recommit A COVID-19 Relief Bill And Include Language To Authorize The Keystone XL Pipeline. (H.R. 1319[,](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o4jfEIHjKVJ_qlBv0HCSf7t_l5dnsKqn-G6Olksm3mI73LYMW_KhtXKh-pFmsHFXTD1woTKxxOPmY1qgN1Q_kugmglLyTW94MoroTfBy7A0yqmG1e-_RMryqiZSJNJc2Vxs2i9w_w7IAiIx17BfS0THWHqWXaD2H7MqEFaivxDuKT2zZI4z-d8EmJbFtPE03dx4D_W0t5p5_rBj8EJ6LLYLsSj8J437kEz5JREn5H4tURwNNmKqDL-kQNrkGwBQgNinRXA244RYFePDqR9dVTVb6jweqhjs1&c=oNyNnz_NZ9sd6tUIWCXbjsZSlfps8QxDrkkPML3Mg1FU__-s92j83A==&ch=RTM-B-N3q2slj2d2o9h0KDbDg7oPpl_pcW4EITXiJHrqHviY6ainsg==)[ Roll Call Vote #108](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o4jfEIHjKVJ_qlBv0HCSf7t_l5dnsKqn-G6Olksm3mI73LYMW_KhtXKh-pFmsHFXTD1woTKxxOPmY1qgN1Q_kugmglLyTW94MoroTfBy7A0yqmG1e-_RMryqiZSJNJc2Vxs2i9w_w7IAiIx17BfS0THWHqWXaD2H7MqEFaivxDuKT2zZI4z-d8EmJbFtPE03dx4D_W0t5p5_rBj8EJ6LLYLsSj8J437kEz5JREn5H4tURwNNmKqDL-kQNrkGwBQgNinRXA244RYFePDqR9dVTVb6jweqhjs1&c=oNyNnz_NZ9sd6tUIWCXbjsZSlfps8QxDrkkPML3Mg1FU__-s92j83A==&ch=RTM-B-N3q2slj2d2o9h0KDbDg7oPpl_pcW4EITXiJHrqHviY6ainsg==): Motion Rejected 49-50, 3/6/21, Warnock Voted Nay; [CQ Summary](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001o4jfEIHjKVJ_qlBv0HCSf7t_l5dnsKqn-G6Olksm3mI73LYMW_KhtXKh-pFmsHFXJ8LW6hUyXSoY2dQ1J336Bopquk4du8thLPUXEFtAt2ngr9wcvACzrhB9u3rKbH3uuFHy4-fNoKc9ztYl8qzHhSmeHPeTj_-BljBkaEk71n0=&c=oNyNnz_NZ9sd6tUIWCXbjsZSlfps8QxDrkkPML3Mg1FU__-s92j83A==&ch=RTM-B-N3q2slj2d2o9h0KDbDg7oPpl_pcW4EITXiJHrqHviY6ainsg==), Accessed 5/13/21)
As of March the AAA Georgia average price for gas is $4.30. In March 2021, the average price of gas in Georgia was $2.30.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, MARCH 17, 2022 34N22 RELEASES NEW AD HITTING WARNOCK ON SKYROCKETING GAS PRICES | | | ATLANTA - 34N22, a political action committee supporting Herschel Walker for U.S. Senate, released a new digital advertisement slamming far-left incumbent Raphael Warnock's disastrous record that has caused gas prices to soar across Georgia. In the Senate, Warnock has voted four times against the Keystone XL Pipeline, killing thousands of jobs and contributing to skyrocketing gas prices. The ad also features == of Warnock advocating for the elimination of all fossil fuels, further illustrating how disconnected he is from the pain at the pump working families are feeling--including in Metro Atlanta, where gas prices are among the highest in the nation. "Raphael Warnock helped kill the Keystone Pipeline and American energy development--causing Georgia's gas prices to spike and our country to lose its energy independence," said 34N22 spokesperson Stephen Lawson. "Now it's clear that it was all part of his radical, far-left agenda from the very beginning. As Georgians watch the meter on the pump skyrocket and struggle to put gas in their car, they know exactly who's to blame--and see why Warnock isn't working." Click == or below to view the ad: | | | | BACKGROUND In 2021, Warnock Voted Four Times Against Advancing The Keystone XL Pipeline On February 4, 2021, Warnock Voted Against An Amendment To Approve The Importation Of Oil From Canada Via The Keystone XL Pipeline. (S. Amdt. 678 To S. Con. Res. 5, ==: Agreed To 52-48, 2/4/21, Warnock Voted Nay, ==, Accessed 5/13/21) On February 5, 2021, Warnock Voted To Kill An Adopted Provision To Approve The Importation Of Oil From Canada Via The Keystone XL Pipeline. (S.Amdt. 889 to S.Con.Res. 5, ==, Rejected 50-50, 2/5/21, Warnock Voted Nay; ==, Accessed 5/13/21) On March 6, 2021, Warnock Voted Against An Amendment To Require Biden To Review And Approve The Keystone XL Pipeline Permit If The Project Would Create Jobs And Increase Revenues In Areas Impacted By COVID-19. (S.Amdt. 1197 To S.Amdt. 891 To H.R. 1319, ==: Passed 51-48 3/6/21, Warnock Voted Nay; ==, Accessed 5/13/21) On March 6, 2021, Warnock Voted Against A Proposal To Recommit A COVID-19 Relief Bill And Include Language To Authorize The Keystone XL Pipeline. (H.R. 1319==: Motion Rejected 49-50, 3/6/21, Warnock Voted Nay; ==, Accessed 5/13/21) As of March the AAA Georgia average price for gas is $4.30. name: Patriot Health Alliance
subject: Wife Saves Husband - Stuns Doctors
body:
What is this drink that's helping thousands feel young again?

[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zf6fa6jso55oq5dc7m95kanoplk8ahvku303c6e0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clh64o36c3h2bs)
# Wife Saves Husband -
Stuns Doctors
_**" He's turning into a shell of his former self."**_ Lee had become so frail that it took every ounce of energy just to hoist himself out of his scooter and into his favorite Lazy Boy. But Lee hadn't always been this way... When he was serving our country during World War II, he was a strapping 225 lb. guy. But now he was so weak that his spouse was forced to wait on him around-the-clock at the Veterans residence. After watching her husband's body slowly deteriorate, Lee's spouse had finally had enough. In a fit of desperation, she started to research natural remedies for something that would give her husband his vitality back. After a month of not having any luck, she finally stumbled upon a "rejuvenation" drink that sounded promising. After reading about the drink, she started whipping up a 6 oz glass of it each morning for her husband. "What could it hurt?" she thought. **She didn 't expect much at first, but just 12 days later, she couldn't believe what she was seeing.** She arrived at Lee's room one morning and much to her surprise, Lee was already up and trekking his way across the Veterans house. But that's not all. Later that night, he had enough energy to make the half-mile venture to the dining hall to eat dinner. That might not seem like much to you, but previously Lee was so frail that he was spending every waking minute in his bed. So getting out of his room wasn't even an option. She couldn't believe the turnaround she was seeing. _**" I am watching my husband _come back to life_. Energy better, breathing better, communication better, attitude better. I didn't expect noticeable improvements like this"**_ Lee's results were stunning, and I can't assure that everyone will get results like his... But if this drink did all of this for Lee, then just imagine what it could do for you. | Tony W. from Nashville writes...

_" Within 2 weeks of using the drink, the amount of pain, swelling and subsequent stiffness I had is reduced to almost _zero_."_
---
Mike B. writes...

_" Susie's joints feel much better as evidenced by her ability to navigate the stairs in my house. My back pain has nearly disappeared and I sleep better."_
---
Michael W. writes...

_" I am a truck driver who cannot go without your Greens. I am 75 years old and an old Army Para trooper. I have suffered from knee pain, but since taking the Patriot Power Greens, I have no more pain."_
---

**So what is this drink that 's helping Lee and thousands of others feel young again?**
It's a Doctor-formulated super-drink that was originally created to give our fighting men and women in the military more energy, more stamina and better focus.
It's so easy-to-use and it has been so effective for the soldiers that it's made their achy joints, bad knees and stiff muscles a thing of the past.
Now they wake up each morning feeling fresh, full of energy and ready to go all day.
And as you can see from the stories, folks are thanking their lucky stars for this drink.
If you're looking for more energy, help for everyday aches and pains, inflammation support or an easy way to add vital nutrition...
Please act fast - because when we first offered this delicious, easy-to-prepare superfoods drink, we SOLD OUT fast.
[**Grab Your Patriot Power Greens and Your $207 Worth of Bonus Gifts Today Before They 're All Gone**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zj6lbio124l34i5dopivln8gb9qnj39j0itqpdu8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clh64o36c3h2bs)
- Jeff Reagan, Founder
Patriot Health Alliance
P.S. More than 234,997 seniors swear by this drink after it's made their achy joints, stiff muscles and lack of energy a thing of the past.
_**What do they know that _you_ don't?**_
I'll reveal their secret [**right here**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zatl5oicgd08m0nd0fsa2ugclgnbbo4ef1iaj4p8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clh64o36c3h2bs).
P.P.S. 67-year-old ex-cop Timothy C. has no pain and he's down 35 lbs. after starting to take this new drink...
_" I have amazed the medical folks by being in perfect health, no medical issues, perfect lab results and no medications."_
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2znh0gfmiheh3dg1ejobj3hqm3inoaot566d3ug3o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clh64o36c3h2bs)
_You can learn more about the new drink that helped Timothy C.[**right here**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zkplam4pk218uhasg2lf4jd39pfjpq04i4fkbiig_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clh64o36c3h2bs)._
| **Linda S.** I love the greens. I have seen such a huge difference in my energy and it's even helped me slim down. I am so pleased with my results and can't wait to get the Double Strength when I run out of the regular.*
---|---
| **Elaine L.** Greens make a huge difference in my energy, aches and pains. Both me and my husband take it. We both have bad joints and can tell a difference if we miss it.*
---|---
| **Joseph E.** I cannot get enough of your Greens. I used to be so tired before rehearsals, but these days I have so much more energy. I even lost 20lbs just because I have more energy. The band mates and my fans are so very thankful. Cheers.*
---|---
| **Eleanor L.** Greens helped me with my digestion and has more energy by taking the double strength Greens. I do not get as sleepy in the afternoon like I used to. My joint aches have stopped and I'm 72 years old.*
---|---
| **James B.** I've been taking greens for a couple of months presently, and have had some very good results. My joint problems have seemed to disappear and also my weight seems to be maintaining itself, I am very pleased. My spouse and I both take it. What we like most about it is that it supports our troops.*
---|---
[**Grab Your Patriot Power Greens and Your $207 Worth of Bonus Gifts Today Before They 're All Gone**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zjaug8m1vj5bbq62uta57th6idml53irngvec2n0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clh64o36c3h2bs)
