name: Patriot Health Alliance
subject: Wife Saves Husband - Stuns Doctors
body:
What is this drink that's helping thousands feel young again?
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---

# Wife Saves Husband -
Stuns Doctors
_**" He's turning into a shell of his former self."**_ Lee had become so frail that it took every ounce of energy just to hoist himself out of his scooter and into his favorite Lazy Boy. But Lee hadn't always been this way... When he was serving our country during World War II, he was a strapping 225 lb. guy. But now he was so weak that his spouse was forced to wait on him around-the-clock at the Veterans residence. After watching her husband's body slowly deteriorate, Lee's spouse had finally had enough. In a fit of desperation, she started to research natural remedies for something that would give her husband his vitality back. After a month of not having any luck, she finally stumbled upon a "rejuvenation" drink that sounded promising. After reading about the drink, she started whipping up a 6 oz glass of it each morning for her husband. "What could it hurt?" she thought. **She didn 't expect much at first, but just 12 days later, she couldn't believe what she was seeing.** She arrived at Lee's room one morning and much to her surprise, Lee was already up and trekking his way across the Veterans house. But that's not all. Later that night, he had enough energy to make the half-mile venture to the dining hall to eat dinner. That might not seem like much to you, but previously Lee was so frail that he was spending every waking minute in his bed. So getting out of his room wasn't even an option. She couldn't believe the turnaround she was seeing. _**" I am watching my husband _come back to life_. Energy better, breathing better, communication better, attitude better. I didn't expect noticeable improvements like this"**_ Lee's results were stunning, and I can't assure that everyone will get results like his... But if this drink did all of this for Lee, then just imagine what it could do for you. | Tony W. from Nashville writes...

_" Within 2 weeks of using the drink, the amount of pain, swelling and subsequent stiffness I had is reduced to almost _zero_."_
---
Mike B. writes...

_" Susie's joints feel much better as evidenced by her ability to navigate the stairs in my house. My back pain has nearly disappeared and I sleep better."_
---
Michael W. writes...

_" I am a truck driver who cannot go without your Greens. I am 75 years old and an old Army Para trooper. I have suffered from knee pain, but since taking the Patriot Power Greens, I have no more pain."_
---

**So what is this drink that 's helping Lee and thousands of others feel young again?**
It's a Doctor-formulated super-drink that was originally created to give our fighting men and women in the military more energy, more stamina and better focus.
It's so easy-to-use and it has been so effective for the soldiers that it's made their achy joints, bad knees and stiff muscles a thing of the past.
Now they wake up each morning feeling fresh, full of energy and ready to go all day.
And as you can see from the stories, folks are thanking their lucky stars for this drink.
If you're looking for more energy, help for everyday aches and pains, inflammation support or an easy way to add vital nutrition...
Please act fast - because when we first offered this delicious, easy-to-prepare superfoods drink, we SOLD OUT fast.
[**Grab Your Patriot Power Greens and Your $207 Worth of Bonus Gifts Today Before They 're All Gone**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsgl21132m4akvnut7val7fmtg6tpe41s0823c28_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clh64o31c9h2bs)
- Jeff Reagan, Founder
Patriot Health Alliance
P.S. More than 234,997 seniors swear by this drink after it's made their achy joints, stiff muscles and lack of energy a thing of the past.
_**What do they know that _you_ don't?**_
I'll reveal their secret [**right here**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zen68jlc3or9qdv48v7icp07ekjh7ki6s783mo3o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clh64o31c9h2bs).
P.P.S. 67-year-old ex-cop Timothy C. has no pain and he's down 35 lbs. after starting to take this new drink...
_" I have amazed the medical folks by being in perfect health, no medical issues, perfect lab results and no medications."_
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfklsu769j189fnhvgcb18o1aumhsej9mhrqg1ig_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clh64o31c9h2bs)
_You can learn more about the new drink that helped Timothy C.[**right here**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs44qp4sqrm67t9l1dcmg7fbuamhmkvvb5ma02u8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clh64o31c9h2bs)._

---|---

My joint problems have seemed to disappear and also my weight seems to be maintaining itself, I am very pleased. My spouse and I both take it. What we like most about it is that it supports our troops.*

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: 9 leftists arrested
body:
Peter, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It's never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That's why it's of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I'm no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](
https://yaf.revv.co/6dcc66cc90974a93?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220316_BDG_YAF_BSBSL2_REV_SMC-SMC) Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn't disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event, with the likely intent to do harm.

It's no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It's about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn't have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony, a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left's attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that's more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren't for the **Young America's Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university,**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America's universities has not yet been broken. **Young America's Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation's leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](
https://yaf.revv.co/6dcc66cc90974a93?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220316_BDG_YAF_BSBSL2_REV_SMC-SMC)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America's Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, "Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness." YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they're told to trust. YAF's team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here's why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF's Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D'Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes,** Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O'Keefe,** NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News's**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan's ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan's lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America's Foundation._ _That's why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can't do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it's become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn't want a fair discussion of ideas. But that's why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment's notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF's rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](
https://yaf.revv.co/6dcc66cc90974a93?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220316_BDG_YAF_BSBSL2_REV_SMC-SMC) Peter, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can't be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can't think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, "There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds." I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America's Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](
https://yaf.revv.co/6dcc66cc90974a93?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220316_BDG_YAF_BSBSL2_REV_SMC-SMC) [**DONATE**](
https://yaf.revv.co/6dcc66cc90974a93?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220316_BDG_YAF_BSBSL2_REV_SMC-SMC) [](
https://yaf.revv.co/6dcc66cc90974a93?utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=em&utm_campaign=20220316_BDG_YAF_BSBSL2_REV_SMC-SMC) | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59856705:JkyX-QoNK:m:1:3253819041:3532A81E4DD951004CDE46551B46EB00:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59856706:JkyX-QoNK:m:1:3253819041:3532A81E4DD951004CDE46551B46EB00:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59856707:JkyX-QoNK:m:1:3253819041:3532A81E4DD951004CDE46551B46EB00:r)

name: Team Greitens
subject: EXCLUSIVE: Breitbart Interview with Eric Greitens
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| EXCLUSIVE: Breitbart Interview with Eric Greitens
---
| St. Louis, MO - Former Missouri governor and Navy SEAL Eric Greitens appeared on Breitbart News Saturday to discuss how liberals along with feckless RINOs have conspired against President Donald J. Trump in order to undo his successful America First agenda. Governor Greitens also was [fully exonerated last week](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016cVvkbM1WXyI3jfarU60DWLa9H3s_NNDPb9Co0plmRj3w7ocLlVewj4S6ylYYq7vNXENn-mGDmdKGz1QHD1jAL2H3yYRbFOra9wGv9-uPm4ZbllTZCX6dD9gyBs5lu3MzCmBhEmBQVzoex5kN4aTLOa0uajp00SOLHUVFQTXd874_QWNOZJ1gOeogrZw326zbt4uHoRXcjO-f-o53OKjC3Fwo5nze1EDohK7SWr36jrtZ1f-SVxfD6VcFcu9PDKJdcbqaI8D-m9x2vaeQeOw_294s2EW6aANT6qoo1EJjLGfKWb6OxjmY6UVGs82Po0YBfJl1aWbC-Fa8qGWQEMC8Lolt4FzcT065qOiZqO8Swfc1bMh0A8-og==&c=LJ9QyYA3GQBT91oQVhi3S6kNN4f9SS6Hb2VA9U7RJnXb0Rzu4cozpg==&ch=_wkT07YkKZOClSrQDJw0Y00qOXftTn_ItP-vuEV1kIM2vEVS34gXYw==) for any wrongdoing after a George Soros funded group made baseless claims.
[Listen to the interview here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016cVvkbM1WXyI3jfarU60DWLa9H3s_NNDPb9Co0plmRj3w7ocLlVewj4S6ylYYq7v9vZbxytm0GfhD9GbqDtv5kBNSImoWs05LJMFg3vO7QURUdovKG5lC4IL8lZLPaqy1bXo3PCNPmeNQDUGmRxz4PwBup9pzJYQIPf824jJoTnHaojRJFVxcclWEHFKGB7J&c=LJ9QyYA3GQBT91oQVhi3S6kNN4f9SS6Hb2VA9U7RJnXb0Rzu4cozpg==&ch=_wkT07YkKZOClSrQDJw0Y00qOXftTn_ItP-vuEV1kIM2vEVS34gXYw==)
Exclusive -- U.S. Senate Candidate Eric Greitens: 'The RINOs Have Failed Us' [Breitbart](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0016cVvkbM1WXyI3jfarU60DWLa9H3s_NNDPb9Co0plmRj3w7ocLlVewj4S6ylYYq7v1dhDoovi77N-4oNEpSqD8d6Bke0R8fXYA8WeYMArEYt4uzgm1jvqLc0ifmnz7C-S3xqdzOT2mLMCN0EP6C4g9KUqflbxfZbYbHMObrBo3TKqsFLEywPxLpzGsDizBVVfLClEcYX0KcUuxRBbc-8fnvnqrFIpd9hfP7FAUOVCgvXnGgQ5O_m-KOD1m7tpJ0MhPMMv8Q9T8CU=&c=LJ9QyYA3GQBT91oQVhi3S6kNN4f9SS6Hb2VA9U7RJnXb0Rzu4cozpg==&ch=_wkT07YkKZOClSrQDJw0Y00qOXftTn_ItP-vuEV1kIM2vEVS34gXYw==)
Former governor of Missouri and front-running candidate in his U.S. Senate race, Eric Greitens (R), said he believes the future of the Republican Party has no place for "RINOs" (Republican in Name Only).
Greitens, who has come out against Senate Republican Leader Mitch McConnell (R-KY) while on the campaign trail, told Breitbart News Saturday the "country is in crisis" and the "RINOs have failed us," including McConnell, who "has repeatedly stabbed [former President Donald Trump] and the American people in the back."
"We need to have strong new leadership, and we have to have that because we have to recognize what's happening at this moment," Greitens said.
Greitens specifically said the "left is actively trying to destroy this country" and pointed to billionaire Democrat megadonor George Soros as an example, saying he "funds evil" by supporting district attorneys and leftist organizations around the country and "funneling tens of millions of dollars into politics."
"Then, you see the propaganda-press repeat all the leftist lies, and then the RINOs cower. Because of their corruption and their cowardice, they cower," he continued.
Greitens has had his own run-ins with unfounded accusations and Soros-backed prosecutors. St. Louis Circuit Attorney Kim Gardner has faced ethical complaints over the prosecution of Greitens. Gardner hired former-FBI agent William Don Tisaby in 2018 to investigate Greitens when he was governor over accusations that he had an affair and intimidated the woman into silence by threatening to expose compromising pictures of her. Greitens denies the accusations, but he stepped down from the governorship amid the subsequent upheaval.
Tisaby has since been charged with six counts of perjury and one count of evidence tampering, "all felonies, stemming from sworn statements in a March 2018 deposition before an invasion of privacy trial set for then-Gov. Eric Greitens," the St. Louis Post-Dispatch reported. He is set to stand trial on March 28.
Just last week, Greitens was cleared of accusations that he had illegally used his state campaign account to fuel his bid for the U.S. Senate. The allegations stemmed from a D.C.-based advocacy group, which Greitens said is also funded by Soros.
"All the great fighters knew -- Winston Churchill knew, Teddy Roosevelt knew -- that if you're fighting for the right things, you're going to have enemies, and RINOs don't want to have enemies," Greitens said. "...I'm happy that George Soros is one of my enemies. I'm happy that George Soros and the leftists are always coming after us because they're coming after me because I've been fighting for the people of Missouri. They're coming after me because I fight for 'America First' patriots."
He continued, "So yes, just in the last 48 hours, once again, it was a George Soros-funded organization [who] set another complaint against us -- another made-up series of lies. And then what happened? Once again, they found that these are all a bunch of nonsense lies. We were exonerated again, and we continue to go forward."
Greitens said, through his experiences, "the Soros mask of corruption is finally being ripped off," and everyone will "be able to see the truth..."
"Because what they did to me -- a George Soros-funded prosecutor hired a former FBI agent to create a false case against me. That former FBI agent has now been charged with seven felonies for perjury and evidence tampering for creating a false case against me. And he is going to be going to trial. Hopefully, he'll be the first person who goes to prison for trying to illegally overturn the results of the 2016 election," Greitens alleged.
With optimism about the direction of the GOP, the 2022 midterms, and the 2024 presidential election, Greitens said the "last chapter of this story is yet to be written..."
"...And that is that Patriots win. We're gonna take our country back. We're going to revive the Republic, and we're going say no to the left, no to the mainstream media," he said. "And we're gonna push the RINOs aside and take back the Republican Party and make it an 'America First' party."
Greitens, who says he is the "first candidate in the country" to come out against McConnell, is polling at 30.5 percent, according to a recent survey. His rating is seven points over Missouri Attorney General and U.S. Senate candidate Eric Schmitt, who has failed to say whether he would oppose McConnell as Senate leader after the 2022 midterms.

Governor Greitens also was == for any wrongdoing after a George Soros funded group made baseless claims. == Exclusive -- U.S. Senate Candidate Eric Greitens: 'The RINOs Have Failed Us' == Former governor of Missouri and front-running candidate in his U.S. Senate race, Eric Greitens (R), said he believes the future of the Republican Party has no place for "RINOs" (Republican in Name Only). Greitens, who has come out against Senate Republican Leader Mitch McConnell (R-KY) while on the campaign trail, told Breitbart News Saturday the "country is in crisis" and the "RINOs have failed us," including McConnell, who "has repeatedly stabbed [former President Donald Trump] and the American people in the back." "We need to have strong new leadership, and we have to have that because we have to recognize what's happening at this moment," Greitens said. Greitens specifically said the "left is actively trying to destroy this country" and pointed to billionaire Democrat megadonor George Soros as an example, saying he "funds evil" by supporting district attorneys and leftist organizations around the country and "funneling tens of millions of dollars into politics." "Then, you see the propaganda-press repeat all the leftist lies, and then the RINOs cower. Because of their corruption and their cowardice, they cower," he continued. Greitens has had his own run-ins with unfounded accusations and Soros-backed prosecutors. St. Louis Circuit Attorney Kim Gardner has faced ethical complaints over the prosecution of Greitens. Gardner hired former-FBI agent William Don Tisaby in 2018 to investigate Greitens when he was governor over accusations that he had an affair and intimidated the woman into silence by threatening to expose compromising pictures of her. Greitens denies the accusations, but he stepped down from the governorship amid the subsequent upheaval. Tisaby has since been charged with six counts of perjury and one count of evidence tampering, "all felonies, stemming from sworn statements in a March 2018 deposition before an invasion of privacy trial set for then-Gov. Eric Greitens," the St. Louis Post-Dispatch reported. He is set to stand trial on March 28. Just last week, Greitens was cleared of accusations that he had illegally used his state campaign account to fuel his bid for the U.S. Senate. The allegations stemmed from a D.C.-based advocacy group, which Greitens said is also funded by Soros. "All the great fighters knew -- Winston Churchill knew, Teddy Roosevelt knew -- that if you're fighting for the right things, you're going to have enemies, and RINOs don't want to have enemies," Greitens said. "...I'm happy that George Soros is one of my enemies. I'm happy that George Soros and the leftists are always coming after us because they're coming after me because I've been fighting for the people of Missouri. They're coming after me because I fight for 'America First' patriots." He continued, "So yes, just in the last 48 hours, once again, it was a George Soros-funded organization [who] set another complaint against us -- another made-up series of lies. And then what happened? Once again, they found that these are all a bunch of nonsense lies. We were exonerated again, and we continue to go forward." Greitens said, through his experiences, "the Soros mask of corruption is finally being ripped off," and everyone will "be able to see the truth..." "Because what they did to me -- a George Soros-funded prosecutor hired a former FBI agent to create a false case against me. That former FBI agent has now been charged with seven felonies for perjury and evidence tampering for creating a false case against me. And he is going to be going to trial. Hopefully, he'll be the first person who goes to prison for trying to illegally overturn the results of the 2016 election," Greitens alleged. With optimism about the direction of the GOP, the 2022 midterms, and the 2024 presidential election, Greitens said the "last chapter of this story is yet to be written..." "...And that is that Patriots win. We're gonna take our country back. We're going to revive the Republic, and we're going say no to the left, no to the mainstream media," he said. "And we're gonna push the RINOs aside and take back the Republican Party and make it an 'America First' party." Greitens, who says he is the "first candidate in the country" to come out against McConnell, is polling at 30.5 percent, according to a recent survey. His rating is seven points over Missouri Attorney General and U.S. Senate candidate Eric Schmitt, who has failed to say whether he would oppose McConnell as Senate leader after the 2022 midterms. | | | | FOLLOW US == == == == | | | | Greitens for U.S. Senate | PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 | | | Sent by mailto:team@ericgreitens.com powered by

name: Adam Hattersley
subject: ICYMI...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Adam Hattersley, Democrat, for Chief Financial Officer
body:
Dear Peter,

If you’re following the news in Florida right now, you probably know that things don’t look good. Costs are skyrocketing, and instead of helping, Republicans are attacking women, LGBTQ+ people, and nearly anyone who isn’t on board with Ron DeSantis’ radical agenda.

It’s time to stop the bleeding, shift our focus, and take action. We need to take bold action to address Florida’s skyrocketing cost of living. That means building more affordable housing, helping Floridians buy homes, lowering property insurance rates, and raising wages.

That’s why this month, I announced my run for Chief Financial Officer, one of only four statewide elected offices in Florida. Click here to become a founding donor to my campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ah-email-march-2022?refcode=icymilaunch]

When I joined the U.S. Navy 22 years ago, I never imagined that serving my country would mean seeking elected office. After winning Florida’s most competitive State House race in 2018, I even wrote a book called Accidental Politician.

Now, I see the challenges we’re facing. Our state has one of the highest uninsured rates in the country. Fewer and fewer Floridians can afford to buy a home. And we’re not protecting our infrastructure from the threat of climate change.

We need to do better, and that’s why I’m running for CFO, and that's why I'm proud to have the support of Florida leaders like Alex Sink, who served our state as CFO for four years and knows what it takes to make a real difference for Florida families.

In the coming weeks, we’ll dive deeper into what this office actually does and how I’ll tangibly improve the lives of Floridians as a cabinet member.

But here’s the bottom line: I’m a Democrat running to end more than two decades of one-party rule in Tallahassee and deliver results for you and your family. If you’re with me, click here to become a founding donor today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ah-email-march-2022?refcode=icymilaunch]

Become a Founding Donor [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ah-email-march-2022?refcode=icymilaunch]

Thanks for standing with me. This race won’t be easy, but I know that together, we can win and start delivering for Floridians like you and me.

In Service,
Adam Hattersley

Paid for by Adam Hattersley, Democrat, for Chief Financial Officer
Adam Hattersley for CFO
701 S. Howard Avenue #106-823
Tampa, FL 33606
United States

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: Friend, will you help me make history in North Carolina?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
There are currently no African American women in the Senate.
| | | Friend – in a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a donation to help our campaign reach our crucial mid-month goal and flip North Carolina blue. **But first, let me explain why your grassroots support is so important.**
---
I've dedicated my life to public service – as a public defender and judge, and later as the first African American woman to serve as Chief Justice of the North Carolina Supreme Court. I've seen firsthand how the laws made in Washington too often fail working people.

That's why I'm running for North Carolina's open Senate seat, and if we win, I’ll be the first African American senator my home state has _ever_ elected – and just the third African American woman to ever serve in the U.S. Senate. It won't be easy, but this is our chance to make history and give North Carolinians a fighter they deserve. And I know we can win.
**The latest polling shows me in a statistical TIE with my Republican opponents, and CNN ranks North Carolina as one of the _most likely_ Senate seats to flip blue. But that's exactly why the GOP is pouring millions into this race to defeat me – and I need your help.**
At this critical moment, I'm falling way short of my crucial mid-month goal – so I'm asking you personally: **[Please, will you give $5 or more – split between our campaign and Jacky Rosen's – so we can flip North Carolina blue, expand our Democratic Senate majority, and make our government better reflect the country it represents?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43065711/335556663/2054470355?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1679-bu-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDY1NDJmMC1mYmE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=roNjCKp1CoBuyXAfxvv5wejlMr3e4IkZfPwv4RSBm4M=)**
Friend, flipping North Carolina's Senate seat would be transformative. But with experts at Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight saying that Republicans are favored to take back the Senate, we need to compete _everywhere_ we possibly can to prevent a Mitch McConnell-controlled majority – and NBC News reports that our race in North Carolina could very well determine Senate control.
**In a race this close, it’s all going to come down to resources. But time is running out before our midnight mid-month deadline, and we're still way behind our goal. The only way I can get back on track is if grassroots supporters like you give now to help me close this gap.**
**[Please, friend, will you rush a split donation of $5 or more between my campaign and Jacky Rosen right now to help me make history in North Carolina – and protect and expand the Senate for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43065712/335556664/2054470355?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1679-bu-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDY1NDJmMC1mYmE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=roNjCKp1CoBuyXAfxvv5wejlMr3e4IkZfPwv4RSBm4M=)**

Thank you,

Cheri Beasley
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43065713/335556665/2054470355?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1679-bu-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDY1NDJmMC1mYmE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=roNjCKp1CoBuyXAfxvv5wejlMr3e4IkZfPwv4RSBm4M=)

name: Kasey Kinsella
subject: Welcome to Crystal's Campaign!
body:
Greetings,

This is Kasey, Field Director for Crystal Cavalier’s campaign
<https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=wR9crmXCl7yvYlRWVEGnSj3f2frvjOvqNlNgudpExEPyy39Y555AOGNlSJF9W1dy&e=d55fb552e7035f6453781be4fb10b617&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=welcome_to_the_campaign&n=2&test_email=1>.
I want to start by saying THANK YOU for being a part of making *herstory*,
because if elected, Crystal will be the first American Indian woman from
North Carolina to serve in the US Congress.

We are here to send Crystal to Washington, DC, and we cannot do it without
you.

<https://crystalcavalier.nationbuilder.com/r?u=wR9crmXCl7yvYlRWVEGnSj3f2frvjOvqNlNgudpExEPyy39Y555AOGNlSJF9W1dy&e=d55fb552e7035f6453781be4fb10b617&utm_source=crystalcavalier&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=welcome_to_the_campaign&n=3&test_email=1>

*Here are 3 ways to support today:*

1. If you live in District 4, can you send this Upcoming Events Email
<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1F61RYyr5hhLlvwFQ2HoSMIA1dW_Bpan5oM9M27yoPbE/edit>
out to 5 people in your network? *(And don't forget to get your
tickets!)*
2. Purchase a lawn sign <https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teamcsigns>
3. Purchase a t-shirt
<https://secure.actblue.com/donate/crystalclearcavalier>

Our team is so inspired by the outpouring of support the campaign has
received so far - from the $5 contributions to the $100 contributions, and
all those who've been lending a hand at our in-person events.

Let’s keep the momentum up!

With gratitude,

Kasey

617-306-6190 | kasey@crystalcavaliercongress.com

clean_body: Greetings, This is Kasey, Field Director for Crystal Cavalier’s campaign <>. I want to start by saying THANK YOU for being a part of making herstory, because if elected, Crystal will be the first American Indian woman from North Carolina to serve in the US Congress. We are here to send Crystal to Washington, DC, and we cannot do it without you. <> Here are 3 ways to support today: 1. If you live in District 4, can you send this Upcoming Events Email <> out to 5 people in your network? (And don't forget to get your tickets!) 2. Purchase a lawn sign <> 3. Purchase a t-shirt <> Our team is so inspired by the outpouring of support the campaign has received so far - from the $5 contributions to the $100 contributions, and all those who've been lending a hand at our in-person events. Let’s keep the momentum up! With gratitude, Kasey 617-306-6190 | kasey@crystalcavaliercongress.com crystalcavaliercongress.com <>

name: Valerie Foushee
subject: personally asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress

name: Crystal Vanuch
subject: Finally, some GOOD news! ⛽️ Youngkin's Gas Tax Holiday
body:
| | | [](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/b8b6d18b0a12bcea/87b6983653fbafdcc3d6b838967d376c)
---
Peter, **Finally some good news!** Yesterday, Governor Glenn Youngkin announced that he will introduce emergency legislation to suspend Virginia's gas taxes for the months of May, June, and July - effectively giving all Virginians 26 cents off at the pump. This is the type of leadership _and relief_ that Virginia’s families deserve. President Biden and Abigail Spanberger’s anti-energy policies have failed our country. Instead of making it easier to explore for oil and gas, they canceled the Keystone XL Pipeline on day one and added regulations that make it harder for America to achieve energy independence. __Now, we’re begging Venezuela, Saudi Arabia, and even Iran to produce more oil.__
---
---
[Chip in to hold these politicians accountable.](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/b8b6d18b0a12bcea/bcdc152b9e66fd23c3d6b838967d376c)
---
One thing is clear... we must hold these politicians accountable. **The**** Biden-Spanberger agenda needs to be reversed if we are going to get America back on the right path.** Winning this race and taking back the majority in the U.S. House is the only way we are going to do that.

We can hold the politicians accountable, win this race, and provide relief at the pump, but we need your help. **[Please stand with us and chip in $25, 50 or $100 right now!](http://firepit.campstrategic.com/go/1/5815412c19d967813a89ac0c84d83476/40203/b8b6d18b0a12bcea/15010285b5017b48c3d6b838967d376c)** Sincerely,

name: Val Demings (iphone)
subject: I have 15 minutes of free time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda
| | |
---
I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, friend. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare.
So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate.
Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was _destined_ for something bigger.
So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader who understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win.
So, I decided to run. And now, I'm 2 points away from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups.

It's critical that we win in Florida – and this race is tight right now, friend. I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $28.45, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida.
My 15 minutes are almost up, and I have to run to my next call: I hate to ask this, but if you believe in this campaign and want to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, will you donate $5 today? Here's the best link to contribute: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43067839/335563366/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2687-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTZhYzM2ZC1mZmE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=705w2UfM-sCeEAdQ83xjvFO1w75SJP-cbkFqhuPNBms=)**
All the best,

Val Demings
| | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. clean_body: I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda | | | I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, friend. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare. So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate. Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was destined for something bigger. So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader who understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win. So, I decided to run. And now, I'm 2 points away from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups. It's critical that we win in Florida – and this race is tight right now, friend. I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $28.45, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida. My 15 minutes are almost up, and I have to run to my next call: I hate to ask this, but if you believe in this campaign and want to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, will you donate $5 today? Here's the best link to contribute: = All the best, Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. & . I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. This comes after Sen. Grassley _helped write the bill_ that banned Medicare from negotiating for cheaper drug prices, ensuring Big Pharma could continue to make even larger profits on the backs of patients and taxpayers. [**If you are able, show your support at this link and your donation will benefit three strong progressive organizations in GA.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43069940/335565995/-993343980?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTIxYzI1ZS0wMmE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wc5o5yHAF6dAq0EI6RGXVywBwVbGRT0UkuYbTDKjTKU=#basics)

* [**Public Education Matters Georgia**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43069942/335565997/2007038306?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTIxYzI1ZS0wMmE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wc5o5yHAF6dAq0EI6RGXVywBwVbGRT0UkuYbTDKjTKU=&emci=a483b72c-fea5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=4521c25e-02a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=1037277) is a tireless group of education advocates pushing back against a barrage of bills this session that could censor classrooms, cut school funding, and intimidate teachers.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43071115/335572260/-1829049351?refcode=mh-jtk753-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNThhOTU5ZS0wM2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i_GAywyxosIQLm8ZAL1_dbxwsxMXVA8v1t-EJwHKoTc=)

This is important: Mitch McConnell only needs to flip one seat to take back the majority, and he's laser-focused on Catherine Cortez Masto in Nevada, Reverend Raphael Warnock in Georgia, Mark Kelly in Arizona, and my race in New Hampshire.

**[_Before I go any further, can you split a donation to hold these critical seats and protect our vulnerable Democratic majority?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43071129/335572268/-1869736276?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk753-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNThhOTU5ZS0wM2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i_GAywyxosIQLm8ZAL1_dbxwsxMXVA8v1t-EJwHKoTc=)**

Experts across the country are calling Arizona, Georgia, Nevada, and New Hampshire the most vulnerable seats in 2022 – and with the full force of the GOP coming after us, our Democratic Senate majority is in serious jeopardy.

**Putting it simply, losing even one seat means ceding control of the Senate to Mitch McConnell and the GOP – affecting everything from reproductive rights to health care protections.**

Protecting our Senate majority is the only way we’ll be able to keep fighting for the progress Americans need and deserve. But protecting the Senate will take considerable resources.

That's why we're launching a critical “Protect our Senate Majority” fundraising push to defend the four most vulnerable Democrats. [**Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and Senator Warnock's in Georgia, Senator Kelly's in Arizona, and Senator Cortez Masto’s in Nevada before midnight tonight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43071136/335572281/-1869736276?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk753-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNThhOTU5ZS0wM2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i_GAywyxosIQLm8ZAL1_dbxwsxMXVA8v1t-EJwHKoTc=)

[**So please, we're counting on your grassroots support to help us win in these four key seats and defend our Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43071144/335572293/-1869736276?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk753-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNThhOTU5ZS0wM2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i_GAywyxosIQLm8ZAL1_dbxwsxMXVA8v1t-EJwHKoTc=)

Maggie Hassan

Happy Saint Patrick’s Day, Peter! Did you know that New Jersey is home to more than 865,000 people who claim Irish heritage as their primary ethnicity? Whether you are Irish or just celebrating Saint Patrick’s Day like you are, I want to wish everyone a safe and fun holiday today.

---
Don’t forget to wear some green today, wish your friends and family a little bit of luck in their day, and if you’re indulging in some green beer or other holiday libations, please don’t forget to drink responsibly. Happy Saint Patrick’s Day! Toby Anderson

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Control of the Senate hinges on Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43071325/335573050/-420428835?refcode=20220317_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjY3YTNlNC0wM2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LfcJhlyhYDYkvq_RxgAw2R6UBReQ67vT7ehxfYtGzt0=) Friend - I'm one of the most vulnerable incumbent Senate Democrats up for reelection this year, and I need your help: while I've spent my time in office providing pandemic relief to struggling families, fighting for voting rights and delivering on our progressive priorities, extremist Republicans are doing everything they can to attack me and smear my record. Here's why: experts at _POLITICO_ say that Democrats' chances of defending our razor-thin majority hinge on keeping Georgia blue. This race will decide Senate control – but while GOP megadonors and dark money groups have millions to spend to try and buy this seat, we're running a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots support. **And unfortunately, with time running out before our crucial midnight fundraising deadline, we're falling incredibly short of our goal.** **So I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help today. I need to raise another $8,346 to fight back against GOP attacks and protect my seat – and I'm counting on you to help me get there:[ please, split $25 or more right now – as much as you can spare by midnight tonight – between my campaign and Seth Moulton's Serve America so we can win in Georgia and defend our Democratic Senate majority. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43071327/335573051/-392698372?refcode=20220317_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjY3YTNlNC0wM2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LfcJhlyhYDYkvq_RxgAw2R6UBReQ67vT7ehxfYtGzt0=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43071329/335573052/-420428835?refcode=20220317_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjY3YTNlNC0wM2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LfcJhlyhYDYkvq_RxgAw2R6UBReQ67vT7ehxfYtGzt0=)
As a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. But through hard work and the support of my family and community, I was able to graduate from college and went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm proudly serving as the first Black senator in Georgia's history. So if you care about defending our Democratic Senate, I'm counting on you to rush your immediate grassroots support before it's too late:** [**Please, split a donation of $25 or more now between my campaign and Seth Moulton's Serve America PAC – before our crucial midnight deadline – to help us fight back against GOP attacks, keep Georgia blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43071330/335573053/-392698372?refcode=20220317_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjY3YTNlNC0wM2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LfcJhlyhYDYkvq_RxgAw2R6UBReQ67vT7ehxfYtGzt0=) I appreciate it – thank you so much. – Raphael Warnock [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43071331/335573056/-420428835?refcode=20220317_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjY3YTNlNC0wM2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LfcJhlyhYDYkvq_RxgAw2R6UBReQ67vT7ehxfYtGzt0=)

And unfortunately, with time running out before our crucial midnight fundraising deadline, we're falling incredibly short of our goal. So I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help today. I need to raise another $8,346 to fight back against GOP attacks and protect my seat – and I'm counting on you to help me get there:= = As a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. Now, I'm proudly serving as the first Black senator in Georgia's history. That's why we have to fight back now – and it's why falling short of important goals like this isn't an option. Because if we fail to keep Georgia blue, Mitch McConnell will be back calling the shots and obstructing our Democratic agenda at every turn. The battle for Senate control will be won or lost in Georgia, friend. name: Capt. Hung Cao
subject: I can’t believe Biden did this to our soldiers
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59861036:JsTtDQoNo:m:1:3317145305:59FDC6F19DE94CEA5D03EA729655B23C:r) Peter, In my lifetime, I've seen Presidents with all sorts of beliefs and agendas, but I _never_ thought I'd see a Commander in Chief who disrespects our military as much as Joe Biden.

**[He's kicking out brave Servicemembers just because they refuse to take the COVID vaccine. Some will not even receive their benefits after YEARS of service to our country.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59861036:JsTtDQoNo:m:1:3317145305:59FDC6F19DE94CEA5D03EA729655B23C:r)**
_As a U.S. Navy combat veteran, I'm absolutely horrified._

**This is NOT how America treats our heroes. I won't stand for it,[and that's why I'm going to Congress to stop this madness.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59861036:JsTtDQoNo:m:1:3317145305:59FDC6F19DE94CEA5D03EA729655B23C:r)** [**< < JOIN IN THE FIGHT >>**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59861036:JsTtDQoNo:m:1:3317145305:59FDC6F19DE94CEA5D03EA729655B23C:r) _And as if it couldn't get any worse, our enemies are getting stronger every day while our troops are being slapped in the face._

Between Russia's invasion of Ukraine and China's threats to Taiwan, our enemies know they have a golden opportunity to act because of Joe Biden's extreme weakness.

_**I won't stand by idly while Joe Biden makes a mockery of our great country, and I know you won't either.**_

**That's why I'm activating a 3X MATCH until[11:59 PM TONIGHT](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59861036:JsTtDQoNo:m:1:3317145305:59FDC6F19DE94CEA5D03EA729655B23C:r), but it won't work unless you pitch in. **

name: Taylor Bollhagen, Campaign Manager
subject: We have to hit this goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Clay Aiken for North Carolina
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94965/images/Clay%20Logo%20Light.png]
Hey, it’s Taylor. Tomorrow we will officially be 60 days away from Clay’s election. We have a lot to accomplish before then, and in order to implement our winning strategy we need to hit our 60 day fundraising deadline.
Clay could make a real difference with this election, but only if we have the resources we need to get him across the finish line.
I’ve been campaigning for a long time, and after working closely with Clay I can tell you just how much I believe in him, and how much I believe in all of you. We are $14,321 away from our 60 day fundraising goal. Can I count on you to give $21 right now to help us close the gap? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=03172022_60DayFR_3&amount=21]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=03172022_60DayFR_3&amount=21]
Those of you who have been following us closely know, I’ve worked in this field for a while, and my experience tells me that we have to hit this goal if we want any shot at sending Clay to D.C.
If you can, please consider chipping in $21 before our deadline tonight at midnight. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=03172022_60DayFR_3&amount=21] You could be helping make history.
Taylor Bollhagen
Campaign Manager
Clay is running for Congress in the North Carolina 4th congressional district. He was born, raised, and is currently raising his son in the Triangle. He's running to use his voice to speak up and stop the loudest voices on the far ends of the political spectrum from sucking up all the oxygen in our political discourse.
Donate now to join the chorus and help send Clay to Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=footer&amount=25]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=footer&amount=25]
Paid for by Clay Aiken for North Carolina
Clay Aiken for North Carolina
PO Box 13274
Durham, NC 27709
United States
If you’d like to unsubscribe, we hate to see you go, but click here to unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/6edcfdd1-caa3-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/e685e3d2-07a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk2NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjg1ZTNkMi0wN2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cQjmWtUcxXcIFx6s6y77IJ18vqSwxvYSX06LdEioJQM=&id=112382424 .

If you can, please consider chipping in $21 before our deadline tonight at midnight. [] You could be helping make history. Taylor Bollhagen Campaign Manager Clay is running for Congress in the North Carolina 4th congressional district. He was born, raised, and is currently raising his son in the Triangle. He's running to use his voice to speak up and stop the loudest voices on the far ends of the political spectrum from sucking up all the oxygen in our political discourse. Donate now to join the chorus and help send Clay to Congress. | Peter, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis just signed the “Don’t Say Gay” bill into law, which prohibits classroom discussion about sexual orientation or gender identity and would be detrimental to the education and expression of LGBTQ+ youth. If we allow QAnon supporter and insurrectionist Dan Cox to become the next Governor of Maryland, he could do the same thing and worse. Cox is a former member of an anti-LGBTQ+ hate group, and in 2017 he represented a client in a lawsuit against Frederick County Public Schools, challenging their policy to allow students to use whatever bathroom affirms their gender identity. **And, Peter, a recent poll shows that he is the top Republican choice for governor.** We cannot allow a wannabe Ron DeSantis to be elected as our state's leader. John King is the only Democrat with the leadership experience and broad coalition support to defeat him in November, but he needs our full support today to fuel him there. name: Herschel Walker
subject: Most vulnerable Democrat NAMED
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
"MOST VULNERABLE DEMOCRATIC SENATOR UP FOR REELECTION." |
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59861619:6vBmWQoYN:m:1:3317145305:F951943EADE5E4AEBDB7C327E28AB8D7:r)

---
Peter,

It's becoming clearer by the day that this Senate race in Georgia is going to be THE race that will decide control of the Senate.

But don't take our word for it. Recently our opponent sent out an email to let his supporters know CNN had named him the _**" MOST VULNERABLE DEMOCRATIC SENATOR UP FOR REELECTION." **_

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59861619:6vBmWQoYN:m:1:3317145305:F951943EADE5E4AEBDB7C327E28AB8D7:r)
There you have it ... straight from our opponent's campaign. When we tell you how critical this race is, we really mean it.

According to recent polling, the race is too close to call. **[A Quinnipiac survey from last month had our campaign leading our Democrat opponent by ONE POINT- a statistical tie.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59861619:6vBmWQoYN:m:1:3317145305:F951943EADE5E4AEBDB7C327E28AB8D7:r)**

Peter, $7 or more today really would go a long way in helping us:
1. Register thousands of new voters across the Peach State
2. Reach persuadable voters who will be crucial to victory in November
3. Pay for airtime in expensive Georgia TV markets

In a race as close as the one we're facing, every dollar is make or break.

**[Please let us know we can count on you for your support today!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59861619:6vBmWQoYN:m:1:3317145305:F951943EADE5E4AEBDB7C327E28AB8D7:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59861619:6vBmWQoYN:m:1:3317145305:F951943EADE5E4AEBDB7C327E28AB8D7:r)
Herschel Walker
Republican Candidate for Senate

Pay for airtime in expensive Georgia TV markets In a race as close as the one we're facing, every dollar is make or break. name: Emily Seidel
subject: Does high inflation worry you?
body:
Everywhere you look, we are seeing higher prices. Whether it is gas prices, grocery bills, or energy costs, prices everywhere ar
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpbqjo3mvs52qsk7u2bk6gnfk4a32oilli8r52k0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2usp34tb5c8onat1hm5qeactnmlibbc5m61gm2sb4c2qn9clhcgq6ecbgeup76dtnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphlcaqr8c3imdj30t5lmgrr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or1ctimcpj6clim49fg)
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1eihbfnq5ro3b62p48987rs33e95fj73672f2bo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clj6cpj5clh2bs)
---
Dear Friend, Everywhere you look, we are seeing higher prices. Whether it is gas prices, grocery bills, or energy costs, prices everywhere are on the rise. These prices are rising in large part due to skyrocketing inflation. U.S. inflation has hit a 40 year high and continues to rise with no end in sight. Some experts say inflation will be high until at least the first half of 2022, while others are saying it will be high for even longer.
---
**DOES GROWING INFLATION** **CONCERN YOU?**
---
| | [**YES**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgqdlmjoieu838rtfrvdq0rjkrdnfbsj597jrbgo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clj6cpj5clh2bs)
---
| [**NO**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zeqsjpg1n6kmsh1if9lsf152a7dum7qsa49ni3n8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clj6cpj5clh2bs)
---
| | [**YES**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z02hph2frpste7fhb8d6bh2o0h05pvtp6mggoebg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clj6cpj5clh2bs)
---
| [**NO**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zf4cp1gc42cdhi4a6a9uq5acdlt5qho6u96q7on0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clj6cpj5clh2bs)
---
| | I’m sure you’ve probably seen rising costs in your own bills and utilities. These rising prices are affecting everyone. High inflation is making it harder for everyday Americans to live their lives and pursue their American dream. The Biden Administration promised that they would not raise taxes on people who made less than $400,000/year, but rising prices on goods that everyone needs is essentially a tax, and it affects the poor and the middle class the most. The problem is that Congress keeps debating more and more policies that will lead to higher costs for your grocery bill, higher costs to fill up your car, and higher costs to keep your house warm. The more they spend, the more inflation will go up, and the longer it will stay high. If you remember the high costs and impact of inflation of the 1970s, you’ll remember that we would NEVER want to go back to that, but that’s where we are headed. That’s why I’m emailing you today. **You can sign it at this secure link:[https://americansforprosperity.org/inflation-letter/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvhmhlgnk4ebi4v18b6r21dthg3a0lsie0sft3u8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clj6cpj5clh2bs)** Of course, Congress isn’t the only reason why inflation is high, but they can do a lot to make sure it doesn’t get any higher. I hope you decide to make your voice heard on this because it’s so important. Best, —Emily Emily Seidel
President and CEO, Americans for Prosperity
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3b8vup095o487u7totkhgn4lqs5a0br47t80ts0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clj6cpj5clh2bs)
---
Americans for Prosperity 1310 N Courthouse Road Suite 700 Arlington Virginia 22201 United States
This email was sent by Americans for Prosperity.
---

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Are you a “Domestic Violent Extremist”?
body:
Basically, if you believe fraud occurred in the 2020 Election or you don't buy CNN's COVID narrative, you're now considered a potential domestic terrorist!
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/L0tXAa15WmBUrxy8NBU6Fw/110JBluTVM2H72jLyZD05w)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/L0tXAa15WmBUrxy8NBU6Fw/110JBluTVM2H72jLyZD05w)A recently released report by the Department of Homeland Security should scare all of us.

Most of the twenty-page report was inward looking to find ways to root out "violent extremists" within DHS . . . which is their "politically correct" way of firing every conservative who works for them.

But here's what should have all of us worried about trigger-happy government thugs kicking in our doors in the wee hours of the morning:
> _DHS, noted that domestic violent extremists "who are motivated by a range of ideologies and galvanized by recent political and societal events in the United States pose an elevated threat to the Homeland in 2021." The assessment pointed to newer "sociopolitical developments such as narratives of **fraud in the recent general election, the emboldening impact of the violent breach of the U.S. Capitol, conditions related to the COVID-19 pandemic, and conspiracy theories promoting violence "** that "will almost certainly spur some [domestic violent extremists] [sic] to try to engage in violence this year."_
**Basically, if you believe fraud occurred in the 2020 Election or you don 't buy CNN's COVID narrative, you're now considered a potential domestic terrorist!**

Welcome to the club!

As the only deplatformed candidate running for U.S. Congress who has been defamed and designated by Facebook as a "dangerous individual," I know what it's like to be viewed as a terrorist by your own federal government.

Along with having my First Amendment right stripped, the FBI has also stripped me of my Second Amendment right by banning me from being able to own or possess a firearm . . . simply because I asked former FBI Director James Comey a question.

Now, I know my next statment will be all over the leftist media as soon as I hit the send button, but what the hell, let's do this! **If my own government considers me a domestic terrorist because I refuse to remain silent about the 2020 Stolen Election, and I refuse to cower to the ongoing COVID-19 theater, then I 'll proudly wear that label. . . . [so help send a person who Joe Biden, Big Tech, the FBI, and the Democrat Party all consider a "domestic terrorist" to Congress by donating to my campaign today!](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/L0tXAa15WmBUrxy8NBU6Fw/110JBluTVM2H72jLyZD05w)**
If you're one of the 70% of Republicans or 33% of all Americans who believe that the 2020 election was **illegitimate** , and not free and fair, then guess what? You're a "domestic terrorist" in the eyes of your own government . . . so, I suppose I'm in good company!

I've been banned and marginalized for my views for years, and one more false label doesn't bother me at all . . . **but I 'm more worried about YOU, my constituents, and every other American who is being falsely smeared by the Biden Regime as a "domestic terrorist".** I'm serious about that.

When our government starts dividing and classifying citizens by their political beliefs and labeling one side as "violent" potential terrorists, it's only a matter of time before they EXPAND their roundups and jailing of Americans without Due Process.

And yes, they are doing it now. Just take a look at all of the January 6th political prisoners who have been rotting away in jails without Due Process for over a year!

And where is Congress? Where are Republican politicians who are supposed to stand strong and protect us from the threat posed by our own government and its increasing overreach?

No, really, I'm asking. I haven't heard a peep out of them about any of this.

Patriot, help me stop this unconstitutional, un-American, nonsense. [Support my campaign today and send me to Washington where I will FIGHT for you.](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/L0tXAa15WmBUrxy8NBU6Fw/110JBluTVM2H72jLyZD05w) It's that simple.

Both the Democrat and Republican Establishments already fear me, [so let's make their nightmares come true by having me sworn in as a member of the 118th U.S. Congress](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/L0tXAa15WmBUrxy8NBU6Fw/110JBluTVM2H72jLyZD05w).

Thank you so much for all that you do!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: Derek Marshall
subject: A platform for the people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
I will always be upfront about the values I stand for. **To me, prioritizing decency and supporting a dignified life for all Americans translates to the policies I promote.** I truly believe that my populist platform holds the key to flipping this district blue by focusing on policies that would truly address our needs here in California’s 23rd district and across the country.
**Elected officials are supposed to be public servants.** But how does medical debt serve the people? Or student loan debt? Or investing millions into fossil fuels when there's a climate crisis? **We need public policy that serves the people, not corporate greed. **
**[If you agree with me, consider making an investment in my campaign by starting a monthly donation here. Donating even $5 monthly can add up for us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43075221/335594140/1232707546?refcode=3-17&amount=5&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGIwMjRiMy0xM2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G66Y7RwwWjGJd0UO5Xji0LNHkWzKBh4pw0tN3766_VI=)**

**People don't choose to get sick, but it is a choice to have a healthcare system that punishes people for it.** Medical debt weighs heavily on many Americans across the country and forces people to do the impossible to pay off exorbitant expenses. Price gouging of life-saving medications means many people can’t access the medicines they sorely need. **We can fix all of that with Medicare for All. **
The climate is in crisis. **Every day, scientists tell us that the bad is getting worse all to be met with officials saying change is on the way.** Meanwhile only a whopping 4% of our federal budget goes to energy and environment. **We must invest in a Green New Deal. **
We’ve cancelled debt for 100,000 borrowers. And what has it shown us? clean_body: Peter, I will always be upfront about the values I stand for. To me, prioritizing decency and supporting a dignified life for all Americans translates to the policies I promote. I truly believe that my populist platform holds the key to flipping this district blue by focusing on policies that would truly address our needs here in California’s 23rd district and across the country. Elected officials are supposed to be public servants. But how does medical debt serve the people? Or student loan debt? Or investing millions into fossil fuels when there's a climate crisis? We need public policy that serves the people, not corporate greed. = = People don't choose to get sick, but it is a choice to have a healthcare system that punishes people for it. Medical debt weighs heavily on many Americans across the country and forces people to do the impossible to pay off exorbitant expenses. Price gouging of life-saving medications means many people can’t access the medicines they sorely need. We can fix all of that with Medicare for All. The climate is in crisis. Every day, scientists tell us that the bad is getting worse all to be met with officials saying change is on the way. This email is about the Pension Benefit Guaranty Corp and the Butch Lewis Act. I know what you’re thinking, but please take a minute to read on – I promise this one is important.

During the Great Recession, companies across the country filed for bankruptcy – those bankruptcies hit the industrial and manufacturing sectors particularly hard. One of the casualties was Delphi, a major auto parts supplier, and its 20,000 workers, **over 5,000 of whom were from Ohio.**

The Delphi retirees lost their hard-earned benefits when the Pension Benefit Guaranty Corporation eliminated their pension plans in 2009.

Earlier this month, Marcy Kaptur and a bipartisan group of lawmakers introduced legislation to restore these workers’ benefits.

[**_Marcy Kaptur is fighting for Ohio working families, but national Republicans like Mike Pence are spending millions of dollars in an effort to defeat her. Chip in $5 today to keep Marcy in Congress fighting for working people._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43075320/335594263/1992726811?refcode=EM_FR_220317DelphiN_KB_15DO_9_NG_N_l1_TESTB&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWIwMjRiMy0xM2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-nBzDe9tRP6TQ7NFmJHHk2oW99y2ke9eZLO-PAPEuDY=) [DONATE TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43075321/335594264/1992726811?refcode=EM_FR_220317DelphiN_KB_15DO_9_NG_N_b1_TESTB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWIwMjRiMy0xM2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-nBzDe9tRP6TQ7NFmJHHk2oW99y2ke9eZLO-PAPEuDY=) This fight to protect retirement security for workers is nothing new for Marcy. Last year, she helped lead the way to pass the Butch Lewis Act as part of the American Rescue Plan. The legislation was named after an Ohio native and Vietnam War veteran, who was the former president of the Teamsters Local 100 Union in Cincinnati. Her efforts saved multiemployer pension plans across the country from insolvency.

Without this critical legislation, more than 1 million Americans would be on the verge of drastic cuts or complete loss of their retirement benefits.

**When corporate greed or market failures happen, working people need a champion like Marcy to stand up for them and fight for what they were promised – security in retirement.**

[**_Working people, families, and retirees have no greater champion in Congress than Marcy Kaptur. She proves it each and every day. Can you chip in $5 today so we can re-elect a champion for working people?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43075323/335594265/1992726811?refcode=EM_FR_220317DelphiN_KB_15DO_9_NG_N_l2_TESTB&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWIwMjRiMy0xM2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-nBzDe9tRP6TQ7NFmJHHk2oW99y2ke9eZLO-PAPEuDY=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43075324/335594266/1992726811?refcode=EM_FR_220317DelphiN_KB_15DO_9_NG_N_EL5_TESTB&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=EL5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWIwMjRiMy0xM2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-nBzDe9tRP6TQ7NFmJHHk2oW99y2ke9eZLO-PAPEuDY=)**

In solidarity, Kyle Buda Campaign Manager Kaptur for Congress Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. She is focused on getting big money out of politics, holding Wall Street accountable, fighting against bad trade deals that harm workers, ensuring access to health care for all, and restoring our Great Lakes. Can you help Marcy by giving monthly? = Paid for by Kaptur for Congress Kaptur for Congress PO Box 899 Toledo, OH 43697 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Flash Poll (via winterformontana.com)
subject: Don’t mess with horses
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WINTER FOR MONTANA
body:
Horses were being starved to death. Tom knew he had to do something. | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wCyWJD9PGMS1OFAxYZBFsHfIMer10EGv8LQticV23fQhPAppBIT6a9P-egKF6-ctHr1aj0Si8FvFj1fq0KKw8XG8gdyd5WDdORIBBZqpAukcllYyVvF12w4hLX8wpttwSOxOE1zT5k4aUu1r7jamC4VJm2drAX60zYoFVED3AkKoZ5wPNTIDt0ez81khovJ9uM95HJUQSzmJOYvm5Ia2x0vLGeBsG2Z_q8SXOkg-v08SrN-AlkWEYPvVNIXyAhwFlHP0Qi2howXS4SRWSSM3AgKMgWm1A8JGU4EMI3_M_p_E6AF3rmHbc6P43Wu7qvBdaNXcn7H2TkK-IpLbvJVKMm/3kf/vlltWoiDSUG0AeTLfXVKAQ/h0/QcSgXGau5niAhUmbTiwvivSWtrPoYVyiKpw9lv__iV8) Friend,

Recently, ABC Montana broke incredibly troubling news that someone in Columbia Falls, MT had been neglecting their horses — essentially starving them for God knows how long, potentially even leading one of the horses to its death. Luckily, animal control seized those 17 horses from that ranch, and they are now being nursed back to full health.

But there’s an even more concerning twist. The person who was rightfully arrested and charged with animal cruelty happens to be a far-right conspiracy theorist, who has been pushing Trump’s “Big Lie” — and recently moved to Montana from California.

**But that wasn’t an issue for Tom. When he heard about this tragedy, he immediately knew he had to step up and make sure the horses had everything they needed. Because one of the values that we share, and one that makes someone a true Montanan is helping out our neighbors — _regardless of their politics._ **

Tom loaded up his pickup with hay, and with the help of his friend Rep. Barbara Bessette and others, were able to donate a few meals to these beautiful horses in need.

Because for Tom, positive outcomes for our community are far more important than ideology. He knew that he couldn’t let these horses suffer. Some folks (on both sides of the aisle, unfortunately) would have undoubtedly used this as an opportunity to create another senseless, partisan fight.

This isn’t a normal thing for a Congressional campaign to do. So we want to know what you would have done if you were in Tom’s shoes. We want to confirm that Tom’s supporters agree with him and have his back, so we’re asking you to take our one question Flash Poll right now:
| **What Would You Do: Flash Poll**
(Please Select One Option)

_"I believe it's more important to make sure out neighbors
are taken care of. I would have fed the horses."_
| [I AGREE >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wCyWJD9PGMS1OFAxYZBFsHfIMer10EGv8LQticV23fQhPAppBIT6a9P-egKF6-ctHr1aj0Si8FvFj1fq0KKw8XYrM7R2wSd2T42aEbysyjduNCjZ3Q5Oawbjm5r26DvloIqPTV8lHLogMjm4TRaH4yjp60BXFECMq5N_3X2_e587KTY7zkLpStJzuBvJF9oC9iY1rRB1V65D7rqq7vSPUZCrcy45F4CtgHdLBEcAPn_n6nMlIxxOBjhT5666FCwvahLCqlnJYUXAlJ0dp24hGpGpXowECCAOrXcHjNd59VLfcO6TYC-U1BXGuun4-GARRTM4XF9QCtYy7CidMsaDUP/3kf/vlltWoiDSUG0AeTLfXVKAQ/h1/8XXzkEiOuQ43eRKKA4bz_btWPbdCyLmi6mpU8MAjSPI)
---
_"I believe it's more important to score political points,
even if someone gets hurt. I would not have fed the horses."
_ [I AGREE >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wCyWJD9PGMS1OFAxYZBFsHfIMer10EGv8LQticV23fQhPAppBIT6a9P-egKF6-ctHr1aj0Si8FvFj1fq0KKw8X4LLlBpwwjRYQtSPDujcXw0f4phypZkW8CrsJbQdcVvSySn-o_QBkyfbu9Tnupp-_JMTZElvqp2kDtMi2s5uHx9yUoVCF5TkehCpl4aZQgo5PksfLpohuEfuqa53maP3Y48_tRkOlJSbZsw4KWT21u1Fl3q0RK84PIJNZ57f7OhLE-FxmvEV6Z1giYxzHrNkpV6DlzJKI2tmYX65mghoH3I4WPuD6D6iTLUHURfRBqAajtt_pNe-HitPSvvl6t2-d/3kf/vlltWoiDSUG0AeTLfXVKAQ/h2/MBjONKqWmjkNlw8ontzHWE1we5p565ycm8aLFG4g6TU)
---
Thank you for taking our Flash Poll and for being a part of this grassroots campaign for change. We are honored to be building a network of supporters who care about returning our politics to a place that’s free from corrupt, partisan forces aiming to unravel the very fabric of our democracy.

That’s exactly what Tom’s goal was when he decided to run for office. He made a promise to build a campaign focused on real people and real issues facing our communities. He has never been about chasing TV cameras or catering to millionaire donors. He’s always committed to advocating for working Montanans regardless of who is watching — because that’s who Tom is at his core.

Thanks again,
— Team Winter

_P.S. If you’re interested in helping the horses in need too, you can email[horses@flathead.mt.gov](mailto:horses@flathead.mt.gov). Or, if you want to take action in your own community, we encourage you to donate or volunteer at your local animal shelter. _

_P.P.S. Of course, Tom had to bring Gary with him when he donated the hay to these horses. Here’s Gary helping Tom unload his truck at the donation center:_

[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wCyWJD9PGMS1OFAxYZBFsHfIMer10EGv8LQticV23fQhPAppBIT6a9P-egKF6-ctHr1aj0Si8FvFj1fq0KKw8XNCEueI3cPCrd-wcmCvdqJr_zkzGn8vJjW1kckxLMIWCRChtqEwz6V5pgMjxA1ZLyMVXfYo6cZA4Ig6iDo0bqPcJbOuNVuo7ILJUoJPqTfFWKPiYA6I7UqznNATfaOMnC0iXvi0C2wUIycdsBZ7EBa7iHEH6yrw8EFgNOVFkVhgna704wuaLxJYIovttL3li3auqfIxgYvX1lYNNvZ2H-WqYW1OtMUFHNZ5enzH6dggUY3shlGtw74ocxGDcUDECF/3kf/vlltWoiDSUG0AeTLfXVKAQ/h3/sMRjelw83cftm8b0b7YTKw9YbLdWa3wFl21vpOp2lG0)

Polson, MT
59860

To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Winter for Montana, please [click here](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4G2ymLkDHrjx60ZC15-UKIiNYkrVkE5q4WtlmSiEHa0K5MXs-_XOlUQjtnfrOL0P3OZjkZWC0HacBAQQF3nACb11Azs5M17EKzdOt5Nv8EE-bjO2tF8jc4Db1-26nPHGN1wfXU4_d9P_7LShS1PbkE-g4ZJIyZzvHuRnRx6bhamkQjUMwFffFP9F_s_GpLWehD/3kf/vlltWoiDSUG0AeTLfXVKAQ/h5/B4ebfrwy-lsfSOMcHvlLUPSxgID_eWXRo67u2GiXObU).
