name: Laurie Teper
subject: Saturday
body:
Hi Team!
I just want to give you the opportunity to sign up for Saturday if you haven't already done so. It helps us to plan for supplies.

Saturday, March 19 Door Knocking is in Person County from 8:00-12:00. Meet at Mt.Tizah Ballpark, 1795 Mt. Harmony Church Rd in Rougemont.

Sign up HERE: <https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10C0E4CADA629A3FACE9-canvassing>

We want everyone to be prepared so please arrive on time, wear comfortable shoes, look over the attached canvassing guidelines, bring car phone chargers, your enthusiasm and smiles! Light refreshments will be provided, instructions given and we will head out about 8:30. This area is going to be more driving intensive.

Don't forget to download the free Campaign Sidekick App. When you do, send me a text or email with your first/last name, address, phone number and email. We need this information to activate the App. To familiarize yourself with the App, here is a link to a 6 minute video on how to use the Campaign Sidekick App for Door Knocking <https://vimeo.com/438191866>.

Bring a friend to help! We encourage 2 people to stay together. Only one of you needs the App.

Print and bring the attached word document on issues that Courtney stands for. Familiarize yourself with it. If a voter has a question regarding a particular issue, you can refer to it.

WEAR YOUR COURTNEY GEELS T-SHIRT! If you don't have one, we will have them on Saturday (free). If you want to purchase a sweatshirt, the cost is $50, available as well.

Take photos while you are canvassing so we can get it out on social media. If you have a voter who is excited to vote for Courtney, ask their permission to take a photo while they hold a palm card or flyer and if we can post it on social media.

Brad Kirby is our Social Media Director. Please send him photos at _[m](mailto:bkirby7@gmail.com)[edia@courtneygeelsforcongress.com](mailto:edia@courtneygeelsforcongress.com)_

If you cannot door knock, phone banking is an option. You still need the Campaign Sidekick App, I need your information, and you need to sign up at the SignUp Genius link listed above.
To familiarize yourself with the App, here is a link to a 2 minute video on how to use the Campaign Sidekick App for Phone banking _<https://vimeo.com/496983629>_

If you want to join in a Zoom training for the app today at 2:00 (yes short notice) here is the link:

Topic: Laurie Teper's Campaign Sidekick Training
Time: Mar 17, 2022 02:00 PM Eastern Time (US and Canada)

Join Zoom Meeting
<https://us04web.zoom.us/j/4906980561?pwd=SXFKVGtvN0RudmhJWHB1VGxTL1I5dz09>

Meeting ID: 490 698 0561
Passcode: 042657

Please spread the word for volunteers and send them my way!
If you wish to be removed from this email list, please let me know.

I look forward to seeing some awesome volunteers this Saturday!

Fighting for Truth, Justice and Unity Together!
Laurie Teper
Volunteer Coordinator
Courtney Geels for Congress NC04
Email: [volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com](mailto:volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com)
Cell: (847)212-5651
[courtneygeelsforcongress.com](http://courtneygeelsforcongress.com)

Veterans Roundtable
Saturday, March 19 1:00PM
2nd Floor Conference Room
437 S. Yellowstone Dr., Madison WI

I am holding the first in a series of Veterans Roundtables to hear from our veterans on the issues that impact them the most. When I get to Washington D.C., I want to be in the best position to help those who have sacrificed the most for our freedom.

Please RSVP to Charity Barry (608) 425-0945 or Kyle Hudson (608) 415-8779

name: Val Hoyle
subject: Climate progress is under attack, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43076384/335599006/553882890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTk4NmVlMi0xNWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7g5ewNtV0ii2ndVo57qaw0NO848dkRASOkLnzx8-dew=&emci=3e3e4e47-0ca6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=25986ee2-15a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=9636579)
---

| | Peter, When I was the Democratic Majority Leader in the legislature, I took on the fossil fuel industry and led the fight to pass the bill establishing Oregon's Clean Fuels Program. It was a contentious vote, and it took a lot of work for us to push it through. In the end, we were able to pass it on a razor-thin 31-29 margin. Passing that bill was one of the proudest moments of my legislative career. And you know what, Peter? **The program has worked.** Since its inception in 2016, the Clean Fuels Program has already reduced 6 million tons of greenhouse gas emissions. And you know what else, Peter? **Republican politicians fought the creation of this program tooth and nail. And they're still fighting it today.** Stan Pulliam, a leading GOP candidate for Governor, recently attacked the Clean Fuels program on Facebook and said he would abolish it if he's elected: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43076385/335599007/-1599294071?refcode=2022-03-17-cleanfuels&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=25986ee2-15a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTk4NmVlMi0xNWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7g5ewNtV0ii2ndVo57qaw0NO848dkRASOkLnzx8-dew=) Stan Pulliam and my Republican opponent in the 4th district, Alek Skarlatos, are eager to tear down the progress that we've made to reduce our carbon emissions here in Oregon. **I don't have to tell you that we can't afford to go backwards on climate policy** \- we need to be taking bold steps to accelerate the transition off of fossil fuels, not rolling back the accomplishments we've made so far. Combating climate change and ensuring an equitable transition to clean energy for our workers and our communities is one of my top priorities. **Peter, I've been standing up to right-wing politicians like Stan and Alek for over 20 years.** The House Republican caucus is filled with corporate shills like these two, and I'll be ready to take them on from day one – because the future of our climate can't wait for climate deniers to "come around" to the reality the rest of us all are too aware of. Republicans only need to flip 5 seats to take over the House of Representatives. **And they're looking at our district as a pick-up opportunity.** If they do win this election and take over the House, we can kiss our climate goals goodbye. And we don't have any time to waste on this issue. I'm running because I know I can beat Alek Skarlatos in November. And I will lead House Democrats on policy solutions that combat climate change, just like I did when I led passage of the Clean Fuels Program in Oregon. _Val_ Express Donate: If you've stored your It was a contentious vote, and it took a lot of work for us to push it through. In the end, we were able to pass it on a razor-thin 31-29 margin. Passing that bill was one of the proudest moments of my legislative career. And you know what, Peter? The program has worked. name: Brit Bender
subject: We are going to Take Back Tennessee
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee]

Hi Peter,

We are going to Take Back Tennessee by mobilizing the most ambitious organizing plan our state has seen. Tennessee isn’t a red state — it’s a swing state that’s been subject to aggressive voter suppression for years by Republicans. Democratic voters are out there, and we know where they are. We just have to go and register them — and then make sure they vote.

We need organizers to register and mobilize these voters. If we want to recreate the success Georgia has had, we need to bring every Democratic voter into the electoral process, and that’s what organizers can do.

That’s where you come in — organizers cost money. And we need lots of them. Can you chip in now to help us raise the funds we need to hire organizers who will help us Take Back Tennessee? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

You deserve better leadership. Tennesseans deserve better. We need to organize like hell this year to build our Democratic base to be big enough to win and defeat the Republican status quo.

Can I count on you to chip in $25 now to help us build an organizing machine that can compete with Bill Lee and the Republicans? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/takebacktennessee]

Let’s get it done,

Brit Bender
she/her
Executive Director, Tennessee Democratic Party

subject: Biden is negotiating with terrorists
body:

| | | | | | |
---
| | Fellow Conservative,

Biden is literally negotiating with terrorists...

While Iran is threatening American citizens and firing missiles at the US consulate in Iraq, Joe Biden is actively negotiating with them to give them billions in relief.

**_For any normal administration this would be a deal-breaker but for Joe Biden it 's just a signal to continue. _**

# Underdog Mentality - Celebrate with Team Cole
We are officially on the ballot, and the time is now to join Team Cole. We've already had a lot of MVP's show up for us, and we want to celebrate this milestone because we are making history with this election. I hope that you'll [join us](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=f368b555e3&e=339f142c50) this **Friday, March 18th at the Wilson Store downtown.**
---

| **We will have a raffle, food and specialty cocktails!** I hope you will celebrate this moment with us as we are one step closer to winning this election and bringing power to the people of this district.

Yours in service,
Jahmal

name: Capt. Hung Cao
subject: This is NOT how America treats our heroes.
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59860716:JRbEJQoNk:m:1:3253819041:0F4561C8547BD9A4FFCF6892931D04FB:r) Peter, In my lifetime, I've seen Presidents with all sorts of beliefs and agendas, but I _never_ thought I'd see a Commander in Chief who disrespects our military as much as Joe Biden.

**[He 's kicking out brave Servicemembers just because they refuse to take the COVID vaccine. Some will not even receive their benefits after YEARS of service to our country.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59860716:JRbEJQoNk:m:1:3253819041:0F4561C8547BD9A4FFCF6892931D04FB:r)**
_As a U.S. Navy combat veteran, I 'm absolutely horrified._

**This is NOT how America treats our heroes. I won 't stand for it, [and that's why I'm going to Congress to stop this madness.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59860716:JRbEJQoNk:m:1:3253819041:0F4561C8547BD9A4FFCF6892931D04FB:r)** [**< < JOIN IN THE FIGHT >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59860716:JRbEJQoNk:m:1:3253819041:0F4561C8547BD9A4FFCF6892931D04FB:r) _And as if it couldn 't get any worse, our enemies are getting stronger every day while our troops are being slapped in the face. _

Between Russia's invasion of Ukraine and China's threats to Taiwan, our enemies know they have a golden opportunity to act because of Joe Biden's extreme weakness.

_**I won 't stand by idly while Joe Biden makes a mockery of our great country, and I know you won't either.**_

**That 's why I'm activating a 3X MATCH until [11:59 PM TONIGHT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59860716:JRbEJQoNk:m:1:3253819041:0F4561C8547BD9A4FFCF6892931D04FB:r), but it won't work unless you pitch in. **

**[Pitch in TODAY before 11:59 PM to activate your limited-time 3X match and stand with me and FIGHT BACK against the radical Left NOW. >>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59860716:JRbEJQoNk:m:1:3253819041:0F4561C8547BD9A4FFCF6892931D04FB:r)** **3X MATCHING: ACTIVE** [**PITCH IN $25 -> $100 IMPACT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59860717:JRbEJQoNk:m:1:3253819041:0F4561C8547BD9A4FFCF6892931D04FB:r) [**PITCH IN $50 -> $200 IMPACT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59860718:JRbEJQoNk:m:1:3253819041:0F4561C8547BD9A4FFCF6892931D04FB:r) [**PITCH IN $100 -> $400 IMPACT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59860719:JRbEJQoNk:m:1:3253819041:0F4561C8547BD9A4FFCF6892931D04FB:r) [**PITCH IN $250 -> $1000 IMPACT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59860720:JRbEJQoNk:m:1:3253819041:0F4561C8547BD9A4FFCF6892931D04FB:r) [**PITCH IN OTHER AMOUNT FOR 3X IMPACT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59860716:JRbEJQoNk:m:1:3253819041:0F4561C8547BD9A4FFCF6892931D04FB:r) In Liberty, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59860716:JRbEJQoNk:m:1:3253819041:0F4561C8547BD9A4FFCF6892931D04FB:r) CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret) Former Navy Special Operations Candidate, U.S. House (VA-10) [**PITCH IN AND SAVE AMERICA**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59860716:JRbEJQoNk:m:1:3253819041:0F4561C8547BD9A4FFCF6892931D04FB:r) Paid for by Hung Cao for Congress Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. clean_body: Peter, In my lifetime, I've seen Presidents with all sorts of beliefs and agendas, but I never thought I'd see a Commander in Chief who disrespects our military as much as Joe Biden. As a U.S. Navy combat veteran, I 'm absolutely horrified. This is NOT how America treats our heroes. I won 't stand for it, And as if it couldn 't get any worse, our enemies are getting stronger every day while our troops are being slapped in the face. Between Russia's invasion of Ukraine and China's threats to Taiwan, our enemies know they have a golden opportunity to act because of Joe Biden's extreme weakness. I won 't stand by idly while Joe Biden makes a mockery of our great country, and I know you won't either. That 's why I'm activating a 3X MATCH until , but it won't work unless you pitch in. 3X MATCHING: ACTIVE In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret) Former Navy Special Operations Candidate, U.S. House (VA-10) Paid for by Hung Cao for Congress Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. name: Laurel Imer
subject: URGENT ELECTION INTEGRITY CALL TO ACTION
body:
Jena Griswold and the Colorado Dems are trying to steal the 2022 Election. We must stop them!
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MEJTSJhATG4gmgLnuJaLbK3OQ3KkvTR8YxNaNwRr0vVYX5IlYpNLE56v3CjGbHfdOtvlKAJ9nktHnW3SC4gscAeGaPHrTPlOWJpRMfRGsbQPi7JwoCxnx6_2Pqey4-9E6Ia3qN0FGvyd6udqmqvLaNmsChiUou7Z&c=r3_SVm5s-Nb0hPF2JQSKfHirQsRbv1XWvRQ3YHTZWGrBzNVTUjWqlQ==&ch=KLRlf4gMiK_XJPee8hDEdgQ0oY4HixPrE43iiJ24UEjBl1DC2luDoQ==)

| Coloradoan, As I have never been afraid to admit, Mesa County Clerk Tina Peters, and I are the only true Election Integrity Candidate's in Colorado in the 2022 cycle. It is with that sentiment of Election Integrity that I am emailing you today with this urgent request.
I have attached below a forwarded email from the Jefferson County Republican Women containing the details of a devastating bill threatening Colorado's election system. This bill, spearheaded by Jena Griswold is a full-scale assault on our constitutional republic.
I am asking you to contact your legislators today and tell them to vote no on this massive expansion of voter interference.
The Dems like to claim election integrity when in reality this bill is voter suppression. I am calling on each and every Coloradoan that wants to see true election integrity, to call and testify and call your legislators now to stop this bill from getting passed.
This is a time-sensitive issue and it is critical that we all take action immediately.
Please see the full email below by signature.
Sincerely,
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MEJTSJhATG4gmgLnuJaLbK3OQ3KkvTR8YxNaNwRr0vVYX5IlYpNLE56v3CjGbHfdOtvlKAJ9nktHnW3SC4gscAeGaPHrTPlOWJpRMfRGsbQPi7JwoCxnx6_2Pqey4-9E6Ia3qN0FGvyd6udqmqvLaNmsChiUou7Z&c=r3_SVm5s-Nb0hPF2JQSKfHirQsRbv1XWvRQ3YHTZWGrBzNVTUjWqlQ==&ch=KLRlf4gMiK_XJPee8hDEdgQ0oY4HixPrE43iiJ24UEjBl1DC2luDoQ==)

| JEFFERSON COUNTY REPUBLICAN WOMEN ACTION ALERT Your help in contacting legislators is needed IMMEDIATELY. Democrat Secretary of State Jena Griswold and Democrats in the State Legislature are making a major power grab regarding our Elections. Senate Bill 22-153 will concentrate power in the Secretary of State's office, even allowing her to overrule local elected Election Officials. The bill even punishes those who speak against the Secretary of State's office! Your help is needed to prevent this "totalitarian state" type of legislation. TODAY -- Call or email the members of the legislative committees listed by our State Chair in her message below to oppose Senate Bill 22-153. Here are some specifics of the bill (research by John and Judy Case): Section 4 - Accelerates enforcement actions to be concluded within 30 days and no right to appellate review (review by Supreme Court is discretionary). Section 5 - Allows Secretary of State or Coordinated Election Official to file verified petition for neglect of duty under CRS 1-1-113. This will enable the secretary to sue clerks when the secretary lacks support of local electors. Sections 6 and 7 - Require all election officials to be certified after indoctrination in courses provided by secretary of state Section 8 - Criminalizes speech by election officials that is critical of the administration of elections. Section 9 - Restricts access to voting equipment (making it a crime for unauthorized persons to enter the voting system room) Section 10 - Requires every county of less than 1000 voters (in other words, all 64 counties) to purchase and use computer voting systems. Hand counts will be illegal. Section 11 - Forbids county personnel from making a backup image of the hard drive of any component of the voting system. This conflicts with clerks' statutory duties to preserve election records for 25 months after every election. Section 12 - Requires 24 hour video surveillance of voting systems. Section 13 - Allows secretary of state to overrule county canvass board's refusal to certify election results. Section 14 - Makes it a Class 1 Misdemeanor (penalty up to 18 months jail or $5,000 fine or both) to refuse to comply with rules or orders of the secretary of state. Section 15 - Makes it a Class 5 Felony (punishable by 1-2 years imprisonment and fine of up to $100,000) to (1) violate rules of SOS regarding access to voting systems, or (2) facilitate unauthorized access to voting system or election night reporting system, or (3) publish passwords or other confidential information relating to a voting system This bill is scary. It removes the autonomy of county commissioners to purchase election systems for their counties, and the authority of county clerks and recorders to run elections and keep records in their counties. It gives the secretary of state chokehold control of every county election.
MESSAGE FROM COLORADO GOP STATE CHAIR KRISTI BURTON BROWN: A message from the Colorado Republican Party Dear Colorado Republicans, We all know Jena Griswold's history of being an incompetent partisan hack without any actual elections experience. We've seen the rules she's tried to slam down -- including her attempt to ban election judges and poll watchers from talking to each other. Many of you helped us push back against her rules, and we saw that one reversed. Well, here we are again. Jena's Griswold's Boulder buddy, Majority Leader Stephen Fenberg, is sponsoring SB22-153 ([https://leg.colorado.gov/sites/default/files/documents/2022A/bills/2022a_153_01.pdf](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jusKQ5dHf2XZD6H5q-JJos-ik8556EPWWq5D_owgK8Tkhk13chjvQiLvUIFti5HQ3jck9y6yKel4vNamUi60ExL4QsvRgDmwdw7ML9CKys5DEV0CQCvby81CQMiL5yYhytYxEU75vmGMBtS8vmRPFn9C19Zi-cisUfTTuAKSP8thu1A-QKkrA__YY_4w4D-w2m91L193iDG_yG21Flv2eQHJmPuqFNaNt23aYq_909zwlVNyoZGcd-jZApvZJIbQfERDFNRXbXw=&c=K3GU5FPdyYfOX2TLDI6JIVwc_iLt-WhWYsroslm9A0Ku3f3rEXpB8Q==&ch=PLCgtASVpCWTXi8YEYBGSByjtHfXzNpPo0kDYkaz6IWml_V6cSSelw==)). Section 8(2) of this bill would allow the state of Colorado to decide whether or not what people say about elections is "true" or "false." Has Sen. Fenberg really forgotten what the First Amendment is all about? Jena Griswold probably never knew to begin with. Additionally, SB22-153 requires local election officials to take classes created by Jena Griswold's office and receive "certifications." What about Jena herself? Why are no certifications or classes required for the top elections official in Colorado? How can Jena sit up in Boulder and demand that the competence of local officials be "certified" while she can lounge about in total incompetence and constant staff turnover? Jena Griswold not only wants to be the Secretary of State; she wants to become judge and jury as well. The extreme portions of this bill are a transparent attempt to stoke fear and distrust in local elections and center all the power with Jena -- all without checks or balances. ACTION NEEDED: If you agree that Jena Griswold is a partisan hack who needs to leave the First Amendment and local control alone, please email your opposition! Jena Griswold -- [sos.rulemaking@coloradosos.gov](mailto:sos.rulemaking@coloradosos.gov) and [elections@coloradosos.gov](mailto:elections@coloradosos.gov) Bill Sponsors: Sen. Stephen Fenberg -- [stephen.fenberg.senate@state.co.us](mailto:stephen.fenberg.senate@state.co.us) Rep. Susan Lontine -- [susan.lontine.house@state.co.us](mailto:susan.lontine.house@state.co.us) Committee Democrats: Sen. James Coleman -- [james.coleman.senate@state.co.us](mailto:james.coleman.senate@state.co.us) Sen. Sonya Jaquez Lewis -- [sonya.jaquez.lewis.senate@state.co.us](mailto:sonya.jaquez.lewis.senate@state.co.us) Sen. Pete Lee -- [pete.lee.senate@state.co.us](mailto:pete.lee.senate@state.co.us) Thanks for continuing to stand with the Colorado GOP for election integrity and secure, accountable elections in Colorado! We're in this together, and I appreciate your work. KBB Chairwoman | Colorado GOP

name: Emily Seidel
subject: Does high inflation worry you?

---
Dear Friend, Everywhere you look, we are seeing higher prices. Whether it is gas prices, grocery bills, or energy costs, prices everywhere are on the rise. These prices are rising in large part due to skyrocketing inflation. U.S. inflation has hit a 40 year high and continues to rise with no end in sight. Some experts say inflation will be high until at least the first half of 2022, while others are saying it will be high for even longer.
---
**DOES GROWING INFLATION** **CONCERN YOU?**
---
| | [**YES**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcfcqfo6gvalbkkp3aqdqpnf6v9dcg3g8kncla68_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clj61oj6c3h2bs)
---
| [**NO**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc55j57i4m9ngbt0tsvdve2vuohaum9jal939c0g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clj61oj6c3h2bs)
---
| | [**YES**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4roetqn0qps8agtqau4kfmhdut2h9oe67t2k3g8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clj61oj6c3h2bs)
---
| [**NO**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9dtd7dtn9ms9cvo9imor1qhamjel0uas8pnobko_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clj61oj6c3h2bs)
---
| | I’m sure you’ve probably seen rising costs in your own bills and utilities. These rising prices are affecting everyone. High inflation is making it harder for everyday Americans to live their lives and pursue their American dream. The Biden Administration promised that they would not raise taxes on people who made less than $400,000/year, but rising prices on goods that everyone needs is essentially a tax, and it affects the poor and the middle class the most. The problem is that Congress keeps debating more and more policies that will lead to higher costs for your grocery bill, higher costs to fill up your car, and higher costs to keep your house warm. The more they spend, the more inflation will go up, and the longer it will stay high. If you remember the high costs and impact of inflation of the 1970s, you’ll remember that we would NEVER want to go back to that, but that’s where we are headed. That’s why I’m emailing you today. **You can sign it at this secure link:[https://americansforprosperity.org/inflation-letter/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsidq3p52nlg01btes97aps6hbvda78f3oniv00g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clj61oj6c3h2bs)** Of course, Congress isn’t the only reason why inflation is high, but they can do a lot to make sure it doesn’t get any higher. I hope you decide to make your voice heard on this because it’s so important. Best, —Emily Emily Seidel
President and CEO, Americans for Prosperity
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs7ve0eph6j1v1mtqrbj2ergb9p3e3jvnqphvsrg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clj61oj6c3h2bs)
---
Americans for Prosperity 1310 N Courthouse Road Suite 700 Arlington Virginia 22201 United States
This email was sent by Americans for Prosperity.
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kelvin=20King?=
subject: Together, We Can Preserve the American Dream!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/17a69d64ffd6/together-we-can-preserve-the-american-dream?e=7bbb93570f)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friends,

I've had the pleasure of meeting so many amazing Georgians on the campaign trail, and it's been the honor of my lifetime. If I haven't had the opportunity to meet you yet, I want to take this time to introduce myself. We ask you to please share this email with your friends and families because together, we can #WinforAmerica!

My name is Kelvin King. I'm a...

\- Christian, husband, and father
\- graduate of the United States Air Force Academy
\- proud veteran
\- successful businessman
\- longtime Republican activist (20+ years)
---
|
---
| I'm running for the U.S. Senate to preserve the American Dream for generations to come. Here's how we're going to do it:

\- Protect the right to life
\- Ban Critical Race Theory
\- Secure our elections
\- Defend the Second Amendment
\- Cut out-of-control federal spending
\- Strengthen our military
\- Promote American energy independence
\- Stand up to Biden's radical agenda
\- Support law enforcement
\- Lower taxes
\- End ALL unconstitutional mandates
\- Increase transparency and competition in healthcare costs
\- Build the wall
\- Support local control in our education system and increased schooling options for parents
\- Stand with Israel
\- Reduce government regulation over our small businesses
\- Improve veteran care
\- Put America FIRST

Learn more at [www.kelvinking.com/issues](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=4b6ba5ed31&e=7bbb93570f)

Let's [#RetireWarnock](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=2eb65ed81d&e=7bbb93570f) and send a conservative leader to Washington who will truly represent our Georgia values in the Senate. Together, we will [#WinforAmerica](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=827e5cdd7a&e=7bbb93570f)!

Very Respectfully,
---
|
---
| | | | | | | [](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=19185add14&e=7bbb93570f)
---
| | [](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=5a2d8e9a09&e=7bbb93570f)
---
| | [](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=99f9893697&e=7bbb93570f)
---
| | [](mailto:kelvin@kelvinking.com)
---
|
---
|

**Our mailing address is:**
Kelvin King for Georgia, Inc.
2900 Delk Rd, Ste 700, PMB 268
Marietta, GA 30067

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=e90c927666&e=7bbb93570f&c=37686ff65d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=e90c927666&e=7bbb93570f&c=37686ff65d).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: My Public Safety Plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
I've released my public safety plan, “Safe Communities, Safe Michigan.” Voters demand substance not rhetoric. That's what I'll deliver – substance | | | |
---
| | | [ ](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=5f714d5542&e=0636b97700)
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Peter —

I’ve released the first of many comprehensive policy proposals this week: **“Safe Communities, Safe Michigan.”** It’s my public safety plan for our state.

As I’ve traveled the state, one of the things that has stood out is that voters are engaged on issues, and they want candidates who are engaged as well. _So many politicians are full of fluff, or simply pander to the audience they’re addressing_.

That's not my style. **I’m a regular guy – a straight shooter – and I’m not afraid to talk issues.**

_Public safety is one I feel very strongly about_.

During my 34-years in law enforcement, I’ve seen the toll of crime and violence first-hand. I’ve devoted decades to helping our communities, and as Governor, I’ll continue that service by utilizing my experience to help make Michigan a safer place to raise our families, build our businesses and live out our lives. Highlights of my plan include:
* Continued funding for law enforcement;
* Advocacy and support for crime victims;
* Targeted support for reducing violent crime;
* Fully-funded narcotics enforcement;
* Improved school safety;
* Enhanced police recruitment and training; and
* Better implementation of technology.

Numerous Michigan cities have experienced unprecedented increases in violent crime the past two years and it will take new leadership at the Governor’s office to turn this around. We must put a stop to the calls to “defund the police” and instead focus our energy on priorities and programs that will actually make our communities and our schools safer. That’s what my plan will do. **Please take a few minutes to read my public safety plan**. You can download it by clicking the button below.
---
|
---
| [READ THE PLAN: SAFE COMMUNITIES, SAFE MICHIGAN.](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=f8632c44dd&e=0636b97700 "READ THE PLAN: SAFE COMMUNITIES, SAFE MICHIGAN.")
---
| As I said above, this is the first of many that I will be releasing.

**If you agree with me that it’s time to turn things around in this state and Fix Michigan, please take a minute to make a donation today. **

A contribution of **$25, $50, $100, or more** will go a long way in helping me get my message out.

I appreciate you. I appreciate this great state we are privileged to live in.

I’m determined to make it even better as your Governor.

Please join with me. Make a donation today. Volunteer. Endorse. Whatever you are able to do.

We need everyone involved so we can win this race.

Thank you.

Michael Brown
Republican for Governor
---
| [DONATE TO HELP CAPTAIN MIKE](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=ecd2002b30&e=0636b97700 "DONATE TO HELP CAPTAIN MIKE")
---
|

Peter,
Have you seen this quote from Liberal Lisa Murkowski?

“This is going to be my most difficult and expensive race yet.”
-Liberal Lisa Murkowksi

Thanks to your support, President Trump’s endorsement and Kelly’s drive, we are making Lisa Murkowski and her Washington D.C. bosses finally WORK to keep her senate seat.

clean_body: | | | | 📈 Team Tshibaka. | Peter, Have you seen this quote from Liberal Lisa Murkowski? “This is going to be my most difficult and expensive race yet.” -Liberal Lisa Murkowksi Thanks to your support, President Trump’s endorsement and Kelly’s drive, we are making Lisa Murkowski and her Washington D.C. bosses finally WORK to keep her senate seat. But we cannot celebrate just yet. WE need to make sure we continue to CRUSH our fundraising goals every month. Currently, we are off track of our FIRST 2022 FEC End-of-Quarter Goal. There is still time for us to correct this, but we urgently need your support, Peter. We appreciate all of your support during this time. Thank you, Tshibaka Finance Team STAY UP TO DATE WITH KELLY AND THE CAMPAIGN BY CLICKING THIS LINK: "ckq.io/yl3xzs" | | | | =

name: MarkKelly.com
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
The truth is, these are four of the races that will determine control of the Senate this year.
#

$5.
That is the donation we are asking you to split between Senators Catherine Cortez Masto, Maggie Hassan, Reverend Raphael Warnock, and Mark Kelly — the four most vulnerable Democratic Senators facing re-election this cycle.
If that’s all you need to hear, use this link to give:
[**https://act.markkelly.com/go/CoreFour**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-corefour-mar22?refcode=em220317-1-7&t=1&refcode2=2369_6688874_bEDr8V&akid=2369%2E6688874%2EbEDr8V)
If it’s not, let us explain why this request is so important:
The truth is, these are four of the races that will determine control of the Senate this year.
So, think about the issues that are most important to you — because those are the issues at stake in this race.
No Catherine Cortez Masto, no Maggie Hassan, no Reverend Raphael Warnock, and no Mark Kelly... and say hello to Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell.
Washington Republicans know this. That’s why the attack ads are already underway.
So today, we’re hoping for as many small-dollar donations as we can get — split between these four Democratic Senators — to fight back.
So we’re asking:
[**Can you split a $5 contribution between Catherine Cortez Masto, Maggie Hassan, Reverend Raphael Warnock, and Mark Kelly — four of the Democratic Senators already facing some of the most relentless attack ads this cycle?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-corefour-mar22?refcode=em220317-1-7&t=2&refcode2=2369_6688874_bEDr8V&akid=2369%2E6688874%2EbEDr8V)
**[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-corefour-mar22?refcode=em220317-1-7&t=3&refcode2=2369_6688874_bEDr8V&akid=2369%2E6688874%2EbEDr8V)**
When these four win this November, know the donation you split today contributed to that victory.
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=2369%2E6688874%2EbEDr8V).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEIL FOR ARKANSAS
body:
They're handing the world to China | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/neilforarkansas/jan6-5066233?e=eda539b26b)
---
| | [ ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=8a06c3d618&e=eda539b26b)
---
| | Fellow Patriot:

America is losing her place on the world stage.

In its blind hatred of Russia, the Biden Regime has made a series of incalculably stupid moves that have—in the span of less than 2 weeks—put our country in the _weakest_ position it’s been in history.

The world’s biggest oil producers are now conducting business in Chinese Yuan instead of American Dollars.

Saudi Arabia and the UAE refused to even pick up the phone when our illegitimate “President” Joe Biden called.

The Saudis are meeting with Xi in a few weeks.

Russia and China are now entangled in an unbreakable economic alliance.

Even India, China’s ancient enemy, is being pushed into China’s arms.

_The rest of the world is moving on, building a new global order without America in it._

World leaders know that Joe Biden is senile, and they know that he was not legitimately elected.

They don’t respect him. Why should they?

_Even foreign criminals don’t fear the U.S. Government anymore._

Just this week, a Mexican drug cartel shot up the outside of a U.S. Consulate just miles away from the Texas border.

**Our criminal, decadent Ruling Class is intentionally destroying the Dollar—and with it, our economy.**

_Americans are living paycheck to paycheck, struggling to afford basic necessities. It’s only going to get worse with these fools in charge._

**_We have to replace THEM before they replace US._**

[Replace Do-Nothing America Last RINOs like my opponent with an American Nationalist.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=99cd39e870&e=eda539b26b)

**[_I will IMPEACH our treasonous, senile, illegitimate "President" and his bimbo sidekick_ _._](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=1afaa94f00&e=eda539b26b)**

[**_Help me defeat the Bipartisan Establishment_ _\-- Chip into my election campaign right away and show them the power of the America First movement_**](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=54fc887a9f&e=eda539b26b) _._

_We need PATRIOTS who will**FIGHT** for the **AMERICAN** people, not limp-waisted frauds who never miss an opportunity to stab us in the back._

[_**Your contributions to my campaign will help me purchase TV and radio ads, yard signs, and other campaign materials so I can fight the worthless GOP, retire a weak RINO, and replace him with a fierce America First Warrior**_.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=bbe4b0a87c&e=eda539b26b)

Thank you in advance for your generous support. For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_

**P.S. The Republican Party of Arkansas is pulling out all the stops to kill my authentic America First campaign. ** [_**I know you're ready to replace these worthless RINOs with America First conservatives like me, and that's why I'm counting on your contribution of $5, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more today**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=f82fe8e6ef&e=eda539b26b)** _._**

Hello,
Donald Trump calls Vladimir Putin a “genius.” – “So smart.”
After Russia attacked our elections in 2016, Trump stood next to Putin and told the world that he believed Putin over the American intelligence community.
When Congress approved military aid for Ukraine to fight back against Russia, Donald Trump told President Zelensky in a now-infamous phone call that he just needed “a favor” first.
And what did senior Republicans like Mitch McConnell and my opponent Chuck Grassley do or say in response? _Nothing._
**Now, suddenly, with Putin sending tanks, warplanes, and cruise missiles capable of leveling entire apartment buildings into Ukraine... Chuck Grassley wants to act tough on Russia._I’m sorry, but where were you before?_**
As a three-star admiral with over 36 years of service in the U.S. Navy, I’d be the most senior military person ever-elected to Congress. Meanwhile, my opponent Chuck Grassley is still supporting a twice-impeached president who probably can’t even find Ukraine on a map.
If I defeat Chuck Grassley this November, Democrats are guaranteed to hold onto our Senate majority. And the polls show we can win. Grassley’s approval ratings here in Iowa are now lower than they’ve EVER been.
But Trump has already come to campaign for Grassley in Iowa, and McConnell is raising millions into Super PACs to try to stop me. **We need to raise $20,000 before midnight tonight if we have a chance of fighting back, and right now, we’re still dangerously short.**
**I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now if we’re going to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue in ‘22.**

subject: Women’s History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Liz Mathis for Congress
body:
March is Women’s History Month, a time to celebrate the great accomplishments that women have achieved and continue to achieve every day.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43065667/335556551/1298876502?refcode=em_poll_2022.03.17_b1_tmhq_all&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTFmM2QxNi1mY2E1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LicrBXH5a4mzy-QVOPwLY_M7d1VmKSCi1nB2Ztgvc4A=) Hi Peter, March is Women’s History Month, a time to celebrate the great accomplishments that women have achieved and continue to achieve every day. While women have made some great strides, we still have a ways to go. State legislatures across the country are rolling back access to reproductive health care and limiting women’s freedom to make their own health care decisions. name: Michael Bennet
subject: re: the Big Oil Windfalls Tax
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43078887/335609849/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTc1ODUwOS0xZWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w5n7_q16lRC_ng5E22mnZpNEksip1weUEhrk5Q1wgYM=)
Friend — I don’t need to tell you about rising energy costs, because I know you’re seeing them every day. Gas prices are higher than ever before, and hard-working Americans are feeling the effects every time they head to the pump. I’m working to make sure we transition to a clean energy economy and fought to include provisions that will help us do so in the infrastructure package we passed last year, which will create good-paying jobs in Colorado and help us fight climate change. While that work takes time, costs are rising now. That’s why I joined several of my colleagues in introducing the Big Oil Windfall Profits Tax, legislation to curb profiteering by large oil companies and provide relief for folks like you. Oil giants like Exxon Mobil and Chevron are seeing record profits, while the working families I serve are worried about how they’ll afford their next fill-up. As gas prices increase, I’m holding large oil and gas companies accountable to prevent them from using this moment to exploit American consumers. This bill makes sure big oil companies pay their fair share, while protecting American consumers and small businesses.The funds raised would go straight back into your pockets in the form of a rebate every few months. **It’s imperative that my Senate colleagues cooperate and pass this legislation quickly, because working class families can’t afford to wait. If you’re with me, sign my petition calling on the Senate to pass the Big Oil Windfalls Tax.** | | **[ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43078888/335609850/-259609349?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220317_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMTc1ODUwOS0xZWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w5n7_q16lRC_ng5E22mnZpNEksip1weUEhrk5Q1wgYM=&emci=47d12195-15a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=01758509-1ea6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=1295540)**
---
Thanks for all your support. I will never stop working to make life easier for you and all Americans.
— Michael
---

PO Box 3078
Denver, CO 80201
United States

name: Team Barletta
subject: Team Barletta Campaign Update
body: | | | | Updates from the trail --- --- Peter Willis, Back at it again with another campaign update and we'd be hard pressed to find anyone else working harder than Lou to win this governor's race. _**In the last 11 days alone Lou has hit an unprecedented 13 different counties: Columbia, Montour, Butler, Westmoreland, Carbon, Schuylkill, Philadelphia, Montgomery, Northumberland, McKean, Fayette, Allegheny, and Washington.**_ There are candidates who are spending millions of dollars on TV ads that are having no effect, because they simply can't replicate Lou's grassroots powerhouse and the relationship he already enjoys with voters. As a result, Lou continues to lead the crowded Republican primary field, according to a series of recent public polls. clean_body: | | | | Updates from the trail Peter Willis, Back at it again with another campaign update and we'd be hard pressed to find anyone else working harder than Lou to win this governor's race. In the last 11 days alone Lou has hit an unprecedented 13 different counties: Columbia, Montour, Butler, Westmoreland, Carbon, Schuylkill, Philadelphia, Montgomery, Northumberland, McKean, Fayette, Allegheny, and Washington. There are candidates who are spending millions of dollars on TV ads that are having no effect, because they simply can't replicate Lou's grassroots powerhouse and the relationship he already enjoys with voters. As a result, Lou continues to lead the crowded Republican primary field, according to a series of recent public polls. Momentum is on our side and we will continue to outwork everyone else in the field on our mission to restore common sense to the Commonwealth! LOU IN THE NEWS ABC-27 (Harrisburg): The Daily Item: " " Times-News: " " Breitbart: " " Cranberry Eagle: " " Bradford Era: Herald-Standard : " " Penn Live: " " HIGHLIGHTS FROM THE TRAIL One of the perks of having 10 grandkids is having a built-in “workforce” to “help” shovel snow! In an era where the Left hands out participation trophies to nearly everyone, Lou is glad his grandkids aren’t afraid to get their hands dirty and work on the weekends. There’s no secrets with Lou. He has a record. You don’t have to hope what he might do. Just look at what he's already done. He's road-tested and ready. There’s no better way to meet real Pennsylvanians than at a bar. Now this is a way to get petition signatures! Bar Tour Stop #2: Hog’s Hollow Saloon in Berwick! Columbia Co. is most definitely Barletta Country! A government that governs best is one that is closest to the people. Thanks to Sheriff Mike Slupe and Commissioners Osche and Geyer for joining Lou on a Main Street Tour in downtown Butler. Started the day meeting with small business owners in Butler and ended it collecting petition signatures and petting camels in Apollo in Westmoreland Co - just another day on the campaign trail! A family that campaigns together stays together. HELP LOU DEFEAT THE HARRISBURG MACHINE! The Harrisburg insiders are out in force to try to tear Lou down because he is the true conservative in this race and is leading in the polls. Help Lou fight back by chipping in $25, $50, $100 or more TODAY! CHECK OUT THE LATEST LOU BARLETTA MERCH! For Liberty, Team Barletta | | | | ==

name: Mike Crispi
subject: You're Invited! - Crispi for Congress

body:
Fellow Republican,

YOU are invited to a reception in support of Republican Congressional candidate **Mike ****Crispi with** **special guest Roger Stone** , as well as _another surprise guest_.

The reception will be held at the **Trump National Golf Club** in Colts Neck, NJ 07722 on **Thursday, March 24 **from 6:00 PM - 8:00 PM. Please **RSVP** to Kyra Schaefer at [kyra@1111consultinginc.com](mailto:kyra@1111consultinginc.com) or 305-699-8005.

**[Click Here to Donate Online](https://secure.anedot.com/22019403-ab3e-4d93-bfc9-edad9a951139/crispi2022)**

Mike Crispi has the energy and enthusiasm to _deliver on the America First agenda_ for the American people. Together, we can drain the swamp in Washington and take back our country.

Mike needs YOU to make that happen.

**See** **attached** for more information on the event, Mike’s historic run for Congress, and how to donate.

Thank you for your support, and please share, donate, and spread the word.

America needs YOU!

Paid for by Crispi for Congress 1385 Hwy 35, #215 Middletown, NJ 07748 [unsubscribe](https://gem.godaddy.com/opt_out?pact=92-166904898-75e98f9d-e239-4256-a281-18541550dad1-a98d1ce7ee3c9363493dc5c1967eef9d780c4f55)

name: Dinner with President Trump via Team Scalise
subject: Congratulations: Confirm Your Selection Immediately
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This calls for the celebration of a millenia
Peter, if you could sit across from President Trump at the dinner table while being served fine wine in the nicest restaurant in Texas, _what would you talk about?_
Until now, many could only dream of meeting their America First hero...
But that all changes today for you, Peter, because we're extending you an opportunity that any proud Republican would take in a heartbeat.
**Would you like to dine with the 45th President of the United States, Donald J. Trump?**
_Your Reservation with President Trump:_
[**PENDING**] _Trump Patriot:_
[**CONFIRMED**] ****[ENTER TO DINE WITH TRUMP NOW ->](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59862744:6UiHPQoTN:m:1:3317145305:21BBFFCC2E0BF7C5CC11029A82A13575:r)****
---
Few Republicans have been selected for the potential to win this prestigious honor. And only ONE will sit face-to-face with President Trump.
That could be you Peter, but we'll never know if you're the lucky winner unless you confirm your interest right now. The sole winner of this prestigious honor will be selected soon, and we would hate to see you miss your chance.
****[ENTER TO DINE WITH TRUMP NOW ->](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59862744:6UiHPQoTN:m:1:3317145305:21BBFFCC2E0BF7C5CC11029A82A13575:r)****
_**If dining with President Trump isn 't enough to convince you, maybe this will...**_
_We 'll pay for your flight to Dallas, Texas. We'll pay for your hotel. AND we'll cover every penny of your VIP dinner experience with Donald J. Trump._
Imagine the smile on your face when you dine with the man who always puts our country first.
_THAT is an experience no one could ever forget._
[**Make it a reality today and confirm your interest in dining with President Trump, before you lose your chance forever.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59862744:6UiHPQoTN:m:1:3317145305:21BBFFCC2E0BF7C5CC11029A82A13575:r)
In kind,
**Dinner with President Trump Notifications** | _Sent via Team Scalise_
Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. 320 First Street SE, Washington, DC 20003
---
NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution [use this form.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59862744:6UiHPQoTN:m:1:3317145305:21BBFFCC2E0BF7C5CC11029A82A13575:r) To enter without making a contribution, [click here.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59862745:6UiHPQoTN:m:1:3317145305:21BBFFCC2E0BF7C5CC11029A82A13575:r) Void where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Wednesday, March 16th, 2022 at 12:00 am Eastern Time and ends on Sunday, May 1st, 2022 at 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time. All entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Standard Time on Sunday, May 1st, 2022. One winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) tickets to the May 9th NRCC 2022 Majority Dinner; transportation for two (2), made at the discretion of the Team Scalise, within the continental United States to event location and from winners home location, with an approximate retail value of $1,500; one (1) one-night hotel stay at a Dallas, Texas hotel, with an approximate retail value of $500. The total approximate retail value of the prize is $2,500. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Restrictions and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply, they are listed in the [Official Rules.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/59862746:6UiHPQoTN:m:1:3317145305:21BBFFCC2E0BF7C5CC11029A82A13575:r) The Sponsor is Team Scalise, 320 First St SE, Washington, DC 20003.

Friend, Thank you all for the support you showed me while I was away in Richmond fighting for our conservative values in the General Assembly! Session was a lot of fun, but now it's time to hit the ground running and flip the Second Congressional District! **What better way to kickoff being back from the General Assembly than opening our new Kiggans for Congress Headquarters!?**
---
---
This Saturday feel free to stop by our new office located at 2712 Virginia Beach Blvd., Virginia Beach, VA 23452 between 10:30am and 12pm to see our new office, sign a petition to help me make the ballot or drop off any signatures you collected. If you have petitions, but haven't yet gotten them notarized, no worries.... We will have a notary at the event who can notarize the forms for you! Hope to see you Saturday! Jen

This is a critical month for our campaign, Peter. Two weekends ago, **Yadira won support from more than 60% of voters at the Adams County precinct caucus.** Here’s why that’s a big deal: _63% of voters in the 8th District live in Adams County._ It’s key to winning both the primary in June AND the general election. Put simply, if we lose Adams County, we lose CO-08. But Dr. Caraveo is putting her experience building relationships to work, unifying Democrats behind her. We say it all the time, but it’s worth repeating because the stakes are so high: **Control of the House of Representatives — and stopping Republicans from enacting an extreme, obstructionist agenda — could come down to this district.** Our team crunched the numbers, and we need to raise _$20,000 in grassroots contributions_ before the end of the month, because that’s what it’s going to take for us to reach every corner of CO-08 and talk to the voters we need to talk to. [**Can you make a donation today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43066602/335561332/573003782?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220317mmAdams_y4c08_allop_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjgxMDliZi1mZWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YXRMkvAnA4S_9y0QeTqYpb0mE7Ky9VXNaodqGaw8dFo=) | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43066603/335561333/573003782?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220317mmAdams_y4c08_allop_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjgxMDliZi1mZWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YXRMkvAnA4S_9y0QeTqYpb0mE7Ky9VXNaodqGaw8dFo=)

The biggest day of the month is still coming up: **March 31 marks the end of this year’s first quarter, and the last filing report before the primary — which means it’s an absolutely crucial fundraising deadline.** Quarterly filings are how folks in Colorado, and nationally, will gauge the strength of our campaign, but more than that, the money we raise this month determines whether we’ll able to reach voters with Dr. Caraveo’s message: lower healthcare costs, reproductive freedom, ensuring that every voter can cast their ballot without difficulty or intimidation, and creating more opportunities for working and middle class families.
In short, reaffirming our country’s commitment to the American dream that brought Dr. Caraveo’s parents to Colorado 40 years ago.
We’ve set a goal of $20,000 in online grassroots contributions before the deadline. It’s ambitious, but with committed supporters like you on our side, we know we can do it. [**Can you make a donation of any amount TODAY to help us chip away at our goal? Every donation goes to show the support behind our movement, and no gift is too small.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43066604/335561334/573003782?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220317mmAdams_y4c08_allop_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjgxMDliZi1mZWE1LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YXRMkvAnA4S_9y0QeTqYpb0mE7Ky9VXNaodqGaw8dFo=)

clean_body: | = This is a critical month for our campaign, Peter. Two weekends ago, Yadira won support from more than 60% of voters at the Adams County precinct caucus. Here’s why that’s a big deal: 63% of voters in the 8th District live in Adams County. It’s key to winning both the primary in June AND the general election. Put simply, if we lose Adams County, we lose CO-08. But Dr. Caraveo is putting her experience building relationships to work, unifying Democrats behind her. We say it all the time, but it’s worth repeating because the stakes are so high: Control of the House of Representatives — and stopping Republicans from enacting an extreme, obstructionist agenda — could come down to this district. Our team crunched the numbers, and we need to raise $20,000 in grassroots contributions before the end of the month, because that’s what it’s going to take for us to reach every corner of CO-08 and talk to the voters we need to talk to. = | = The biggest day of the month is still coming up: March 31 marks the end of this year’s first quarter, and the last filing report before the primary — which means it’s an absolutely crucial fundraising deadline. Quarterly filings are how folks in Colorado, and nationally, will gauge the strength of our campaign, but more than that, the money we raise this month determines whether we’ll able to reach voters with Dr. Caraveo’s message: lower healthcare costs, reproductive freedom, ensuring that every voter can cast their ballot without difficulty or intimidation, and creating more opportunities for working and middle class families. In short, reaffirming our country’s commitment to the American dream that brought Dr. Caraveo’s parents to Colorado 40 years ago. We’ve set a goal of $20,000 in online grassroots contributions before the deadline. It’s ambitious, but with committed supporters like you on our side, we know we can do it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you! Team Caraveo | Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. Her parents raised her and her siblings on her father’s construction worker’s salary in Adams County. In the legislature, Dr. Caraveo has delivered for working Coloradans by standing up to the biggest corporate bullies and entrenched special interests. Now, Dr. Caraveo is running for Congress to stand up for hard-working families she sees falling through the cracks. Dr. Caraveo would be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress and the only physician in Colorado’s congressional delegation. = | = | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS Caraveo for Congress PO Box 953 Eastlake, CO 80614 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: re: Your approval rating for Joe Biden
subject: We wanted to confirm your response
body:
Peter,
**We’re shocked : is it true you gave Joe Biden an A+ for his leadership in the White House?**

After he failed our country time and time again and left families to fend off against ridiculous inflation for himself, we know we would NEVER give him a passing grade.

_We wanted to give you ONE MORE CHANCE to grade Joe Biden or correct your response:_

**What grade would YOU give Joe Biden for his presidency?**

Peter, new details are continuing to emerge about Sinema's behavior in Washington and in Congress. The latest? **Kyrsten Sinema was the first member of Congress — _from either party_ — to pick a fight with the White House over their request that she wear a mask while meeting with President Joe Biden.** [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSpOQmfM7balUOhoFVBbRaAJ0plF96GShMPa1ccFfFrrb2X2F4475ePzDvXD160Irkq9cPPIWAwfvbfwEbW5YHkFZsuVzwBrBUS5-fKscHvFcYz7VdMwDlhTZCoIlZYg8GHxucBjIXRw6ynI3hrKwQk4ahkdaN-gnkv4js2kNA8UfxpRUfheA7bm6IPKVtq-471-2cr9_g6Dw_kp5ufZUD8pTVMBV0PWwzRaZMUDFoyEFaTXP2ibt8sKQW3iRmIzzssw_DcAedrXfG3RhNCz5iv-K8vmDb8-NCj8p1vdZ6o9XEhfBP8-rpgrfyJCDXBR8f0QOKCg4xJyjJ5l_lj8foh5ETw_1KvDla8eGmRsnzEBwOU8Ri2_yEtitP6rUu2bZd/3kf/sMap-_kVTOy0LrHk7vfjAQ/h1/7dz8XXXypUZBcjK4l7aH400WceBRt-iEmIV8fIEIWvU) What's more, Sinema also told President Biden not to come to Arizona to celebrate the passage of the American Rescue Plan last year — probably because she cares more about what Republicans think than Democrats. **We simply don't have the words to fully describe how dangerous, arrogant, and disrespectful Sinema's behavior is, Peter.** She thinks that she doesn't have to follow the same rules as everybody else when it comes to masks, which begs the question: Does she believe that any rules — especially those that apply to her being a representative Senator for Arizonans — apply to her? **[We have to put a stop to this behavior, and it starts with holding Kyrsten Sinema accountable right now. Let's make it clear that unless she stops sabotaging the White House and our Democratic majority — we'll make sure she loses her job. clean_body: New details are continuing to emerge about Sinema's behavior in Washington and in Congress. | | | Peter, new details are continuing to emerge about Sinema's behavior in Washington and in Congress. The latest? Kyrsten Sinema was the first member of Congress — from either party — to pick a fight with the White House over their request that she wear a mask while meeting with President Joe Biden. What's more, Sinema also told President Biden not to come to Arizona to celebrate the passage of the American Rescue Plan last year — probably because she cares more about what Republicans think than Democrats. We simply don't have the words to fully describe how dangerous, arrogant, and disrespectful Sinema's behavior is, Peter. She thinks that she doesn't have to follow the same rules as everybody else when it comes to masks, which begs the question: Does she believe that any rules — especially those that apply to her being a representative Senator for Arizonans — apply to her? — Primary Sinema | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC** | | Sent via . name: Maggie Hassan
subject: NH is now a toss-up
body:
Derek,
My team gave me some urgent news that I need to share with you.
Political experts just reported that New Hampshire is now a toss-up. Derek: if I lose, Democrats will lose the Senate majority.
Extreme GOP groups have already spent over $7.5 million attacking me, and polls are showing that this race will be tight. But Derek, this news is going to invite even more dark money into New Hampshire as Mitch McConnell tries to unseat me and flip the Senate red.
This is a critical moment in the campaign. New Hampshire could very well determine control of the Senate, so we need to act now to turn this around.
I know we can win this seat and keep the Senate blue – I've won tough races before – but it's going to take a grassroots effort.
So I have to ask: Can you split a $25 donation between my campaign and CommonGood today? The full force of the GOP's war chest is coming for New Hampshire, and I urgently need your support. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mha?refcode=20220317_CGVA_Hassan]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mha?refcode=20220317_CGVA_Hassan&amount=25]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mha?refcode=20220317_CGVA_Hassan&amount=35]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mha?refcode=20220317_CGVA_Hassan&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mha?refcode=20220317_CGVA_Hassan&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mha?refcode=20220317_CGVA_Hassan&amount=250]
Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mha?refcode=20220317_CGVA_Hassan]
Thank you in advance.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
(This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.)

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215

# **SIGN JUAN'S PETITION

To qualify for the ballot this fall, candidates must collect signatures from registered voters who live in their district. We want to ensure we have a solid cushion to qualify for Arizona's new 6th congressional district, but we need __your__ help.**

**_⏰ TODAY IS THE FINAL DAY TO COLLECT SIGNATURES ONLINE ⏰_**

**Show your support and add your name to Juan's petition ONLINE here: **[https://apps.azsos.gov/apps/election/eps/op/](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=d58976b8ea&e=659fba240e)

For those who live in the _new_ geography of the district, you will **not** be able to sign online but you can sign a paper petition! Paper petitions can be signed through the end of March, but online shuts down TODAY.

Reach out to us and we can coordinate a date/time to sign a paper petition.
CALL: 520-222-6874
EMAIL: [info@juanciscomani.com](mailto:info@juanciscomani.com?subject=petition&body=Hi!%20I'd%20like%20to%20sign%20Juan's%20petition.%20Can%20I%20meet%20you%20at%20the%20office%3F)

Please share with your family & friends who also live in the district. _**Unsure if you're in Juan's congressional district - AZ 06?**_ Use the address lookup site [HERE](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=2521393e8c&e=659fba240e).

**THANK YOU!!**

body:
Stand up for our second amendment right! | | | | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=24f4f13647&e=c2296cffff)
---
|
---
| | |
---
| **STAND WITH AMANDA TO DEFEND OUR SECOND AMENDMENT RIGHT**

---
|
| | |
Hi Friend!

Please join Amanda Makki for a "Bullets & BBQ" cookout and shooting competition hosted by Ted's Firearms this **Sunday, March 20th**! The event will take place from **4:30 to 7:30 PM.**
* All entrants over the age of 18 will be given a food ticket upon entrance for the price of $25.
* All ages are welcome. Children may attend for free.
* Ammo may be purchased on site for $100 per magazine.
* Shooters will compete for the tightest shot group. The participant with the tightest shot group will win a free lunch with 3 Pinellas mayors and Amanda Makki!

[Send your RSVP now!](mailto:Nancy@AmandaMakki.com?subject=Count%20Me%20In%20for%20Amanda%27s%20Meet%20and%20Greet!)

See you there!

Team Makki

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: women's healthcare is personal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43080051/335614372/744360480?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Ffinkenauer-endometriosis%3Fcode%3Djtk767-su-nd&code=jtk767-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWRiYzFlMi0yM2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gA2ivofRgBOSNNCAtw9IoBVvIdgqtCH8_699Pm_M190=&emci=a898f5d6-6aa5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=2adbc1e2-23a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=13784334)
Peter – it's Abby. March is Women's History Month, and I want to talk to you about a deeply personal issue that affects me and millions of other women. **I need just a minute to explain,[and I'm also counting on your signature for my petition demanding equitable healthcare for women.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43080052/335614373/744360480?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Ffinkenauer-endometriosis%3Fcode%3Djtk767-su-nd&code=jtk767-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWRiYzFlMi0yM2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gA2ivofRgBOSNNCAtw9IoBVvIdgqtCH8_699Pm_M190=&emci=a898f5d6-6aa5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=2adbc1e2-23a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=13784334)**
I've been living with endometriosis since I was a teen. I’m far from alone: in my research, I learned that endometriosis affects 1 in 10 women. Even though there is no known cure, it was one of the conditions which received the _least_ amount of federal funding.
That's why I shared my story and fought to double federal funding for endometriosis research. While I served in the U.S. House, I founded the House Endometriosis Caucus, worked across the aisle to raise awareness and doubled funding for endometriosis research.
At times, my experience with endometriosis has been challenging. However, I was fortunate to have been diagnosed at a young age, to have a mom who believed me when I said I was in pain and to have had good healthcare from my dad's union job. So many women aren't as lucky.
All of this is true for women's health at large: women deserve affordable and equitable healthcare. We deserve federal investment in our health. We deserve space to talk about our health. And we deserve to be believed. I'm committed to fighting for women's health and winning equitable care for all of us – and I promise to bring this fight to the U.S. Senate.
**But if there's one thing that I've learned through all this, it's that you'll never accomplish real change alone.[So please, if you're with me to fight for women's health, can you add your name to my petition to demand equitable healthcare for women? I need another 345 signatures before this petition closes at 11:59 p.m. tonight, so I'm really counting on you to sign on.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43080053/335614374/744360480?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Ffinkenauer-endometriosis%3Fcode%3Djtk767-su-nd&code=jtk767-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWRiYzFlMi0yM2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gA2ivofRgBOSNNCAtw9IoBVvIdgqtCH8_699Pm_M190=&emci=a898f5d6-6aa5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=2adbc1e2-23a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=13784334)**
| | [Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43080054/335614375/744360480?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Ffinkenauer-endometriosis%3Fcode%3Djtk767-su-nd&code=jtk767-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWRiYzFlMi0yM2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gA2ivofRgBOSNNCAtw9IoBVvIdgqtCH8_699Pm_M190=&emci=a898f5d6-6aa5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=2adbc1e2-23a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=13784334)
---
Thank you for standing with me.

– Abby
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43080055/335614376/496662621?code=jtk767-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWRiYzFlMi0yM2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gA2ivofRgBOSNNCAtw9IoBVvIdgqtCH8_699Pm_M190=&emci=a898f5d6-6aa5-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=2adbc1e2-23a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=13784334#!).

body:

| Friend,

Below is an image of Virginia’s Senate Republican Caucus. Notice someone missing?

---
| [ ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=d7894b5d6b&e=ae0ea222da)
---
| So far this year, our House of Delegates, with a Republican Majority, has passed legislation to defend the right to life, protect our gun rights, secure our elections, and ensure our religious freedom. Unfortunately, none of these bills ever made it to Governor Glenn Youngkin’s desk for him to sign!

Right now, we are outnumbered 21 Democrats to 18 Republicans with 1 non-caucusing member.

I have spent my career going toe-to-toe with dictators, standing up for rights and liberties around the world. Now, I’m asking for your support to put me in this picture so that I can stand up and fight for you in the Virginia Senate.
**I promise, you will never find me on the sidelines doing nothing; I’ll always be on the front lines fighting for our conservative values.**
---
| [ ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=a8b9c0e753&e=ae0ea222da)

| Thank you,

Tina Ramirez

Hi Friend,
The first chance to cast your ballot for Marc Thielman is just 2 MONTHS AWAY!

That’s right - the election season is flying by, and with this important **primary coming up on** _**May 17, 2022**_**,** we need your support and vote to ensure Oregon will have **leadership that stands for self-determination, individual liberty, and freedom.**

If you haven’t already, follow the link below to register to vote. You can also check your registration status or find out more information.

[https://sos.oregon.gov/voting-elections/Pages/default.aspx

clean_body: | | | | Hi Friend, The first chance to cast your ballot for Marc Thielman is just 2 MONTHS AWAY! That’s right - the election season is flying by, and with this important primary coming up on May 17, 2022, we need your support and vote to ensure Oregon will have leadership that stands for self-determination, individual liberty, and freedom. If you haven’t already, follow the link below to register to vote. You can also check your registration status or find out more information. As a reminder, the last day to register is APRIL 26TH! If you want leadership that stands for self-determination, individual liberty, and freedom, | | | | Marc Thielman for Governor | JOIN US | | | | ELEGRAM PAID FOR BY THE MARC FOR OREGON COMMITTEE Marc For Oregon P.O. Box 95, Bend, 97709

name: Ally For Utah
subject: Celebrate Team Ally Success - 28,000 Signatures Collected!
body:
#AllyForUtah Update | The latest news from the Ally Isom For U.S. Senate Campaign
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013flMO87-FsZA7eFccgqgluzkc8vECZkn9OP0tyrnjrAVjRFDC2Z8PrO9C28k3_Pqx5wvZzilzOIETk-ZooKe2KsRDVydNtlKuglWkZZDfQ8NiOvsy4FaD0U5SV1mxZP_fnAWzKJfrwRz_pPtPIOYmQ==&c=Q5d2BCjC-DVWhLh-DSepSuWOOcVJZqbKH3FN3Vv9aoIf4Z4wtCvO4A==&ch=LXW17557vZT1vgY9XPmjDz9RR-4L3ijTzDU626M4KU5XcFeYq6pNLw==)
---
| | Friend,
This week we celebrated a MAJOR milestone. Team Ally collected more than 29,000 signatures and submitted them to the State Elections Office at the State Capitol on Monday morning!
A HUGE THANK YOU to the army of volunteers across the State of Utah who collected signatures. This is a crucial task and we are so grateful for all of your help! But because there will be an error rate, we cannot let up. We must press hard until we know we have the full 28,000 valid signatures from registered Utah Republican voters required to be on the ballot. It is common for some signatures to be invalid.
Now the work continues!
---
| Rally for Ally
---
|
---
| If you haven't signed the petition yet, come find us this weekend! There are a couple of events where volunteers will be available to help collect your signature, or you can reach out to us on or [website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013flMO87-FsZA7eFccgqgluzkc8vECZkn9OP0tyrnjrAVjRFDC2Z8PoqUJPBEI13BBZgxFewi30cNtIg000F8lbSdgHgBsRulDlv4V5d8q-Aj_vDK89IzMkMJkAjUvYnLTvGTdnKUD3Cf35xLAqP6XxNkIiJFHJI-&c=Q5d2BCjC-DVWhLh-DSepSuWOOcVJZqbKH3FN3Vv9aoIf4Z4wtCvO4A==&ch=LXW17557vZT1vgY9XPmjDz9RR-4L3ijTzDU626M4KU5XcFeYq6pNLw==) to sign for Ally.

* Saturday, March 19th - [Meet the Candidate](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UV80nF325Xl6gYvWr5PqaUIQyUVLPhNIzu7IvWR9bycZzQDDhsWJjXBw1ggLsATScp693H0nK2NhahysuYX8x_daaWB7pWnmDYIF01vOoKq4gnVerqL9sll2eKYg9EQaZHg6ZCQSk25g_LxBudtyXdE7F6h8M-iNBZ_p_NCrXb8=&c=9CG2yoKaDIQZrlkNpdZ15n7WGTs7hwlXKTnl7iEOJ-cehdUDaTyW_A==&ch=PdWnU3kaUY40rgeacWh85fLSHLB4M1HxGNmQVAdsSAozKe44NYkHRQ==) \- Spanish Fork High School, [99 N ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013flMO87-FsZA7eFccgqgluzkc8vECZkn9OP0tyrnjrAVjRFDC2Z8PnyQTA86ALBHuAfghDsutkzmihgiof9ZVC5wN90A-mcbbfZypGUhDI9G9cmEEfV65YfuvXs4S9EyFsoSHi8-4mQSAQ9rP7LHrkc-Z_ykN0b8IZ5EabTzanulU4Ygjt_uDzoR3Mw2b9BYlIMzLPzvYjsXWP2EIgmiaipGqoEfzl6-XFcBnBvyi1XHanIRuf62xwW_iHMReh-p1mpRRx8o6oyv90ksK6Jj4V-BIk_jbQDgyN_izzSMLWDz0Az3iSqFvLgh1Ximjb_wxge5SZvEoyHddmcFR5Fh8NX1I9YI54d6sVi1-HoxFfrgaTUZiO3zByLyXGzoktabktmwRX_4G2I-RMMUptofJg==&c=Q5d2BCjC-DVWhLh-DSepSuWOOcVJZqbKH3FN3Vv9aoIf4Z4wtCvO4A==&ch=LXW17557vZT1vgY9XPmjDz9RR-4L3ijTzDU626M4KU5XcFeYq6pNLw==)[300 W, Spanish Fork](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013flMO87-FsZA7eFccgqgluzkc8vECZkn9OP0tyrnjrAVjRFDC2Z8PnyQTA86ALBHuAfghDsutkzmihgiof9ZVC5wN90A-mcbbfZypGUhDI9G9cmEEfV65YfuvXs4S9EyFsoSHi8-4mQSAQ9rP7LHrkc-Z_ykN0b8IZ5EabTzanulU4Ygjt_uDzoR3Mw2b9BYlIMzLPzvYjsXWP2EIgmiaipGqoEfzl6-XFcBnBvyi1XHanIRuf62xwW_iHMReh-p1mpRRx8o6oyv90ksK6Jj4V-BIk_jbQDgyN_izzSMLWDz0Az3iSqFvLgh1Ximjb_wxge5SZvEoyHddmcFR5Fh8NX1I9YI54d6sVi1-HoxFfrgaTUZiO3zByLyXGzoktabktmwRX_4G2I-RMMUptofJg==&c=Q5d2BCjC-DVWhLh-DSepSuWOOcVJZqbKH3FN3Vv9aoIf4Z4wtCvO4A==&ch=LXW17557vZT1vgY9XPmjDz9RR-4L3ijTzDU626M4KU5XcFeYq6pNLw==) 10 am - 12 pm
