---
| Ally Walks-A-Mile Throughout Utah
---
| While traveling across the state, Ally makes time to stop, listen, and talk with Utahns. On her way to events in St. George, she talked with local leaders, farmers, and business owners in Nephi, Fillmore, and Leeds. At The Cafe in Enterprise, she visited with Jakers and his mom, who shared the challenge of digging a new well, having to buy a truck sight unseen and wait for months, and then pay $6.30/gal for diesel delivering alfalfa to CA. Jakers wanted a photo with the candidate with his new red running shoe Ally For Utah sticker and smiled as he said, "I'm never taking this off!"
Follow Ally as she documents these adventures on[ social media.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013flMO87-FsZA7eFccgqgluzkc8vECZkn9OP0tyrnjrAVjRFDC2Z8PpYwBRRFIzXvxqVRK2dRwG-_gVP5x8A4_2Q1gjnncQ00X1EeLMEhEztRRkJDcd2h2WRW1I2GHVAeHkocoLocHFFulrtJML-jarRAd5nJGcDi&c=Q5d2BCjC-DVWhLh-DSepSuWOOcVJZqbKH3FN3Vv9aoIf4Z4wtCvO4A==&ch=LXW17557vZT1vgY9XPmjDz9RR-4L3ijTzDU626M4KU5XcFeYq6pNLw==)
---
| Connecting with Voters
---
|
---
| Ally connected with voters at the Salt Lake Republican Women's Club luncheon. They gave Ally a warm welcome, and shared their thoughts about the future of our nation and what concerns them most. Ally also shared her vision for a conservative principle-based, forward-looking GOP that is in touch with and responsive to everyday Utahns.
---
| Ally Returns to BYU
---
|
---
| Ally spoke to business students at the BYU Global Career Summit. The summit was an opportunity for students to listen to advice from experienced executives on how to succeed in diverse international business and government-related roles. Ally provided some practical travel advice, shared her global cultural experiences and ended by encouraging students to open their hearts to the things humans have in common across the globe. Ally believes the next generation of [Utah leaders](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013flMO87-FsZA7eFccgqgluzkc8vECZkn9OP0tyrnjrAVjRFDC2Z8PnyQTA86ALBHeD7G3O2mkxAWnsWjoO2hivVWF9NfdjZiXMnAA9wiVYyH-TxqoHtyfD6o8IU54nFmFNkKMFYV3ax326_JYFbthpcR3ygB6JSqocDLqEENFjDNU-mkb8fxLMK6VZ1ivJch&c=Q5d2BCjC-DVWhLh-DSepSuWOOcVJZqbKH3FN3Vv9aoIf4Z4wtCvO4A==&ch=LXW17557vZT1vgY9XPmjDz9RR-4L3ijTzDU626M4KU5XcFeYq6pNLw==) will take us to the next level. Ally ended her remarks with one of her favorite inspiring quotes from the early Utah legislator and vocal public advocate for the arts, clean milk and clean air-Alice Merrill Horne.

Here’s what AG Stein had to say about Valerie:
| | _“Having grown up in the same town and served together in the state Senate, I have known and respected Valerie Foushee for many years. Her entire life has been one of public service.**From the school board to the county commission to the legislature, Valerie has consistently delivered for working families.** I am confident that she will continue to deliver as a member of Congress. **Valerie is the most experienced and battle-tested leader in this race,** and I am proud to continue standing with her by endorsing her candidacy for Congress.”_ \- Josh Stein, Attorney General of North Carolina
---

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Are you a “Domestic Violent Extremist”?
body:
Basically, if you believe fraud occurred in the 2020 Election or you don't buy CNN's COVID narrative, you're now considered a potential domestic terrorist!
| | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/A763hXaoNdccYbpgG6oLL8926A/7yaryrCG9763qMpxOhSiC5JA) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Laura Loomer for Congress.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/A763hXaoNdccYbpgG6oLL8926A/7yaryrCG9763qMpxOhSiC5JA)**.
---

---
| [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/A763hXaoNdccYbpgG6oLL8926A/7yaryrCG9763qMpxOhSiC5JA)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/A763hXaoNdccYbpgG6oLL8926A/7yaryrCG9763qMpxOhSiC5JA)A recently released report by the Department of Homeland Security should scare all of us.

Most of the twenty-page report was inward looking to find ways to root out "violent extremists" within DHS . . . which is their "politically correct" way of firing every conservative who works for them.

But here's what should have all of us worried about trigger-happy government thugs kicking in our doors in the wee hours of the morning:
> _DHS, noted that domestic violent extremists "who are motivated by a range of ideologies and galvanized by recent political and societal events in the United States pose an elevated threat to the Homeland in 2021." The assessment pointed to newer "sociopolitical developments such as narratives of **fraud in the recent general election, the emboldening impact of the violent breach of the U.S. Capitol, conditions related to the COVID-19 pandemic, and conspiracy theories promoting violence "** that "will almost certainly spur some [domestic violent extremists] [sic] to try to engage in violence this year."_
**Basically, if you believe fraud occurred in the 2020 Election or you don 't buy CNN's COVID narrative, you're now considered a potential domestic terrorist!**

Welcome to the club!

As the only deplatformed candidate running for U.S. Congress who has been defamed and designated by Facebook as a "dangerous individual," I know what it's like to be viewed as a terrorist by your own federal government.

Along with having my First Amendment right stripped, the FBI has also stripped me of my Second Amendment right by banning me from being able to own or possess a firearm . . . simply because I asked former FBI Director James Comey a question.

Now, I know my next statment will be all over the leftist media as soon as I hit the send button, but what the hell, let's do this! **If my own government considers me a domestic terrorist because I refuse to remain silent about the 2020 Stolen Election, and I refuse to cower to the ongoing COVID-19 theater, then I 'll proudly wear that label. . . . [so help send a person who Joe Biden, Big Tech, the FBI, and the Democrat Party all consider a "domestic terrorist" to Congress by donating to my campaign today!](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/A763hXaoNdccYbpgG6oLL8926A/7yaryrCG9763qMpxOhSiC5JA)**
If you're one of the 70% of Republicans or 33% of all Americans who believe that the 2020 election was **illegitimate** , and not free and fair, then guess what? You're a "domestic terrorist" in the eyes of your own government . . . so, I suppose I'm in good company!

I've been banned and marginalized for my views for years, and one more false label doesn't bother me at all . . . **but I 'm more worried about YOU, my constituents, and every other American who is being falsely smeared by the Biden Regime as a "domestic terrorist".** I'm serious about that.

When our government starts dividing and classifying citizens by their political beliefs and labeling one side as "violent" potential terrorists, it's only a matter of time before they EXPAND their roundups and jailing of Americans without Due Process.

And yes, they are doing it now. Just take a look at all of the January 6th political prisoners who have been rotting away in jails without Due Process for over a year!

And where is Congress? Where are Republican politicians who are supposed to stand strong and protect us from the threat posed by our own government and its increasing overreach?

No, really, I'm asking. I haven't heard a peep out of them about any of this.

Patriot, help me stop this unconstitutional, un-American, nonsense. [Support my campaign today and send me to Washington where I will FIGHT for you.](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/A763hXaoNdccYbpgG6oLL8926A/7yaryrCG9763qMpxOhSiC5JA) It's that simple.

Both the Democrat and Republican Establishments already fear me, [so let's make their nightmares come true by having me sworn in as a member of the 118th U.S. Congress](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/A763hXaoNdccYbpgG6oLL8926A/7yaryrCG9763qMpxOhSiC5JA).

Thank you so much for all that you do!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

* He has practical and level-headed experience that we need in the Senate.
* He is committed to rising above partisanship to get the job done.
* Mark is the right person for the job because he understands that Kansans need a leader who will protect _the environment, support our schools and ensure that we have well-paying jobs._

Jerry Moran is not cut out for the job. At a time like this, our country and our state are facing real challenges that need real solutions. **Meet Mark:** Reverend Mark Holland is a fourth generation Kansan and a third generation United Methodist Pastor. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years.

| Peter,

Just over a year ago, President Biden signed the _American Rescue Plan_ into law. The $1.9 trillion investment in our country delivered critical funding when we needed it most.

I am proud to have supported this bill and **am thrilled by the impact it 's made here in Virginia.**

We committed **$722 million** to make universal broadband internet access a reality. Virginia families, businesses, schools, and hospitals continue to benefit from the historic investment. Because of my action in Congress, **we 're working to close the digital divide once and for all.**

Virginia schools also received **$2.1** billion to reconfigure classrooms, hire teachers, buy new tech, and more. **I am proud to have kept Virginia 's students and faculty safe.**

Reflecting on this progress, I remain energized to continue delivering for VA-07. Our race will be extremely close this fall, and [_**I 'm counting on your support to ensure we run a strong campaign.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/qFIms7F2grsrBbz4thFoYw7N3vja9wwPKZhzTJb-OVo=/-to8KL9g6R1P4Amu7SLAIu7vltaUdcq29fAz_TSkSg0=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220317-1-EM&amount=25)

[_**I know with your support we 'll win again this year, and I'm hoping you'll consider a contribution to our campaign today.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/qFIms7F2grsrBbz4thFoYw7N3vja9wwPKZhzTJb-OVo=/-to8KL9g6R1P4Amu7SLAIu7vltaUdcq29fAz_TSkSg0=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220317-1-EM&amount=25)

clean_body: | | Peter, Just over a year ago, President Biden signed the American Rescue Plan into law. The $1.9 trillion investment in our country delivered critical funding when we needed it most. I am proud to have supported this bill and am thrilled by the impact it 's made here in Virginia. We committed $722 million to make universal broadband internet access a reality. Virginia families, businesses, schools, and hospitals continue to benefit from the historic investment. Because of my action in Congress, we 're working to close the digital divide once and for all. Virginia schools also received $2.1 billion to reconfigure classrooms, hire teachers, buy new tech, and more. I am proud to have kept Virginia 's students and faculty safe. Reflecting on this progress, I remain energized to continue delivering for VA-07. Our race will be extremely close this fall, and | | | | | | | Thank you, Abigail * | | | Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress PO Box 3112 Fredericksburg VA 22402 United States | = | = | = ---|---|--- Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: Joe Biden is a COWARD!
body:
When men were losing their lives in Vietnam, Joe Biden received five draft deferments for “asthma.” Americans were standing
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsmuj2evarpo8n8ro5fnjdk6oc968unifdd5300o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2udrj8db6eko64plimlg79ddmekpr4t9gc9p78t3i6uom9pblmdh76d37cooebc37q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchncooreddm6up76phlc2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1ctim2pj3cpgm49fg)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbdik0ebun1o00didpdgj39guv8to89c036gd99g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clgmcor6c5h2bs) Fellow Patriot, When men were losing their lives in Vietnam, Joe Biden received five draft deferments for “asthma.”

Americans were standing and fighting. But Joe Biden said “it’s not my problem.”

Now, in Afghanistan and Ukraine he’s done the same thing.

_Nations collapsed. Innocent lives were lost. Dictators and terrorists brought reigns of terror across the world._

**And what did Joe Biden do? NOTHING.** _**[I know that America is better than cowards like Joe Biden.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5rus50evulf2ekglr3jaud3qpj6v2m25idm2j5g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clgmcor6c5h2bs)**_ [**MAKE AMERICA STRONG AGAIN**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhkk3d940qtet6b8hl7aocsl4vb8mp18fkakghio_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clgmcor6c5h2bs) When my family escaped Vietnam, I didn’t sit back and think that defending democracy is “not my problem.”

_**I graduated the Naval Academy, served****alongside SEAL teams, and embarked to the most dangerous corners of the world to keep our great country safe.**_

But just because my military service is over doesn’t mean my service to America is done.

**I’m running for Congress to put REAL leaders in the driver’s seat for our country instead of cowards like Joe Biden.**

[**If you’re ready for a NEW generation of leaders to rise from the ashes and FIGHT for America’s place in the world, join me today and MAKE AMERICA STRONG AGAIN.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1igv46f9sucd4f96fiudcgh3hjsnn0e01kbf5q8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clgmcor6c5h2bs) [**PITCH IN $10**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv0pipgavef3gt5ob2dffo0hfjn7ufqj1p1np808_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clgmcor6c5h2bs) [**PITCH IN $25**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1dkb2n1phgcs98uk7rfdd6uno4ha742b9v2a02o_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clgmcor6c5h2bs) [**PITCH IN $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zub26j7f6i5rkeuljno73u1i8uckl8gb1seg7ruo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clgmcor6c5h2bs) [**PITCH IN $100**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0uif7a7kqbja0cugpc1pl934b132ua6m79s4fn8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clgmcor6c5h2bs) [**PITCH IN $250**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8q4n41gf487gh3k8khjk526r79daiikgs152gko_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clgmcor6c5h2bs) [**PITCH IN OTHER AMOUNT**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1g8gs0alpdd4uco2ij3rn1987ib1fcallvl44fg_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clgmcor6c5h2bs) In Liberty, [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgl46vsbopgj2gbiaafungc38sojj5ob5bf9lpa8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clgmcor6c5h2bs) CAPT Hung Cao, USN (Ret) Former Navy Special Operations Candidate, U.S. House (VA-10) [**MAKE AMERICA STRONG AGAIN**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8ssq1o97o0flbnnnum7h991dhn6mr6lv6unmnso_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clgmcor6c5h2bs) Paid for by Hung Cao for Congress Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

body:

There are more than 250,000 Silver Staters of Irish descent...and we’re ALL a little bit Irish today!

body:

_** **_
Peter,

Hope this finds you well. I’m sitting here at the airport writing this before we board our plane back to Oregon in a couple of hours. Over the last couple of days, **we’ve been in DC for meetings with the National Republican Congressional Committee.** We were recently inducted into their “ _**Young Guns**_ ” program, as you may have heard; they asked us here to introduce us to members of Congress and others who might be able to help our team in Campaign 2022.

**We collected a lot of business cards and set up even more meetings for our next trip out east in a couple of months**. Everyone we spoke to asked us about our fundraising and I’m happy to report that we were able to let them know _**we’re doing OK**_.

Having said that - **we’re still on the hunt to find the 1,594 donors we need by March 31st in order to beat out our fundraising efforts from Q4 of 2021**. Should be easy right? Well, it hasn’t been and that is why we’re coming to you today.

**[Are you able to chip in a couple bucks to help us meet our goal that is just TWO WEEKS from today?](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=e36f1a53ca214f1095167b9590002cb9&_e=QVTvmNFaVdWvzRNLb7lwdOYGzkR28uTZXC77EnpzS9BTT1urEOIVDHQUMR108WKceiXADdzrGIXwULs7ekwwN9k8taxjDVTH0ZAvEbcGbGuOd7oF1SCG7yt5arYFCJ4B9ugXjiY5ODml8zU1jIN6SDiwydRsf801zQbzbZY6ucmEvdNWaZ2vndifP8VqPAkIWiiXN2UbZPzLHsm-THgvvGuDdGCrfMeEpm9CwUMVZFZmYDs6sBQZY55inCvBsgbxFjwkBHdn4N2IkDV8phDhRVEq7C0qE2gqoOg0niW0Et1ybmLYxJPQHHcyH9sRFiHcf6nuuOgvZdeMk3MuZbPvm4co-73gF2PqPXyDbOoVEOow9iCfXigWT2jmD0iu9TCaaa7NNTtLcwlnd3aYDC1kTega94_OmZrQa4T1Yv5LbeI5TDRW2OZQ9W3lDjgucgRWOvzlNu1GWygQhqZ3vDjWVw%3D%3D)** [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=e36f1a53ca214f1095167b9590002cb9&_e=QVTvmNFaVdWvzRNLb7lwdOYGzkR28uTZXC77EnpzS9BTT1urEOIVDHQUMR108WKceiXADdzrGIXwULs7ekwwN9k8taxjDVTH0ZAvEbcGbGuOd7oF1SCG7yt5arYFCJ4B9ugXjiY5ODml8zU1jIN6SDiwydRsf801zQbzbZY6ucmEvdNWaZ2vndifP8VqPAkIWiiXN2UbZPzLHsm-THgvvGuDdGCrfMeEpm9CwUMVZFZmYDs6sBQZY55inCvBsgbx_9yR6mLr3BkxMmXnRS8C2BtSC46cXss4VBnz37SU24S2rO-zUCfaxSS7mBSOeqE8atY-HFMkcf8gOeSHhRxY5Hrx01kgTVfr4SfTqZAso3q18zevA8OqBcUnGID_fRtBsuP30QrVYZl0KQUlQPmIe_Zg5ZfGAdkzki2Z9LFJAXM7FwAS4G5kKp4POzJ1ptmoRx920CqFmWBktVXLk1nK0w%3D%3D)
**Help Us Beat Our Q4 Numbers** [** MAKE A GIFT OF $5 ➞ **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=e36f1a53ca214f1095167b9590002cb9&_e=QVTvmNFaVdWvzRNLb7lwdOYGzkR28uTZXC77EnpzS9BTT1urEOIVDHQUMR108WKceiXADdzrGIXwULs7ekwwN9k8taxjDVTH0ZAvEbcGbGuOd7oF1SCG7yt5arYFCJ4B9ugXjiY5ODml8zU1jIN6SDiwydRsf801zQbzbZY6ucmEvdNWaZ2vndifP8VqPAkIWiiXN2UbZPzLHsm-THgvvGuDdGCrfMeEpm9CwUMVZFaszZACUkSSpnRQAQZsmFlnGsHAi9HUUm5UtnxHZ6uP5QOpc1y67n0wLwOXbQcLHUs47UOBt0euK02iyRfOVmxZNJwL-mxOnP_vCLoE7UrMARCQ6NZKwHmxfvCowxtJE-8BMCT3Thtm3x6SzQceESXX3XTHYGUHC0Q6k7pJOZqVuH-cqw0LhE1ksg9tBxvHJaCywRLWIV4mducw6GSBIAUaXnilO4de6ceitfTtcMBnTYalP-H2gNeKEEWHFGcOzMo%3D)
You’ve got to spend money to make money, and we’ve been spending a lot of money this quarter. We’ve been identifying new voters and supporters throughout the country – but there is more we could be doing.

Right now, we’re not able to do everything we can in preparation for the fall’s general election because **our budget just doesn’t allow it**.

If we lose this race in November, it’s not going to be because our opponent is a great campaigner, it will be because we weren’t able to spend enough to get my name ID where it needs to be.

We’re closing out the end of the quarter **[TWO weeks from today and we need to make it count](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=e36f1a53ca214f1095167b9590002cb9&_e=QVTvmNFaVdWvzRNLb7lwdOYGzkR28uTZXC77EnpzS9BTT1urEOIVDHQUMR108WKceiXADdzrGIXwULs7ekwwN9k8taxjDVTH0ZAvEbcGbGuOd7oF1SCG7yt5arYFCJ4B9ugXjiY5ODml8zU1jIN6SDiwydRsf801zQbzbZY6ucmEvdNWaZ2vndifP8VqPAkIWiiXN2UbZPzLHsm-THgvvGuDdGCrfMeEpm9CwUMVZFZmYDs6sBQZY55inCvBsgbxSIUgDw4PHVYvoh3xQgmb_t3jxPFNiYJRB1LCcrlWWqX7ZD7XWkkJhfE-aL3f1mxlDhxUdcF3YmqLhIekPTtSxsKsAaQGNyaG653FK6lJwc4frCQgA5NBUZ-Tyw6nufb9NJ_I_-TAFvm76vDZsXI2FoaW-3h40L57OlgW-rWpMJr809VLJUwQVmx7wMLuQbERStdAYj1QEbi96lVvVDWZ1w%3D%3D)**.

clean_body: I’m sitting here at the airport writing this before we board our plane back to Oregon in a couple of hours We quite literally ran toward a terrorist armed with cans of gasoline on a suicide mission. | Peter, Hope this finds you well. I’m sitting here at the airport writing this before we board our plane back to Oregon in a couple of hours. Over the last couple of days, we’ve been in DC for meetings with the National Republican Congressional Committee. We were recently inducted into their “ Young Guns ” program, as you may have heard; they asked us here to introduce us to members of Congress and others who might be able to help our team in Campaign 2022. We collected a lot of business cards and set up even more meetings for our next trip out east in a couple of months. Everyone we spoke to asked us about our fundraising and I’m happy to report that we were able to let them know we’re doing OK. Having said that - we’re still on the hunt to find the 1,594 donors we need by March 31st in order to beat out our fundraising efforts from Q4 of 2021. Should be easy right? Well, it hasn’t been and that is why we’re coming to you today. Help Us Beat Our Q4 Numbers You’ve got to spend money to make money, and we’ve been spending a lot of money this quarter. We’ve been identifying new voters and supporters throughout the country – but there is more we could be doing. Right now, we’re not able to do everything we can in preparation for the fall’s general election because our budget just doesn’t allow it. If we lose this race in November, it’s not going to be because our opponent is a great campaigner, it will be because we weren’t able to spend enough to get my name ID where it needs to be. We’re closing out the end of the quarter . Best, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress Help Us Beat Our Q4 Numbers | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- | Paid For By Alek For Oregon Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

|
---
| Dear Friends,

As the **devastating conflict in Ukraine** grows, it is clear that we MUST elect leaders who will stay true to their values. When ANY state elects a senator, **voters are making a direct impact on global affairs.**

Utah needs a leader who will work collaboratively with other legislators to create **solutions that reflect our values** and **solutions that WORK!**

**Becky Edwards has the background and experience** to take tough decisions head-on, and WE NEED YOUR HELP to bring more**** diplomatic**** solutions to the global stage.

**Will you donate $12, $34, or $56 today to support collaboration in Washington? **

clean_body: | | | | | | | Dear Friends, As the devastating conflict in Ukraine grows, it is clear that we MUST elect leaders who will stay true to their values. When ANY state elects a senator, voters are making a direct impact on global affairs. Utah needs a leader who will work collaboratively with other legislators to create solutions that reflect our values and solutions that WORK! Becky Edwards has the background and experience to take tough decisions head-on, and WE NEED YOUR HELP to bring more** diplomatic solutions to the global stage. Will you donate $12, $34, or $56 today to support collaboration in Washington? | "DONATE" | Your ongoing support helps us bring productive, proactive, and inclusive solutions back to Washington. Thank you, as always, for everything you do. – Team Becky | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Becky Edwards for U.S. Senate** P.O. Fellow American,

Today, I am asking for just $2. This is why:

1. Our race in Georgia WILL DETERMINE who controls the Senate majority.
2. The race is a DEAD HEAT. Three recent polls show us leading 47%-44%, 48%-46%, and 49%-48%.
3. Our opponent knows the race is tight, so he is already spending over $3 million on tv ads 8 months before the election!

There's so much at stake, and Democrats in Washington know it too. That's why Democrats are sending millions to our opponent.

He's amassed over $23 million from Democrat megadonors and Hollywood stars - the most in the country.

body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTA4MDQ5MTYxODk5NDgxMzA3JmM9ZzlwNCZlPTAmYj05NDQ3Nzg0MzMmZD1tMms2dTF3.y2SCGysEfst2k9Hnd78aeKnHUTMwQLgpaUsXiuV52f4)
| | | | [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTA4MDQ5MTYxODk5NDgxMzA3JmM9ZzlwNCZlPTAmYj05NDQ3Nzg0MzYmZD13NmwyYTdt.6mpV3zBCEwqt5CaVKio1zAzfFD_THqFWg-a0m464EOg)
---
| | | Friend, This November, I want to bring New Hampshire to Washington - not the other way around. Because D.C. is a place that could use our voices and our New Hampshire values more than ever! While we believe in freedom and independence, the D.C. Swamp’s Maggie Hassan can’t say the same. _She’s so against having energy independence that she won’t even use her voice to stop our funding of Putin’s War Machine through relyi ng on Russian blood oil!_ Financing Vladimir Putin is **NOT** what putting our state and country first looks like - and it’s yet another reminder why we need to send Hassan packing this year. body:

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43081469/335620665/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTFmYWQwZC0yOWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zGd_DMA8fUk7d6mfjSmid_oN-PshERQG3yKrNgDbBS0=)

As we remember Selma and the passage of the Voting Rights Act of 1965 – we don't just look back, but we look _forward_ to finally passing the **Freedom to Vote: John R. Lewis Act** in the Senate. Conor has already acted to pass this crucial protection, _twice_ , in the House.

**[This is the reason why Conor's voice is so important in the Senate, but he needs this grassroots movement behind him to power him through to victory. Will you donate what you can today to protect our fundamental rights to vote?>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43081470/335620666/-993140480?refcode=em22_220317_mm2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTFmYWQwZC0yOWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zGd_DMA8fUk7d6mfjSmid_oN-PshERQG3yKrNgDbBS0=)** [PROTECT OUR RIGHTS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43081471/335620667/-993140480?refcode=em22_220317_mm2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTFmYWQwZC0yOWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zGd_DMA8fUk7d6mfjSmid_oN-PshERQG3yKrNgDbBS0=) We'll let you read Conor's words for yourself in a moment, but first, thank you for standing with us.

– Team Lamb [MAKE A MONTHLY DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43081472/335620668/-993140480?refcode=em22_220317_mm2&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTFmYWQwZC0yOWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zGd_DMA8fUk7d6mfjSmid_oN-PshERQG3yKrNgDbBS0=) [DONATE ONCE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43081473/335620669/-993140480?refcode=em22_220317_mm2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTFmYWQwZC0yOWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zGd_DMA8fUk7d6mfjSmid_oN-PshERQG3yKrNgDbBS0=) \----------Forwarded message----------
From: **Conor Lamb**
Date: March 15, 2022 at 10:25 a.m. ET
Subject: More than just a vote
Today marks an important anniversary in the history of the fight for voting rights, friend.

57 years ago, on March 15, 1965, President Johnson addressed the joint session of Congress and called for passage of the **Voting Rights Act.**

This was _8 days_ after the unprovoked assault on voting rights activists on the **Edmund Pettus Bridge in Selma, Alabama — now known as Bloody Sunday.**

Months later, the Voting Rights Act was finally signed into law on August 6, 1965.

This bill has become _fundamental_ in preventing racial discrimination in voting, including the banning of literacy tests and ensuring there are no barriers to exercising our rights to vote.

Since then, Congress has expanded the act five times to increase its protections. But now, as we see Republicans trying to pass restrictive and discriminatory voting laws in state legislatures across the country, including right here in Pennsylvania, we must act to preserve and expand its protections again.

**[This is why I voted multiple times to pass voting rights legislation in the House, and I promise to continue to vote in the interest of _all_ our voters in the Senate. But I can't do this alone, so I need your help now, will you donate? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43081474/335620670/-993140480?refcode=em22_220317_mm2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTFmYWQwZC0yOWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zGd_DMA8fUk7d6mfjSmid_oN-PshERQG3yKrNgDbBS0=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43081475/335620671/-993140480?refcode=em22_220317_mm2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTFmYWQwZC0yOWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zGd_DMA8fUk7d6mfjSmid_oN-PshERQG3yKrNgDbBS0=) **I know that we need action now.** I helped pass voting rights legislation in the House and we've repeatedly faced a roadblocked Senate who let the filibuster stand in the way of people's rights. This gridlock _cannot_ continue.

The best way to protect the vote is by winning this Senate seat in Pennsylvania, but I need your help to get it done.

**[Our voting rights are sacred. Can you quickly pitch in $5 to help us win and protect voting rights for all Americans?>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43081476/335620672/-993140480?refcode=em22_220317_mm2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTFmYWQwZC0yOWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zGd_DMA8fUk7d6mfjSmid_oN-PshERQG3yKrNgDbBS0=)** [PROTECT OUR RIGHTS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43081477/335620673/-993140480?refcode=em22_220317_mm2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTFmYWQwZC0yOWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zGd_DMA8fUk7d6mfjSmid_oN-PshERQG3yKrNgDbBS0=) Thank you,

Conor Lamb [MAKE A MONTHLY DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43081478/335620674/-993140480?refcode=em22_220317_mm2&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTFmYWQwZC0yOWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zGd_DMA8fUk7d6mfjSmid_oN-PshERQG3yKrNgDbBS0=) [DONATE ONCE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43081479/335620675/-993140480?refcode=em22_220317_mm2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTFmYWQwZC0yOWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zGd_DMA8fUk7d6mfjSmid_oN-PshERQG3yKrNgDbBS0=)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Ilhan's right-wing opponents
body:
They’re smearing Ilhan every chance they get.
#
Peter,
**Ilhan Omar’s extreme right-wing challengers are saying dangerous things about her.** Ilhan has dealt with smear campaigns from Fox News, the GOP, and even the Democratic establishment. Now, with election season upon us, the smears keep coming and Ilhan needs our help.
[Can you rush a split contribution to Ilhan’s campaign and Justice Democrats right now? $3 from you today would help us fend off these attacks and re-elect the Squad.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97735?refcode=em20220317-22430&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=22430%2E1203867%2E4vZjl_)
**[Rush a donation »](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97735?refcode=em20220317-22430&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=22430%2E1203867%2E4vZjl_)**
One opponent had the audacity to claim that Ilhan "wants to burn down OUR city & OUR country."
Another opponent touts praise from Steve Bannon in his campaign launch video. This GOP opponent calls Ilhan a "globalist," a dangerous word thrown around by right-wing extremists to describe a hidden cabal. He says she’s a "puppet" while pictures of Bill Gates, Hillary Clinton, Mark Zuckerberg, and the Chinese president flash across the screen.
The GOP and Fox News have gotten very comfortable using dangerous rhetoric against Ilhan Omar. We have to be there with her to fight back.
[Will you rush a donation to Ilhan and Justice Democrats so we can fight back against these dangerous smears? We need to ensure that we re-elect the Squad in 2022.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97735?refcode=em20220317-22430&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=22430%2E1203867%2E4vZjl_)
As a movement, we have the power to protect and expand the Squad together.
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=22&akid=22430%2E1203867%2E4vZjl_) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=23&akid=22430%2E1203867%2E4vZjl_) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220317-22430-footer&t=24&refcode2=22430_1203867_4vZjl_&akid=22430%2E1203867%2E4vZjl_)**

name: Michelle Lujan Grisham
subject: Important moment for our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
The GOP is pushing harder than ever to flip New Mexico red
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43072275/335577571/-1540418300?refcode=jtk1175-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDg1ZTNkMi0wN2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gvg-aABfkgN4cpoXgpWHL5BxxkuMWstMte94jQKzxTM=)
---
Peter – I know that you've heard from my team a lot lately, but that's because this is such an important moment for our grassroots campaign.
This is where we're at: I wasn't able to fundraise from December all the way up until _last week_ – which means I started my reelection year without raising a single dollar for _months_.
**The GOP is pushing harder than ever to flip New Mexico red, and I need your help to reach my upcoming fundraising goal: ****[Will you please rush $5 before tonight at midnight? I can't win reelection without you by my side.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43072277/335577573/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1175-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNDg1ZTNkMi0wN2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gvg-aABfkgN4cpoXgpWHL5BxxkuMWstMte94jQKzxTM=)**
As Republicans across the country attempt to suppress voting rights and ban abortion, Governors are our first line of defense against far-right extremism.
I'm working toward a New Mexico that is more equitable, more just, and more free – but change does not come easy, nor does it happen on its own. This people-powered movement can only succeed if everyone chips in. **So will you join me in this fight, Peter?**
**[I lost out on three months of fundraising, and I'm counting on you to help me catch up and keep New Mexico blue. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43081592/335621383/616904999?refcode=EM_BS_BSP_220317_FR_DOYLEINTRO_A0_na_U1_X2_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTgxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGY0MTNiZi0yYWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G5PSCwD9CT71QxA0IwEnKX8UJRB3tK6EDpl7Xyj7fiw=) [Doyle Canning just launched her grassroots campaign for Oregon’s 4th Congressional District! ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43081594/335621384/616904999?refcode=EM_BS_BSP_220317_FR_DOYLEINTRO_A0_na_U1_X2_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTgxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGY0MTNiZi0yYWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G5PSCwD9CT71QxA0IwEnKX8UJRB3tK6EDpl7Xyj7fiw=) Doyle is an attorney and community organizer — a proven progressive leader and climate champion — with a strong record of fighting for working people and our planet.

When her 18 term Congressman announced his retirement, Doyle knew it was a once in a generation opportunity to choose new leadership. Now, she is running to represent Oregon’s newly redrawn 4th District in Congress. Doyle knows we need to stop the fossil fuel handouts, ensure everyone has the healthcare we need, and get corporate money out of our elections.

Doyle Canning is the progressive leader we need in Washington. [ Can you help support Doyle Canning’s positive progressive vision by becoming a founding donor today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43081607/335621394/616904999?refcode=EM_BS_BSP_220317_FR_DOYLEINTRO_A0_na_U1_X2_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTgxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGY0MTNiZi0yYWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G5PSCwD9CT71QxA0IwEnKX8UJRB3tK6EDpl7Xyj7fiw=) | | | [BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR - CHIP IN $5 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43081610/335621402/1169961532?refcode=EM_BS_BSP_220317_FR_DOYLEINTRO_A0_na_U1_X2_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTgxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGY0MTNiZi0yYWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G5PSCwD9CT71QxA0IwEnKX8UJRB3tK6EDpl7Xyj7fiw=)

| | [BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR - CHIP IN $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43081613/335621406/1169961532?refcode=EM_BS_BSP_220317_FR_DOYLEINTRO_A0_na_U1_X2_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTgxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGY0MTNiZi0yYWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G5PSCwD9CT71QxA0IwEnKX8UJRB3tK6EDpl7Xyj7fiw=)

For over twenty years, Doyle’s been building people-powered movements. From working to implement bold climate solutions to fighting for racial justice, Doyle Canning knows that all our struggles are intertwined.

[Doyle will be the advocate we need in Washington D.C.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43081615/335621409/616904999?refcode=EM_BS_BSP_220317_FR_DOYLEINTRO_A0_na_U1_X2_M1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTgxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGY0MTNiZi0yYWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G5PSCwD9CT71QxA0IwEnKX8UJRB3tK6EDpl7Xyj7fiw=) Doyle will stand up to Wall Street, billionaires, polluters, and the politicians they purchase. And she will never take money from corporations or fossil fuel companies.

However, if you'd like to unsubscribe, click | | = = Doyle is an attorney and community organizer — a proven progressive leader and climate champion — with a strong record of fighting for working people and our planet. When her 18 term Congressman announced his retirement, Doyle knew it was a once in a generation opportunity to choose new leadership. Now, she is running to represent Oregon’s newly redrawn 4th District in Congress. Doyle knows we need to stop the fossil fuel handouts, ensure everyone has the healthcare we need, and get corporate money out of our elections. Doyle Canning is the progressive leader we need in Washington. = | | | = | | = For over twenty years, Doyle’s been building people-powered movements. From working to implement bold climate solutions to fighting for racial justice, Doyle Canning knows that all our struggles are intertwined. = Doyle will stand up to Wall Street, billionaires, polluters, and the politicians they purchase. name: Patrick Clark,  Keystone Progress
subject: The people of Ukraine deserve better.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

Today, President Biden correctly called Putin a "war criminal" in response to his continued bloody siege on Ukrainian citizens.

After Ukrainian President Zelenskyy spoke to U.S. leaders, Biden immediately moved to approve $800M in new military aid to support his nation.

We want to send our thanks to all of the legislators that approved this money for the people of Ukraine and to preserve democracy around the world.

But we want to also say to all of those congresspeople who voted against preserving democracy internationally, WE SEE YOU. We see you standing with the deranged fascist Putin and not for what is right. And WE WON'T FORGET. (We're looking at you Sen. Pat Toomey.)

How these leaders can look at the same war images that we see — knowing how dangerous Putin can also be to other democracies in Europe — and still not help those suffering, is beyond comprehension.

Let's make life more difficult for characters like Sen. Toomey, Rep. Fred Keller, Rep. Mike Kelly, and Rep. Scott Perry — politicians who say they support democracy but vote against preserving it — by donating to support Keystone Progress, so that we can mobilize and empower voters to cast ballots for leaders who actually care.

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=031722&amount=20]

The time for complacency is long over. Stand with us, and up for democracy.

Pat Clark
Keystone Progress

https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/ [https://www.facebook.com/KPEdFund/]

Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.

Keystone Progress
354 S Atlantic Ave
Pittsburgh, PA 15224

subject: We Have Nine Days to Get on The Ballot - Can You Help?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DEJA FOR PA _
body:
Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. | | | | [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=a54c8fba35&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
|
---
| The Supreme Court has finally ruled on our new fair district map in the 182nd.

But we only have nine days to get enough petition signatures to get my name on the ballot. And we need your help!

**Please reach out to us at[info@dejaforpa.com](mailto:info@dejaforpa.com) to help collect signatures - Help us make history! **

[Can you chip in today for historic representation in Harrisburg?](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=a67bced1b5&e=3f8e2ea1e3)

|
---

Check out our [Swag Shop](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=9463e1d5ca&e=3f8e2ea1e3) for stickers, buttons, T-shirts, and masks to show your support of our historic campaign!

House that Represents You?](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=e59e7671f9&e=3f8e2ea1e3)

| | _Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives in the 182nd District. With more than a decade of experience in the nonprofit and public health field, Deja is committed to building on progressive values, economic recovery, and historic LGBTQ representation in Harrisburg. In May of 2022, we have an opportunity to continue to grow representation in our legislative body in Harrisburg that closely reflects the needs, interests, and diversity of the 182nd District. Join us as we get the work done. [www.dejaforpa.com](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=a936413a24&e=3f8e2ea1e3)_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian?=
subject: URGENT
body:
|
---
| | I'm so mad I can barely type...

Because as you probably saw (but maybe did not) - the state kidnapped a 10-month old baby last week.

For no rightful reason.

Without justification.

They took a little baby from a young couple simply because the mom "canceled a doctor's appointment."

At least, that's what they say the reason is.

Which, even if that’s true - is no reason at all. How many times have you canceled a doctor's appointment? And when you did (because we all have) did they kidnap your child afterward because of it

So, what's the "real" reason they took this baby?

I'm just spitballing here but I'm convinced it's a politically motivated kidnapping.

Here's why: the family they took the kid from are close friends with Ammon Bundy, who's running for Governor of Idaho.

And this family has been VERY critical of our current Governor, Brad Chicken Lockdown Little.

To be clear - I'm _NOT_ saying Brad Little did this or ordered it, or had anything to do with it.

But here's what I AM saying... do you think it's a “coincidence” that a family who's been actively and vocally critical of our Governor, had their only child kidnapped by the state?

I don’t.

Something is fishy here and the details don't add up.

So, what can "we" do about it?

Well, for now, we can pray, we can show up, speak out, share the story, and if you can swing it, help this young couple financially.

[All the details of what happened are here](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=d0ece21cf5&e=dea908e0fe).

You can donate to this young couple (who will be financially destroyed by this)[ here](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=90b9759cc7&e=dea908e0fe).

It's disgusting that this happened. But... this happens ALL THE TIME anyhow. We only heard about this because of who the family is.

This is what happens when wicked men run rampant.

God help us.

Brian

**P.S.** This feels weird to include after all that but I’m doing it anyway. We’re going door-knocking in Nampa District 13 THIS SATURDAY. If you want to help out, please reply to this and let me know so I can give you the details. We’ll meet at 9:30 AM in Nampa, and be done by 12:30 PM at the latest. I know if you haven’t done it before it sounds intimidating. But after you have your first conversation at the door you’ll realize how easy it is.
Oh look, here's the guy I'm running against:

I got in this fight because the man who’s currently the Senator in my district (that's him above) votes like a Democrat and doesn’t accurately represent the people of Nampa.So I‘m running to replace him... and knocking on doors and having conversations is the path to victory.

**P.P.S.** Tuesday night (March 22nd) at 7 PM we’re having a “Pints, Pipes, and Patriots” night at the V-Cut Lounge in Downtown Nampa. It’ll be informal, fun, and a great way to meet other patriots ([details on that are here](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=7e5d930270&e=dea908e0fe)).

---
| | _Copyright © 2022 Brian Lenney for Idaho, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Brian Lenney for IdahoPO Box 3753Nampa, ID 83653-3753
[Add us to your address book](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/vcard?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=57cc6bf1b7)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=57cc6bf1b7&e=dea908e0fe&c=82a3403321) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=57cc6bf1b7&e=dea908e0fe&c=82a3403321).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&afl=1)
---

name: Tom Fitton
subject: A Judicial Watch Win for the Voters of North Carolina!
body:
Judicial Watch just announced a major victory for cleaner elections! We settled our federal lawsuit against North Carolina after the state removed over 430,000 ineligible names from its voter rolls!

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Judicial Watch just announced a major victory for cleaner elections! We settled our federal lawsuit against North Carolina after the state removed _over 430,000 ineligible names from its_ _voter rolls_!
**This is a win for the voters in both North Carolina and across the nation, because clean voter rolls help ensure cleaner elections.**
The U.S. Election Assistance Commission released data in June 2019 showing that voter registration rates in a significant proportion of North Carolina's counties were close to, at or above 100% of their age-eligible citizenry - _statistics considered by the courts to be a strong indication that a jurisdiction is not taking the steps required by law to remove ineligible registrants_.
On _December 11, 2019_ , Judicial Watch sent notice-of-violation letters to the state and two of its counties, warning them that lawsuits would be filed if timely action were not taken to clean up the voter rolls.
We filed our lawsuit in _April 2020_ , and we argued that **North Carolina** , **Mecklenburg County** (Charlotte) and **Guilford County** (Greensboro) failed to make reasonable efforts to remove ineligible voters as required by the federal National Voter Registration Act (NVRA).
On _August 16, 2021_ , the federal government released data that showed North Carolina removed hundreds of thousands of names from voter rolls - after we sued!
In a settlement, Judicial Watch told the court;
**_" The total number of inactive registrations reported by North Carolina dropped from about 1.2 million in 2019, to about 765,000 in 2021 (a 36% drop)...Data for Mecklenburg County and Guilford County also showed improvement...In light of Defendants' substantial increases in removals of ineligible voters since this suit commenced, Plaintiff has determined in good faith that this legal action should not be pursued."_**
Because of our federal lawsuit, **North Carolina** removed hundreds of thousands of ineligible voters (people who have died or moved away).
**As I said ...this is a win for the voters of North Carolina, and for Judicial Watch!**
[And I ask for your support with a _special tax-deductible contribution_ today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58330&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=) for us to continue our investigations and lawsuits - including ACTIVE federal lawsuits to clean up voter rolls in Colorado and Pennsylvania!
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58330&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)
---

Thanks to the commitment of our supporters, **North Carolina** follows Judicial Watch voter roll clean-up successes in **California, Kentucky, Ohio** and **Indiana** - _and we are right now prepping lawsuits against other states to force them to clean up their voter rolls_! _We 're doing_ _the legal work that the corrupted Justice Department REFUSES to do_!

The Biden Justice Department is run by appointees hostile to list maintenance and other election integrity effort...so it is up to Judicial Watch.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58330&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)
---

We don't have the deep pockets of government to fund our independent investigations and litigation...instead, we rely on you and other Americans who share our commitment to upholding the rule of law.

Judicial Watch is breaking new ground fighting to keep our elections honest, but none of what we have accomplished would be possible [without the financial support we receive from our friends and supporters!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58330&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)

I urge you to join with us today!

Sincerely,

Tom Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58330&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=)

Donald J. Trump March 16th, 2022
Thank you all for being here to support a true America First warrior and the next governor of the great state of Georgia, David Perdue.

David is a fearless and outstanding conservative leader, and he is the ONLY candidate who can beat Stacey “The Hoax” Abrams this November.

As a United States Senator, David stood up to the Radical Left—and he was always a champion for strong, secure borders. As governor, David will restore integrity to our elections, he will eliminate the Georgia Income Tax, and he will put PARENTS back in charge of Georgia schools. David truly loves his state and his country, and he has my Complete and Total Endorsement.

David is running against Brian Kemp, a horrendous RINO who has betrayed the people of Georgia, and betrayed Republican voters. As governor, Brian Kemp has repeatedly surrendered to Stacey Abrams and the Radical Left:

· Kemp allowed himself to be bullied into a disastrous consent decree that effectively abolished signature verification and allowed massive voter fraud to occur throughout the state of Georgia.

· True the Vote released bombshell evidence revealing a gigantic illegal ballot harvesting scheme—involving more than 2,000 ballot traffickers—that took place on Kemp’s watch, and he does not even care.

· Under Kemp, Georgia officials took $45 million dollars from Facebook’s Mark Zuckerberg to fund election-related activities—over 90 percent of which was given to blue areas of the state to bolster Democrat turnout.

· He allowed a left-wing organization to mail out 2.2 million absentee ballot applications and place unsecured drop boxes throughout the state.

A vote for RINO Brian Kemp in this primary is a vote for Governor Stacey Abrams. A vote for David Perdue is a vote to save Georgia from the Radical Left!

Together, we will FIRE Brian Kemp, we will RESTORE Election Integrity in Georgia, and we will Make America Great Again!

name: Roger Marshall
subject: Do you want to fly without a mask?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KANSANS FOR MARSHALL
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/7873ca60b1b92a05/ed847f5e9e84af75c3d6b838967d376c/37973)
---
# **Friend — This week, the U.S. Senate voted to END Joe Biden’s mask mandates for planes, trains, and other public transportation.**

---
My response: GOOD! It’s time to unmask America and move on with life. However, now this bill to end the mandates is heading to the U.S. House... where it’s up to Nancy Pelosi to put it to a vote. Pelosi and Democrats like her have no problem breaking their own mask rules — but they want to shame any regular American who takes off their mask. **To keep up the momentum, it’s going to take the American people rallying together. clean_body: Do they actually want us at the table? | | | Dear Team, In the 2020 election, Black women turned out and helped the Democratic party win the Presidency and a majority in the Senate. We are the bulwark of the Democratic party's voting base, but when Black women like me choose to run, Democratic leadership immediately questions our “electability.” If the Democratic party wants to rely on Black women to win elections, they have to fight to give us a seat at the table. Representation matters. Period. In an published last Sunday, they asked me about the electability of Black women, and my answer was simple:Democratic leadership say they love Black women — until it's time to elect us. If elected, I will be the youngest Black woman ever elected to Congress. I am part of a generation of voters and leaders at the core of the Democratic party and we deserve to be represented in Congress. Thank you, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

name: Dr. Neil Shah For Governor
subject: Tell Michelle Benson to Give Back Pfizer Lobbyist Money!
body:
| Peter -- Lobbyists love Michelle Benson. While our campaign has not taken a single penny from lobbyists, Senator Benson, facing a severe lack of grassroots support, relies on lobbyists and special interests to bankroll her campaign. Senator Michelle Benson has taken hundreds of dollars from Big Pharma lobbyists for her campaigns for senate and Governor! Why does Pfizer like Benson so much? Corrupt Big Pharma lobbyists sank their teeth into Benson and her Health and Human Services committee role. This explains why Benson and Gazelka have been fighting to expand socialism [with massive insurance company bailout programs](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=W0PWpckGY9B3aSksFr6btQ5tUeOr2jotOejJ993rPlqR5pllxXOR9vR_QH2JxnjXoKbT4sO8Z5ZAM05KV7gURbGJA6_vbPPauZ1xHI1_iSRzheRFAu0Y9aK7BKfFZruDExM72sMPxs028iS4ZKG3Mw&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tell_michelle_benson_to_give&n=1), instead of even once moving to **fire Jan Malcom** or fighting for **Health Freedom**. If Michelle Benson wants to win the trust of conservatives who love liberty, **she needs to return the money she has taken from Pfizer’s lobbyist!** We cannot afford to have another Governor sold out to the Covid Bureaucrats.
**The same Pfizer lobbyist also sees political potential in Tim Walz:**
Even crooked and corrupt Walz has Benson beat on honesty. He at least lists that Pfizer is paying this lobbyist. Michelle Benson is trying to **HIDE** James Demay’s employment with Pfizer. In fact, she doesn’t list **ANY** of the lobbyists’ employment. **This is illegal!** As a member of medical associations consisting of small independent practices like my own, I fought career politicians and their lobbyists to reduce healthcare costs and get the government off our backs! We held bipartisan events where industry leaders could air their grievances with key policy makers. "Suggested" donations were in place because these politicians are so crooked they won't even show up to listen unless they get paid. As another business owner, **President Trump** made the same kind of contributions before running for office. Benson and Gazelka took part too, but in the end they sided with Tim Walz and their Big Pharma lobbyist friends. We disclosed this information over seven months ago, before Senators Benson and Gazelka decided to run for Governor. Find it [here](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=mI7Ws0NkibYEXUVfFZeJkGT6IZLDgDKsjqFQ1cbdX0TxjJW-9rq82-sriubv8KeXDjVFoA7wwzKRzKZDkXlqQAXe57WvVfMXkkr1JX8VJiJL5tpD7kF9xt4fD9x2U8OH&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=tell_michelle_benson_to_give&n=2). **Career politicians are attacking our campaign because they’re desperate, and afraid of our widespread grassroots momentum.** We need to reject lobbyists and embrace liberty to beat Tim Walz! Thank you! Dr. Neil Shah Conservative Candidate for Governor ElectNeil.com
---
-=-=- Dr. Neil Shah for Governor · 855 Village Center Drive #245, North Oaks, MN 55127-3016, United States

Peter – despite Marjorie Taylor Greene facing disciplinary action on all fronts, she continues to spew her hateful and treasonous rhetoric. I don’t know about you, but we’re sick and tired of it.
In another push to tear our country apart, Marjorie Taylor Greene periodically suggests national divorce while also stating that “Americans who move to conservative states from California and New York should have a ‘cooling off’ period before being allowed to vote.”
This treasonous and anti-democratic rhetoric poisons our national discourse and damages our longstanding democracy.
Marjorie Taylor Greene’s actions prove time and again that she is more interested in her ultra-conservative donors than her own constituents. Unlike Marge, Team Holly is in the community everyday trying to unite us on the issues that matter, rather than the issues that tear us apart.
We don't need a national divorce, we just need a divorce from Marjorie Taylor Greene . We deserve a representative who supports our democratic values and supports their constituents. Chip in $12 to put an end to her treasonous rhetoric. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em0119]
We are in this together,

Happy St. Patrick's Day, Peter!

But today isn't just St. Patrick's Day, it's also the start to March Madness -- and our very own Providence College men's basketball team is about to tip off in just a few minutes.

The Friars already won their first Big East regular-season title in school history and Coach Cooley is an inspiration for every Providence kid for what is possible with hard work and determination.

Now, they will represent Rhode Island in the NCAA tournament and we will be cheering them on all the way (and of course I have them winning the whole thing). I hope everyone enjoys this great time of the year!

Go Friars!

Seth

These "Young Guns" are at the very front of the Republican Red Wave that's ready to sweep into Washington. Their races will MAKE or BREAK conservative victory.

It is CRUCIAL that you and I support these rising Conservative Leaders today, so they can win their races and help us save our country.

**[Will you sign your name and ENDORSE these leaders to help them WIN their elections? Without your support, they could lose. Please endorse now!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6iiukmrkj60rvm8259eomc2jrunnkj88kf8can8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clgmeoj1cdh2bs)**

name: Team Jane
subject: 🚨 Former TX-30 Democratic Candidates Endorse Jane HOPE Hamilton
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Jane Hope Hamilton for Congress
body:
Friends,

Yesterday, three former 2022 Democratic candidates who ran for Congressional District 30 endorsed Jane HOPE Hamilton for Congress!

We are so excited about the momentum of our campaign for Congress! We kicked off this runoff with the endorsement of State Representative, Chairman Rafael Anchía and yesterday we secured the the endorsements of former candidates from the primary: former State Representative Barbara Mallory Caraway, former Councilwoman Vonciel Jones Hill and former Constable Roy Williams Jr. We are so honored and encouraged by their support.

"Congressional District 30 needs a representative in Washington who will work to lower prescription drug costs so families won't have to make the hard decision between the high cost of medication and putting food on the table. We need someone who will work for safer neighborhoods by decreasing the escalating gun violence and crime plaguing our district. At the same time, we need a representative who will work to ensure we keep our voting rights in this crumbling Democracy. That person is Jane Hope Hamilton. "
- Former State Rep. Barbara Mallory Caraway

Jane Hope Hamilton has my support for Congress. Her history of advocating for our neighborhoods and speaking up for our underserved populations makes her the right choice. I look forward to working with her in Congress as we both continue to serve our communities.”
- Former Constable Roy Williams, Jr.

Donate Today [secure.actblue.com/donate/email_ask]
If you prefer to donate by check, please mail to:
Jane Hope Hamilton Campaign
P.O. Box 227046
Dallas, TX 75222

Follow us on social media:
https://www.facebook.com/janehopetx

Dallas, TX 75222

name: Team Kilmer
subject: Great news for our district
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

We're thrilled to announce that last week President Biden signed the omnibus spending package. Derek supported this bill to keep the government open and fund critical priorities for our region. The legislation includes investments in jobs, affordable housing, economic opportunities in rural areas, and our environment.

Included in this new law is funding Derek championed for ten local community projects, totaling $22.9 million in new funding for our region. That included:

**$4.5 Million to Support Affordable Housing and Jobs in Tacoma**

Every Washingtonian deserves access to affordable, safe, and warm housing. The funding Derek secured will go toward building more affordable housing in Tacoma and creating good-paying jobs to strengthen our economy.

**$2.5 Million for Downtown Revitalization in Bremerton**

The Quincy Square project in downtown Bremerton will be a key step in the effort to revitalize the city center, enable new economic development, and support more affordable housing investment.

**$9.95 Million to Protect Grays Harbor from flooding**

Derek secured funding for the community to make investments in resilience that can prevent flooding and enable new housing and economic development in Aberdeen and Hoquiam. Roughly $2 million per year leaves the community to pay for flood insurance, and with these investments, more of those dollars will be able to stay in our community.

**$900,000 to Expand the Port Angeles Food Bank**

The Port Angeles Food Bank has served Clallam County and provided food assistance to people in need since 1975. They have continued to help people during the COVID-19 pandemic, and this funding will help them expand their critical services.

Our communities have a lot of needs, and Derek is standing up to address them. [**Derek is delivering results for the people. Please sign on now to support Derek 's efforts to invest in our communities. **](https://act.myngp.com/el/4I2fjkVlMvnLSEXYMAQUNIvbmof-9f374frAgtBSO50=/f5tOfOZH64iu2giRIPlLM69qYffD4TZmZj9cX9U6m-I=?ms=em22_220317_cmfnd_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em22_220317_cmfnd_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em22_220317_cmfnd_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220317_cmfnd_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}}
)

Thank you,

Team Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

clean_body: Peter, We're thrilled to announce that last week President Biden signed the omnibus spending package. Derek supported this bill to keep the government open and fund critical priorities for our region. The legislation includes investments in jobs, affordable housing, economic opportunities in rural areas, and our environment. Included in this new law is funding Derek championed for ten local community projects, totaling $22.9 million in new funding for our region. That included: $4.5 Million to Support Affordable Housing and Jobs in Tacoma Every Washingtonian deserves access to affordable, safe, and warm housing. The funding Derek secured will go toward building more affordable housing in Tacoma and creating good-paying jobs to strengthen our economy. $2.5 Million for Downtown Revitalization in Bremerton The Quincy Square project in downtown Bremerton will be a key step in the effort to revitalize the city center, enable new economic development, and support more affordable housing investment. $9.95 Million to Protect Grays Harbor from flooding Derek secured funding for the community to make investments in resilience that can prevent flooding and enable new housing and economic development in Aberdeen and Hoquiam. Roughly $2 million per year leaves the community to pay for flood insurance, and with these investments, more of those dollars will be able to stay in our community. $900,000 to Expand the Port Angeles Food Bank The Port Angeles Food Bank has served Clallam County and provided food assistance to people in need since 1975. They have continued to help people during the COVID-19 pandemic, and this funding will help them expand their critical services. Our communities have a lot of needs, and Derek is standing up to address them. ={{ContactData}} Thank you, Team Kilmer Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. name: Donald Trump
subject: Miss me yet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
| Peter,

I’ve got one question for you in light of the recent events happening in America and across the world: **_ Do you MISS ME YET? _**

In May 2021 I predicted that gas would hit $7/gallon under Sleepy Joe. _Guess what?_ _I was right!_ I hate to say it, but I was right.

**It’s painful to see the STRONG America we build together look so weak on the world stage - but that’s what we get when DEMOCRATS are in charge.**

**[Take a moment to let me know if you miss me](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1a2095043ab74fd8a5303ff996b83751&_e=w0FzTgc5s-U614Xp1mH7r1ZuUaVdNhrTsAEWadsYzsPpeHIaceQXuBas1poedra1SPNzQN35Gp4RqdPQK-CayB0tWL1QineZS3NxRf_vBcv0eQas8MylbLsEy40XvYVT0KeUX3sOqW6zNAnDcuxk7MBaV-R8PyN7Svfn2c4lGcST2PHZkFrJj7NvsnteW3J2wyBUh_kpt8Yh65tg3y7KMpqD6E5JYhq2H3wfuTjEML3HDxfPHHFQ9hYy4skvYhf1orF8Ni-L2yfzlIKh7cK-IOZdrlTJyYupAhifeMgMCWNTemPCTT9cdmUcamheE0LrlJsiofW49zR4jlIhLAaExdtkGucnlEUARCgzDk1yfPAwmkbrXCXxhYEFHj24aIMFn_1oIS3mqx0FOZuZS6obrDv5WQOvprHGYWedRUHJZ_Blc1J81yNNBlbe-1zephqXS4kmEQEFb84ozc1upFR-IA%3D%3D)** and the **AMERICA FIRST** policies my team and I put into place during our **FOUR GLORIOUS years in the White House.**

[**< < MISS ME YET? name: Beto HQ
subject: Legalize it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Republicans like to get high just as much as Democrats.
#
Can we let you in on a little secret? Republicans like to get high just as much as Democrats.
We should no longer be locking Texans up for a substance that is legal in much of the rest of the country. And as governor, Beto will legalize marijuana statewide.
[ If you support legalizing marijuana in Texas, will you make a $3 contribution right now to help elect Beto? ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54028?refcode=ema20220317-180834&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=180834%2E444211%2EKoJh5M)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54028?refcode=ema20220317-180834&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=180834%2E444211%2EKoJh5M)**
Marijuana arrests have created vast racial disparities in our criminal justice system, generated an unnecessary burden on Texas taxpayers, and diverted law enforcement officers’ time and attention away from violent crime.
**When Beto is governor, we’ll finally legalize marijuana and expunge the records of those arrested for marijuana possession** — and we’ll use the nearly $1 BILLION in new state revenue and reduced criminal justice costs to invest in our public schools and long-overdue teacher pay raises. It’s the right thing to do.
This fight isn’t new for Beto. He is a longtime advocate for legalizing marijuana. In fact, Beto even co-authored a book arguing for legalization back in 2011!
Legalizing marijuana in Texas will help build a future that is more just, more fair, and more prosperous for every person in this state. But we need your help to get it done.
[ Make your first contribution of $3 to help defeat Greg Abbott and finally elect a Texas governor who is committed to legalizing marijuana.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54028?refcode=ema20220317-180834&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=180834%2E444211%2EKoJh5M)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/54028?refcode=ema20220317-180834&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=180834%2E444211%2EKoJh5M)**
Thank you so much for everything you do,
Team Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220317-180834-footer&t=23&refcode2=180834_444211_KoJh5M&akid=180834%2E444211%2EKoJh5M)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=24&akid=180834%2E444211%2EKoJh5M)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=180834%2E444211%2EKoJh5M)

name: Cheri Beasley
subject: personal reflections
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
As I sit here and think about how far we’ve come in this campaign, I feel like it’s important for me to share a bit more about why I decided to run for Senate.

I have 15 minutes in my schedule right now. That can feel like a rarity these days, but I’ve always found unscheduled time to be the best time to reflect.
As I sit here and think about how far we’ve come in this campaign, I feel like it’s important for me to share a bit more about why I decided to run for Senate.
My mom raised me in a home steeped with faith, service and love. She taught me that with hard work I could accomplish anything I set my mind to. And my husband Curt and I raised our twin boys right here in North Carolina in a home with these same values.
I know families across this state are teaching their kids these same values — but the truth is, our leaders in Washington have left our families behind. For me, this has always been not just about today or tomorrow — but about the next generation and the world we want for them.
That means we need leaders who will put the people first and who will fight for a better future for all of our families.
So that’s why I’m in this race — one of the most competitive Senate contests anywhere in the nation — to be a voice for you and anyone in our country who is looking for a fair shake and a fair shot.
My moment of free time is almost up, but I need to ask for your help because the truth is that our opponents will stop at nothing to defeat us. They’ve seen me win statewide twice before, so they’re already pouring millions of dollars in dark money into this race.
[**So if you are ready to fight back and expand our Senate majority, will you please contribute whatever you can to flip this seat? I’ll be a champion for you and your family in the Senate, but I cannot win this race alone.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-mar22?refcode=em220317-1-MA&refcode2=551.357359.wzH-yN&t=1&akid=551%2E357359%2EwzH-yN)
All of our children — no matter who they are or where they live — should have a bright future and a healthy, prosperous life. That’s what we will fight for and win, together.
\- Cheri
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-mar22?refcode=em220317-1-MA&refcode2=551.357359.wzH-yN&t=2&akid=551%2E357359%2EwzH-yN)**

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=551%2E357359%2EwzH-yN). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=551%2E357359%2EwzH-yN). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=551_357359_wzH-yN&akid=551%2E357359%2EwzH-yN) today to help us make history.

name: Katie Hill
subject: @Republicans, make it make sense.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/yDWOvASwePN_wgRpb_DPTnVh-3Umu0t712oDLG2g1pI=/NsWT0KabCLas9kwFqJ9lvkuFjITIM5yTwM3nyCOKVr0=)
A Republican lawmaker in Missouri just introduced a bill that would _ban abortions of ectopic pregnancies_. For lack of a better word, that is _insane_.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/htfrontline?refcode=secure.actblue.com/donate/htfrontline?refcode=X_031722_EctopicPregnancies)
Ectopic pregnancies aren't viable -- they will NEVER result in the birth of a child. But they _will_ be life-threatening for the mother, meaning a pregnant woman would have to choose between her own life and jail time.
**There 's NOTHING "pro-life" about this bill.**
We need to stop Republicans' insane abortion restrictions before they hurt any more women.
**[Our frontline Congresswomen are fighting nonstop to protect the right to choose federally -- even though Republicans will use it against them in the general election. Will you support their work by chipping in now?](https://act.myngp.com/el/yDWOvASwePN_wgRpb_DPTnVh-3Umu0t712oDLG2g1pI=/djt2z95u2VfrpUD409bjwUshqFtaXnGRxyrPHecr3ww=?refcode=X_031722_EctopicPregnancies)**
Thank you!
-- _Katie_

name: =?utf-8?Q?David=20Perdue?=
subject: Can you volunteer at President Trump's rally in GA?
body:
| | | [ ](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=bac490d11c&e=89fb4d5220)
---
| Friends,

President Trump is coming back to Georgia for a BIG rally for us on **Saturday, March 26th** at 7:00 PM in Commerce! We need all hands on deck to make this a huge success.
**[SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER HERE!](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=bbd5f0f404&e=89fb4d5220)**
President Trump told the world that we were going to put America First. He cut regulations, unleashed our energy potential, lowered taxes, and created the greatest economic turnaround in U.S. history.

I was proud to work alongside President Trump in the U.S. Senate, and I'm humbled to have his complete and total endorsement in the race for Governor.
[](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=c35802fac4&e=89fb4d5220)
Please join me next Saturday, March 26th in Commerce to give President Trump a warm Georgia welcome!

_**We need your help. Can you help us by volunteering at the rally?**_
[REGISTER HERE TO VOLUNTEER](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=da3cc25379&e=89fb4d5220)
Thanks for all you do! I hope you're able to join us next Saturday.

– David

_P.S. You can find more information on the rally and register for a free general admission ticket[HERE](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=2ef210a5e5&e=89fb4d5220)._

---
