subject: Happy St. Patrick’s Day! ☘️
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43083858/335634099/-1623135755?refcode=neu_headerlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzdmMjYzYS0zNWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pKPpQ0Se5C7BQUf9rX1YEhsUGTjOINGa_wkd-AnbHmY=)

| | Happy St. Patrick's Day, Peter! Before you head out to celebrate, [**will you chip in $5, $10, or whatever amount makes sense for you, to Laura’s campaign? We have an important end-of-month goal coming up, and right now we’re not on track to reach it.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43083860/335634114/2042683516?refcode=EM_BS_NEU_220317_FR_STPATRICKS_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzdmMjYzYS0zNWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pKPpQ0Se5C7BQUf9rX1YEhsUGTjOINGa_wkd-AnbHmY=) | | | [Chip in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43083861/335634115/2042683516?refcode=EM_BS_NEU_220317_FR_STPATRICKS_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDkyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzdmMjYzYS0zNWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pKPpQ0Se5C7BQUf9rX1YEhsUGTjOINGa_wkd-AnbHmY=)
---
With a crowded Democratic primary field of ten candidates, Laura needs to do whatever it takes to stand out.
That’s why she’s been campaigning across the state and attending forums on the issues that matter to her most – such as the environment, housing equity, and women in STEM.
Laura is able to attend these important events and connect with voters because she’s confident that her team is handling the fundraising side of things.

Peter,

People in Washington's 8th District and across the country are feeling the pinch at the gas pump and in the grocery store – while gas and oil companies are making record profits. Putin’s illegal invasion of Ukraine has driven up gas prices even more.

Kim knows something has to be done. That's why she's taking action by introducing legislation to suspend the federal gas tax until January 1, 2023 to help lower gas costs for people across the country.

This bill will get relief to families right away, but now, Kim wants to hear from you:

name: Rushern Baker
subject: Primary postponed
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]

Friend,
Earlier this week, the Maryland Court of Appeals officially pushed our state’s primary election from June 28 th to July 19 th . With several legal challenges over redistricting this was inevitable, and now we have to deal with it.
I am deeply concerned and can’t imagine a more inconvenient time to hold an election or an outcome that will cause more confusion for voters. I’m concerned about the ability for the state and county election boards to secure the personnel necessary to pull off an election in the middle of summer.
We need to work towards more confidence and less confusion in our elective process. One way we can do that is by reforming the way we select our district lines. And now we must do all that we can to inform people and make sure they know how, when, and where to vote. Together we can still fight for Maryland’s future.
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
Thank you,
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
Rushern L. Baker, III
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
**P.S. because of Maryland’s Public Finance program, your donation will be eligible for a matching program explained here [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
By Authority, Baker and Navarro for Maryland, Calvin Brown, Treasurer
Baker & Navarro for Maryland
9646 Marlboro Pike
Upper Marlboro , MD 20772
United States

name: Congressman John Garamendi
subject: Exciting news
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Garamendi for Congress** |
body:
The grassroots Democrats have spoken, and I am proud to share that last weekend I was overwhelmingly endorsed by our California Democratic Party.
---
| | |
---
| | | | |
---

| | | | | | | |
---

|
---
Dear Friend,

The grassroots Democrats have spoken, and I am proud to share that I was overwhelmingly endorsed by our California Democratic Party. I am proud to be a Democrat, and it’s incredibly meaningful to have the continued support of our diverse and growing state party.

The Democratic Party is fighting every day for a clean energy future with the Green New Deal. Democrats are the ones defending access to abortion and advocating to codify Roe v. Wade. It’s our party that’s standing up for democracy, protecting workers’ rights, making health care more affordable, increasing access to housing, and so much more.

With the rise of right-wing extremism threatening our democracy – whether in the form of QAnon-aligned misinformation campaigns of hate, or the fascist forces of intolerance – the Democratic Party stands as the primary bulwark protecting our rights and fighting for a future that gives everyone in this country a chance at a better life.

I’m proud to be a Democrat. It’s an honor to once again receive the formal endorsement of our party.

Thank you for being in this fight with me, let’s get to it!
Sincerely,
|
---
|
---
Congressman John Garamendi

|
---

John and Teresa know that to launch Ohio’s comeback, we’re going to have to start by rethinking our economy from the ground up — _literally._
That’s why they want to win this race and transition Ohio to a clean-energy economy — one that promotes the solar and wind energy sectors to create jobs and expand access to clean energy. **As mayor, John helped build the largest municipally-owned solar farm in the country,** so he knows a thing or two about the crossroads of job creation and clean energy development.
So how about it? Are you ready for a **green** economy, good-paying jobs, and access to clean energy here in Ohio?

clean_body: | John knows a thing or two about going green. Friend, Happy St. Patrick’s Day! Today is all about the color green , which is why Team Cranley-Fedor wants to know: Do you support a GREEN economy? | | ---|--- John and Teresa know that to launch Ohio’s comeback, we’re going to have to start by rethinking our economy from the ground up — literally. That’s why they want to win this race and transition Ohio to a clean-energy economy — one that promotes the solar and wind energy sectors to create jobs and expand access to clean energy. As mayor, John helped build the largest municipally-owned solar farm in the country, so he knows a thing or two about the crossroads of job creation and clean energy development. So how about it? Are you ready for a green economy, good-paying jobs, and access to clean energy here in Ohio? Thanks for being part of the team, and happy St. Paddy’s Day! Be sure to catch John out in the Cleveland parade today! Team Cranley-Fedor = = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too. = = = = Paid for by the Cranley Fedor for Ohio Committee CRANLEY FEDOR FOR OHIO 545 EAST TOWN STREET COLUMBUS, OH 43215 United States Click here to

Can you believe it?

_PLEASE RESPOND NOW >> _
President Trump understood that our national security depends on our ability to control our own borders.
But Joe Biden’s Democrats are determined to keep our borders _open_ and _insecure!_
[That’s why Biden’s border csar, Kamala Harris, has done nothing to stop the problem of record levels of illegal immigration!](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9C8yWe5Ile1JvYltwx9A55C73_MsSuXfMUIRNp63RiXxkx_Yhv80q3JI3fP0hgOZm2xHqAYnImWpEPY2W3WUURwwCyEJv8PbPRuQuqEr-q7ZFWWlACtWDrgmam5n4M0Kek3BT2Y3nkgLhTTje35XNw8VQ827rGlfF_trbP1ArWvdM_W-T9MKn0brQl_tJQKdZO8XyoqTqRjnJj-klaebcoPpRnjRR_BelAjkiVw_WnLOR7lBXXBosR-5bV69gwx4QT5aC215nCgVQViAOLnjEiPA0KhVts_jOdr0yBl_stA6NPQQYA6Apd2MtvyJK12VaQRuOFPNNg-irnQs3t86guLbka-tGQMV2ZR9fAOLFLOJ-pFa9QwVQF9NDHnNYJ3jCWwIcu7Zl2Nc4xTGuCxImwMc0YxeceoEM0zIXFfFZN513lkOFtpcPqoUxNs072PWQ04rhbuIi3cx7C00-1EVMmC-YLQ6y7_FzcvYnUa9reVrD7ZVqp7gnpOpzJLb0kTDJnpm-imIfzbgqt3THloaBreMdwtg3p1XdvcLypKKlhp8quIh1jvlQPcGrKmhg1RT7&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=482734863409381648&n=7)
It’s clear that if we want the wall completed, we’ll need to do it ourselves.

But first, we need to hear from you, Peter. | Thank you. Republican Action Alerts Sent via North Carolina Republican Party

Being elevated to Young Gun status illustrates the belief that conservatives across the country have in our campaign, Peter. They know that I’m a fighter who will battle tooth-and-nail to win this key district that we need to topple Pelosi’s House majority. The NRCC has also seen your dedicated support, and this status upgrade is recognition that you and I have built a winning team here in Southern Arizona. It’s also a great sign for our chances in November. Over 150 “Young Guns” have been elected to Congress, and in 2020, 25 out of the 36 “Young Guns” won their races. But as amazing as this all is, it means nothing without your continued support. Thank you, Juan Ciscomani Republican Candidate for Congress PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 35103 Tucson, AZ 85740

The Florida GOP just passed a bill that would endanger LGBTQ+ children
| | |
---
| | **URGENT: The shameful "Don't Say Gay" bill could become law**
---
**The Florida GOP just passed a bill that would endanger LGBTQ+ children, and I need your help to block the bill before it becomes law.**
---
**[Please, join me in speaking out against the Florida GOP's "Don't Say Gay" bill by signing my petition before midnight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43084737/335637476/1713383368?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk2657-su-nd-v2&refcode=jtk2657-su-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzZkNjgwNS0zOGE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_ZDxgHjzWGKjEWqEkCRDlJooILe6aNut4C4TeL9v8YQ=&emci=824329be-0ca6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=8c6d6805-38a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=20244100)**

_DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M. on March 17_
---
Friend,

As if the Florida GOP hasn't stooped low enough, they are now pushing a bill that attacks vulnerable children.
The Republican-led legislature just passed the "Don't Say Gay" bill, which bans students and teachers from _even mentioning_ LGBTQ+ identities in school.
If this bill is signed into law, teachers could be sued for discussing events that have impacted the LGBTQ+ community like the Pulse shooting. Students won't even be able to talk about their own LGBTQ+ identities.
As a former social worker, a mother and a Floridian, my heart breaks to see leaders in my state propose a bill that would make it even harder for LGBTQ+ youth to feel safe and accepted at school. It's disgraceful that the GOP is treating these students as pawns in an attempt to politicize their existence.
**I'm doing everything in my power to stop this anti-LGBTQ+ bill from becoming law, but time is running out. Please, will you use your voice now to speak out against the "Don't Say Gay" bill before my petition closes at midnight?

[Sign on now to oppose this anti-LGBTQ+ bill. >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43084739/335637478/1713383368?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk2657-su-nd-v2&refcode=jtk2657-su-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YzZkNjgwNS0zOGE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_ZDxgHjzWGKjEWqEkCRDlJooILe6aNut4C4TeL9v8YQ=&emci=824329be-0ca6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=8c6d6805-38a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=20244100)**

clean_body: The Florida GOP just passed a bill that would endanger LGBTQ+ children | | | | | URGENT: The shameful "Don't Say Gay" bill could become law The Florida GOP just passed a bill that would endanger LGBTQ+ children, and I need your help to block the bill before it becomes law. | | DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M. on March 17 Friend, As if the Florida GOP hasn't stooped low enough, they are now pushing a bill that attacks vulnerable children. The Republican-led legislature just passed the "Don't Say Gay" bill, which bans students and teachers from even mentioning LGBTQ+ identities in school. If this bill is signed into law, teachers could be sued for discussing events that have impacted the LGBTQ+ community like the Pulse shooting. Students won't even be able to talk about their own LGBTQ+ identities. As a former social worker, a mother and a Floridian, my heart breaks to see leaders in my state propose a bill that would make it even harder for LGBTQ+ youth to feel safe and accepted at school. It's disgraceful that the GOP is treating these students as pawns in an attempt to politicize their existence. I'm doing everything in my power to stop this anti-LGBTQ+ bill from becoming law, but time is running out. Please, will you use your voice now to speak out against the "Don't Say Gay" bill before my petition closes at midnight? | | DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M. on March 17 Thank you for your advocacy, Congresswoman Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. & . I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. Hi Peter,

Mike Garcia must think we're not paying attention.

He thinks he can call the violence and attempted insurrection on January 6th "legitimate political discourse" and still win this election.

He thinks he can vote to overturn a democratically-held election and vote against every piece of legislation to protect voting rights and still say he supports American values.

He thinks he can vote against the Women's Protection Act, the Violence Against Women Act, the Family Vioelence Prevention and Services Improvement Act, and have the audacity to say he supports women of this district.

Mike Garcia believes he can flaunt support for Ukraine and holding Russia accountable, when we all know he refused to vote to impeach then-President Trump for threatening to withhold Ukrainian aid to serve his own political ends.

Mike Garcia thinks he deserves the support of the people of CA-27, even after he voted against every investment aimed at getting working Americans back on their feet during a devastating pandemic.

**The people of CA-27 are paying attention and we deserve better.** And together we will show Mike Garcia that we are done with his self-serving agenda. We are going to vote him out in November.

**[The people of CA-27 needs a leader like Christy Smith who will fight for the values of truth and democracy, not work to undermine them. clean_body: | Hi Peter, Mike Garcia must think we're not paying attention. He thinks he can call the violence and attempted insurrection on January 6th "legitimate political discourse" and still win this election. He thinks he can vote to overturn a democratically-held election and vote against every piece of legislation to protect voting rights and still say he supports American values. He thinks he can vote against the Women's Protection Act, the Violence Against Women Act, the Family Vioelence Prevention and Services Improvement Act, and have the audacity to say he supports women of this district. Mike Garcia believes he can flaunt support for Ukraine and holding Russia accountable, when we all know he refused to vote to impeach then-President Trump for threatening to withhold Ukrainian aid to serve his own political ends. Mike Garcia thinks he deserves the support of the people of CA-27, even after he voted against every investment aimed at getting working Americans back on their feet during a devastating pandemic. The people of CA-27 are paying attention and we deserve better. And together we will show Mike Garcia that we are done with his self-serving agenda. We are going to vote him out in November. = = Working people are tired of politicians like Mike Garcia, Donald Trump, and most of those in the Republican Party who care more about their own political ambitions and bank accounts than actually doing their jobs and legislating. It's time for a change. = Let's go, Team Christy = = *

subject: Vote (early) for Tom and Shannon!
body:
Did you request your mail-in ballot?
#

Team,

After this week’s decision by the Maryland Court of Appeals to postpone Maryland’s primary election to July 19, we’re reaching out to ask an important question:

**Have you requested your mail-in ballot yet?**

****[Yes!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43084984/335638896/-364882259?refcode=BPI-em-null-null-null-20220317-MDBallot-Upsell-Y&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzRkOTZiMy0zOWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EaHVDSbSLz15A7NNKaDTBKANCt8VBEOsZj8eYovUYQk=)**** ****[No!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43084985/335638897/447755207?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzRkOTZiMy0zOWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EaHVDSbSLz15A7NNKaDTBKANCt8VBEOsZj8eYovUYQk=&emci=fb6748f3-21a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=c34d96b3-39a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)****
**If you plan to vote by mail in the primary, it’s critically important that you request your ballot from the Maryland Board of Elections as soon as possible.** In a primary field this crowded, we're not exaggerating when we say our margin to victory could be razor thin. Early vote returns can help us learn where we stand in the field and how we need to recalibrate our strategy to win.

**So, if you’re ready to vote for Tom and Shannon, but you haven’t requested your mail-in ballot yet, please** **[click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43084986/335638898/447755207?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzRkOTZiMy0zOWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EaHVDSbSLz15A7NNKaDTBKANCt8VBEOsZj8eYovUYQk=&emci=fb6748f3-21a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=c34d96b3-39a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)!**

Thank you for making sure we can elect Tom and Shannon and build a Maryland where good-paying jobs, equal justice under the law, and equal access to opportunity is a reality.

– Tom’s Field Team

******[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43084987/335638899/1234338550?refcode=BPI-em-null-null-null-20220317-MDBallot-DB&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzRkOTZiMy0zOWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EaHVDSbSLz15A7NNKaDTBKANCt8VBEOsZj8eYovUYQk=)******

name: Emily Seidel
subject: Does high inflation worry you?
body:
Everywhere you look, we are seeing higher prices. Whether it is gas prices, grocery bills, or energy costs, prices everywhere ar
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zpete9r78i5rknqh3bvu2rab0eatppm009r3hlt8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkpqj3cpiekor9d1jmoqjcd9jm5p78cdjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrmasrjcjh6adlh65qn3dlkecr32c5h6ur60t1kelg7fc70mhgrec9geipb0sb0sv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6tj33d5lm5jr4sb66pgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5jmapb2cdi61oh5u)
| | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zrldsfvroa029q1839q03713ejtqo9iajsrvl60g_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clim4or4c3h2bs)
---
Dear Friend, Everywhere you look, we are seeing higher prices. Whether it is gas prices, grocery bills, or energy costs, prices everywhere are on the rise. These prices are rising in large part due to skyrocketing inflation. U.S. inflation has hit a 40 year high and continues to rise with no end in sight. Some experts say inflation will be high until at least the first half of 2022, while others are saying it will be high for even longer.
---
**DOES GROWING INFLATION** **CONCERN YOU?**
---
| | [**YES**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z6jnvfmr95qftbpbo8p88uvgj4p4p16616mk28mo_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clim4or4c3h2bs)
---
| [**NO**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zjcs1loafrrndf75iukhmob0atfqq44ecg1gsk60_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clim4or4c3h2bs)
---
| | [**YES**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z7us7edtevlkar8vclhmue02govj5ppo4coe24l8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clim4or4c3h2bs)
---
| [**NO**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zphhdhcap0toa658v6gfm03ppogddpdh009udge8_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clim4or4c3h2bs)
---
| | I’m sure you’ve probably seen rising costs in your own bills and utilities. These rising prices are affecting everyone. High inflation is making it harder for everyday Americans to live their lives and pursue their American dream. The Biden Administration promised that they would not raise taxes on people who made less than $400,000/year, but rising prices on goods that everyone needs is essentially a tax, and it affects the poor and the middle class the most. The problem is that Congress keeps debating more and more policies that will lead to higher costs for your grocery bill, higher costs to fill up your car, and higher costs to keep your house warm. The more they spend, the more inflation will go up, and the longer it will stay high. If you remember the high costs and impact of inflation of the 1970s, you’ll remember that we would NEVER want to go back to that, but that’s where we are headed. That’s why I’m emailing you today. **You can sign it at this secure link:[https://americansforprosperity.org/inflation-letter/](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zicte1njualckmoug7f7stnb0hkgfmqqub3ffbi0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clim4or4c3h2bs)** Of course, Congress isn’t the only reason why inflation is high, but they can do a lot to make sure it doesn’t get any higher. I hope you decide to make your voice heard on this because it’s so important. Best, —Emily Emily Seidel
President and CEO, Americans for Prosperity
---
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zruu5qqhemr52l71buo1momeu7vrih5qot3o9kf0_rp22sh2s8i66ob7clim4or4c3h2bs)
---
Americans for Prosperity 1310 N Courthouse Road Suite 700 Arlington Virginia 22201 United States
This email was sent by Americans for Prosperity.
---

1602 Belle View Blvd #381, Alexandria, VA 22307

body:
Yesterday, Wexton tried to flip-flop her position on Green New Deal regulations and shirk responsibility for higher gas prices | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/df5849bb9781/we-cant-afford-this?e=fc83fb200d)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=4a5694d50a&e=fc83fb200d "Donate")
---
| ,

It's remarkable how quickly Democrats will flip-flop on their positions when election year comes around.

For years, my opponent Jennifer Wexton has done her best to adopt AOC's Green New Deal policies and cripple the oil and gas industry. You can see for yourself here:
---
|
---
| These policies have driven the cost of gas so high that Wexton knows she can't stay on the same path.

Just yesterday, she came out in support of Governor Youngkin's plan to suspend the Virginia gas tax.
---
|
---
| We can't let Wexton shirk responsibility for the crisis that she's caused.

Her Green New Deal clean energy policies have caused the price increases that are hurting hard-working Virginian families.

Wexton has pushed these policies for her entire career. If she wins re-election, she'll go right back to them and gas prices will continue to climb.

We can't let that happen. I'm running for Congress to put an end to the nonsensical and unaffordable energy policy of Jennifer Wexton and her radical party leadership.

[Will you consider making a small donation of $100, $50, $25, or even just $10 to my campaign to help me restore American energy independence and bring a real solution to our energy crisis?](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=7af345289f&e=fc83fb200d)

Thank you for your support. Your contribution to my campaign is critical to taking back the House of Representatives. Together, let's put an end to the costly agenda of Jennifer Wexton, Joe Biden, and Nancy Pelosi and restore commonsense, affordable policies to our country.

Jeanine Lawson

name: Clean Up Illinois Crew
subject: the proof is in the emails
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois |
body:
Today, we released emails that further prove how deep-seeded the corruption in Springfield is.| | |
---
Team, Today, we released emails that further prove how deep-seeded the corruption in Springfield is. To give you a bit of background: In 2020, WBEZ reporting revealed Gov. J.B. Pritzker hired 35 individuals from then-House Speaker Michael Madigan’s “clout list,” costing taxpayers $2.5 million per year in salaries alone. This reporting was based primarily on emails sent by a Madigan aide. The new emails that our campaign, obtained via Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) requests, show how Madigan’s right-hand man, Michael McClain, worked with the highest levels of the Pritzker administration: from lobbying for patronage job placements to offering condolences for a criminal investigation into Pritzker’s “scheme to defraud” taxpayers. You can view the McClain email log _[**here**](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=59c807dec53c418895ee426ac9d11c9c&_e=nTGEoOMtlM-9fKP7S8zKP6Ttvs2luTLZ3yJU01lXlv-3xvu3qJC0k81zDKJsA-RgcL7Q6iFe2rhUvFe28t4ON_-VgExWEidpoidsY7y3E2WXWwZ_I1vroUO7tNG44TOwdJdoANjz20Tt7p_V7Uw8z9as8tX5AWcy2l82MIvowo_8G03Z57RO8MJ_PlGL4I8Vt4H3PIfQ90n0F3aFgyPFLWTgJLAJRexxWOQ-CXh1_VGJHPHhnu_2wpPVROH2WybuknD2Xm0hxaUEsdYVRCSx1pu-NvBIQkDxSmf-QyqAJimxiGhN6sCgK6XcikNWWFZuv437tMck62dWC4y_Va-SHj9ZvgovW-jViM2dt5x88waB1emMG0_4te83Vs8lQwXlOsoYN5ybSoVp5JBfx8X-OMgc8VTNEBQ4wcyM0e07kW9Mmw1Lw-P2cBN7m221s-zaOCPxFNxhe5UZrYwvaGNaLM9ychaYY9fgc8y0_gXk78A%3D)_. Over Pritzker’s tenure he has made move after move to weaken anti-corruption rules. Even with the recent Madigan indictment he does nothing to strengthen our watchdogs, in fact he’s trying to fire them. Our campaign is demanding a thorough investigation into patronage hiring in the Pritzker administration. Unfortunately, based on Pritzker’s track record, we can expect nothing to be done. **_But change can come in November..._** As Governor, Jesse will make sure that every last Madigan patronage hire be removed from state service. If you’re ready to clean up Illinois, learn more about Jesse’s 10-point plan to combat corruption here: [**jessesullivan.com/cleanup**](jessesullivan.com/cleanup) If you’re ready to be a part of our grassroots team, [**you can get your official Clean Up Crew member card with a $15 donation**](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=59c807dec53c418895ee426ac9d11c9c&_e=nTGEoOMtlM-9fKP7S8zKP_h07kvSf3TTkui9LrypDxaqzozDGoSl4FLmD8_GYCwiW6rJZBjAtT7XCU1gL6rWz6KAV2jj99JMWHr3iRlX9o3Dz0m4HrqhG17EX6sKwni0pTOqu21WzqrM1Nz7mPNgR7KfN0oHk-UY7zYc7lq-xgtNIZs-e67qTKFLglTLkH8Y10f89xRfxxWi7FKUXsRojWYegrilCs6VFBXC02LvSUrjal4FIlnzqxNcbm_GoFJbHWsdSKtulKOFfa3xUKkxxi2AE94VDjq8s78Xti9qNTI4gnKkCLmVTl-yEKPEnWLfkpDDhq_wkJxBKuRNALRlngcS8KkNR2FKiCgVaYZFnnUljdIf2Nk41iL44N3laZQnvS7KxVuiA2mWThaDjvR_VKw-Zg9QSHlFQ3jkVmPCCJHnZDHg7J1XMLLTAp-MBqrT2m_qTNmdC6LLcx9CQEhQbA%3D%3D), that will help our campaign get this message out across the state. clean_body: Today, we released emails that further prove how deep-seeded the corruption in Springfield is.| | | Team, Today, we released emails that further prove how deep-seeded the corruption in Springfield is. To give you a bit of background: In 2020, WBEZ reporting revealed Gov. J.B. Pritzker hired 35 individuals from then-House Speaker Michael Madigan’s “clout list,” costing taxpayers $2.5 million per year in salaries alone. This reporting was based primarily on emails sent by a Madigan aide. The new emails that our campaign, obtained via Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) requests, show how Madigan’s right-hand man, Michael McClain, worked with the highest levels of the Pritzker administration: from lobbying for patronage job placements to offering condolences for a criminal investigation into Pritzker’s “scheme to defraud” taxpayers. You can view the McClain email log . Over Pritzker’s tenure he has made move after move to weaken anti-corruption rules. Even with the recent Madigan indictment he does nothing to strengthen our watchdogs, in fact he’s trying to fire them. Our campaign is demanding a thorough investigation into patronage hiring in the Pritzker administration. Unfortunately, based on Pritzker’s track record, we can expect nothing to be done. But change can come in November... As Governor, Jesse will make sure that every last Madigan patronage hire be removed from state service. If you’re ready to clean up Illinois, learn more about Jesse’s 10-point plan to combat corruption here: jessesullivan.com/cleanup If you’re ready to be a part of our grassroots team, , that will help our campaign get this message out across the state. Thank you for your support,Clean Up Illinois Crew**** | | | | | | | Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois | | 111 E Douglas St, Petersburg, IL 62675 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

clean_body: I wanted to reach out and talk about why I am running for the US Senate in the first place. It is not something you just wake up and decide to do one | | | Hey Peter, I wanted to reach out and talk about why I am running for the US Senate in the first place. It is not something you just wake up and decide to do one day. The truth is, a few years back, I started to feel this urgency. Maybe you feel it too? The state of our environment, and that of our leadership in government, mobilized me to get moving and start working. I have three children, all young and getting ready to take on the world in one way or another. They deserve the same chances as every generation that came before them. They deserve clean air and water. They deserve a habitable planet and a chance at a secure and happy life. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | The other reason I threw my hat in the ring is that our government is not working. Marco Rubio has been in office for ten years, and I struggle to think of any good things he’s done for our community in that time. It is time for senators to take action. It is time for someone new. All the best, Ken Russell Ken Russell is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Florida. He's a small business owner turned community activist who will clean up Washington and restore our country’s character. Support Ken with a donation today. ** Paid for by Ken Russell for Florida

name: Data and Communication Manager
subject: John Selker’s Ecosystem Conservation Efforts Policy Conversation is Tuesday, March 22nd at 7pm!
body:
John Selker of Corvallis is running to represent the people of Oregon District 4 in the US Congress since Peter DeFazio announced his plans to retire. John is an entrepreneur, OSU Distinguished Professor, woodworker and problem solver. He is hosting a weekly series of Policy Conversations on Zoom to learn more about what is important to the people of our large and diverse district, and to help people understand John’s thinking on key issues.

**On Tuesday Mar. 22nd at 7 pm** on Zoom, John Selker is hosting the seventh in a series of Policy Conversations, this time focused on Mid-Coast Ecosystem Conservation Efforts & Water Issues featuring Paul Engelmeyer of Yachats.

Paul is the longtime manager of Portland Audubon Society's Ten Mile Creek Sanctuary near Yachats. He also manages several parcels for the Wetlands Conservancy in Beaver Creek, Yaquina Bay and Alsea Bay. Paul has decades of experience working in partnerships to achieve conservation goals. He helped form the Mid-Coast Watershed Council, Siuslaw Forest Alsea Stewardship Group and has worked with the Pacific Fisheries Management Council’s Salmon Advisory Subpanel & Habitat Committee.
[**REGISTER HERE**](https://zoom.us/meeting/register/tJ0rce2hrjIjHda4hDbdo47DxtuDqtxNZCo_) to receive a Zoom link to join the conversation. We look forward to seeing you!
After registering, you will receive a confirmation email containing information about joining the meeting.

Melanie Place
Data and Communications Manager
[communication@selker4congress.org](mailto:communication@selker4congress.org)
Cell: 541-286-0109
John Selker for Congress Campaign, Candidate 4th House Seat
[Twitter](https://twitter.com/JohnSelker)
[FB](https://www.facebook.com/groups/352472833546656)
[https://selker4congress.org](https://selker4congress.org/)
<https://www.facebook.com/john.selker/videos/253974480183077>

name: Team at United Rural Democrats
subject: Meet our new board member, Todd Prichard
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
Peter, Todd has a message for you

| |
---
Hi Peter – We are excited to announce the newest member of our board, Todd Prichard. Todd is a Democratic representative serving Iowa's 52nd district in the Iowa House of Representatives. More importantly, he is one of the last rural Democrats in Iowa. [__**Democrats are under attack in Iowa. Chip in here to keep the progressive flame alive.**__](https://click.everyaction.com/k/43077258/335603152/311099802?refcode2=ba9d4cc1-1aa6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&refcode=220317_team_prichard_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkzMDg1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJhOWQ0Y2MxLTFhYTYtZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aYdUJFi_oVHFvWqNbUvSF1dV78g3bozIVnRqxpcIIW4=) Rep. Prichard is a public school graduate, veteran, and lawyer. He has worked across the aisle on important issues like rural development, workforce training, veteran affairs, and public safety. But Rep. Prichard also understands the importance of promoting Democratic policies and investing in the next generation of Democratic voters. That's why we're proud to have Rep. Prichard on our team as we work in his home state of Iowa and rural states across the country. **Together, we will support Democratic candidates, policies, and voters in our shared mission to make sure rural America is prioritized in our political system.** Rep. Prichard has seen the challenges and backward policies that his Republican colleagues often bring to the table. But he also sees the way forward. Rep. Prichard can help us find the best way to connect with rural voters and win on the issues that these communities are most worried about right now. We're excited to learn from and welcome Rep. Prichard into our United Rural Democrats family. [**But we can't accomplish these goals without your support, Peter. Chip in here to help us advance a Democratic movement in rural clean_body: Peter, Todd has a message for you | | Hi Peter – We are excited to announce the newest member of our board, Todd Prichard. Todd is a Democratic representative serving Iowa's 52nd district in the Iowa House of Representatives. More importantly, he is one of the last rural Democrats in Iowa. = Rep. Prichard is a public school graduate, veteran, and lawyer. He has worked across the aisle on important issues like rural development, workforce training, veteran affairs, and public safety. But Rep. Prichard also understands the importance of promoting Democratic policies and investing in the next generation of Democratic voters. That's why we're proud to have Rep. Prichard on our team as we work in his home state of Iowa and rural states across the country. Together, we will support Democratic candidates, policies, and voters in our shared mission to make sure rural America is prioritized in our political system. Rep. Prichard has seen the challenges and backward policies that his Republican colleagues often bring to the table. But he also sees the way forward. Rep. Prichard can help us find the best way to connect with rural voters and win on the issues that these communities are most worried about right now. We're excited to learn from and welcome Rep. Prichard into our United Rural Democrats family. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you, The Team at United Rural Democrats | United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue? = = PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . name: Kirsten Engel
subject: Major endorsement by Congresswoman Kirkpatrick's PAC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43085801/335642673/429136084?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGZjZjU5Yi0zZGE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PO8_Id8ELUi-arPz0AdYhH82DrNhJwVoTUJ45p247g0=&emci=e41d1300-12a6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=78fcf59b-3da6-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=12898431)
---
Friend,
I am excited to share some pretty big news with you! Today, Congresswoman Kirkpatrick's PAC, **Moms Fed Up, announced they are endorsing our campaign for Congress!**
Congresswoman Kirkpatrick created Moms Fed Up to help Moms run for Congress. Women make up only 27% of Congress, and even fewer are moms with young children. As the mom of a teenage daughter, I know the importance of strong female role models who are willing to stand up for what they believe in.
[**Will you take a moment to watch their endorsment video?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43085802/335642674/1935924165?refcode=X_031722_Endorsement_MFU&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGZjZjU5Yi0zZGE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PO8_Id8ELUi-arPz0AdYhH82DrNhJwVoTUJ45p247g0=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43085803/335642676/1935924165?refcode=X_031722_Endorsement_MFU&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGZjZjU5Yi0zZGE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PO8_Id8ELUi-arPz0AdYhH82DrNhJwVoTUJ45p247g0=)
---

We need more women and more moms in Congress to give a voice to the issues that matter to everyday working moms and their families, and to provide an example for the next generation.

**And that’s exactly what I will do for Arizonans in Congress.**

I am so honored to have the endorsement and support of Moms Fed Up. [**Can I count on you to help us keep this momentum going by chipping in today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43085806/335642677/1935924165?refcode=X_031722_Endorsement_MFU&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGZjZjU5Yi0zZGE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PO8_Id8ELUi-arPz0AdYhH82DrNhJwVoTUJ45p247g0=)

|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43085807/335642678/-269233424?refcode=X_031722_Endorsement_MFU&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGZjZjU5Yi0zZGE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PO8_Id8ELUi-arPz0AdYhH82DrNhJwVoTUJ45p247g0=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43085808/335642679/-269233424?refcode=X_031722_Endorsement_MFU&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGZjZjU5Yi0zZGE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PO8_Id8ELUi-arPz0AdYhH82DrNhJwVoTUJ45p247g0=)

Thank you,
Kirsten

Friend,

You have been an integral part of this growing movement.

While we have accomplished so much together, we still have so much more work to do as we build our network of Americans who are tired of politics as usual in Washington, D.C., and looking for better, people-first leadership.

Governor Larry Hogan's strong leadership in Maryland continues to be a model of success that the rest of our country must look to as we figure out how to move forward on several top national issues.

clean_body: Our list is growing! for dpwillis67@gmail.com enclosed. | | Friend, You have been an integral part of this growing movement. While we have accomplished so much together, we still have so much more work to do as we build our network of Americans who are tired of politics as usual in Washington, D.C., and looking for better, people-first leadership. Governor Larry Hogan's strong leadership in Maryland continues to be a model of success that the rest of our country must look to as we figure out how to move forward on several top national issues. We must continue working together to turn things around. → Will you add your name to our growing list of Americans that are demanding smart common sense, conservative solutions to these national crises from our leaders? An America United is dedicated to improving our political discourse and advocating for smarter policies. Let's rebuild the people's faith in America's institutions. to demand smarter, common sense solutions from our elected officials because we must start changing the direction of our country before we reach the point of no return. clean_body: Sent from my iPhone| | | Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this | | Peter, My campaign team told me they’ve been trying to reach you. I’m on my way to another campaign stop, but I wanted to send you a quick message about my mid-month fundraising goal. We have extended the deadline to tonight at midnight. My opponent Andy Kim has the entire left wing on his side, and I’m counting on top grassroots supporters like you to make up for that. Chip in here to help me out: We set an ambitious $10,000 mid-month fundraising goal for March, and we’re JUST $1,014 away from hitting it. If just 102 supporters chip in $10 BY TONIGHT, we’ll get there. Will you rush in $10 today? I would really appreciate it, Peter. That’s why we need a change in leadership. When Bob gets to D.C., the career politicians won’t know what to do with him. He will be a total disruptor, bringing unique solutions to REAL problems we’re dealing with in South Jersey. name: Bill Posey Campaign
subject: Secretary Pompeo Endorses Bill Posey For Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Bill Posey
body:
( https://app.ignitionmail.com/ga/click/2-163077-5-28-52-75-cd995fc742-qd66bf347f )

Dear friend,

While President Biden continues to fumble his way
through heavily-scripted public appearances, the mainstream media
is working overtime to prop up his failing administration and
promote his immensely unpopular agenda.

Many in Washington are still pretending nothing is
wrong, but the writing on the wall couldn’t be any clearer.

Recent public opinion polls from across the spectrum
- Harris, Monmouth, Gallup and even CNN - show the Biden-Harris
Administration failing the American people on nearly every front.

* Only 18% of Americans strongly approve of the job President Biden
is doing;
https://app.ignitionmail.com/ga/click/2-163077-5-28-52-76-95625db928-qd66bf347f

* 62% of Americans say the country is on the wrong track (29% right
track);
https://app.ignitionmail.com/ga/click/2-163077-5-28-52-76-95625db928-qd66bf347f

* 63% of Americans say the economy is weak;
https://app.ignitionmail.com/ga/click/2-163077-5-28-52-76-95625db928-qd66bf347f

* 70% of Americans are ready to move on from COVID while Biden is
stuck on vaccine mandates, vaccine passports, masks and
lockdowns;
https://app.ignitionmail.com/ga/click/2-163077-5-28-52-77-0bad126586-qd66bf347f

* Only 27% of Americans say their financial situation is getting better;
https://app.ignitionmail.com/ga/click/2-163077-5-28-52-76-95625db928-qd66bf347f

* Trump is seen as a better President by 53% of Americans,
including 55% of Independents and 12% of Democrats; and
https://app.ignitionmail.com/ga/click/2-163077-5-28-52-76-95625db928-qd66bf347f

* 59% of Americans disapprove of the way Biden is handling
immigration/border security.
https://app.ignitionmail.com/ga/click/2-163077-5-28-52-78-1d574976bb-qd66bf347f

Clearly, the American people understand that
President Biden’s policies are failing to put the American people
first. I’m fighting for you every day by:

* Rejecting out of control spending that is driving
up the cost of everything;

* Fighting to end policies that take away our freedom and harm
our economy – vaccine mandates, reliance on China, open borders,
and taxpayer handouts to illegal immigrants; and

* Opposing globalist policies that put other countries first.

I hope you will join me as I work to PUT AMERICA
FIRST ( https://app.ignitionmail.com/ga/click/2-163077-5-28-52-79-9266a654f2-qd66bf347f )!

Sincerely,

Bill Posey

If you are able to contribute a small donation of
$10, $25 or $30 ( https://app.ignitionmail.com/ga/click/2-163077-5-28-52-79-9266a654f2-qd66bf347f ) to our
campaign, you can help us get the word out and win back the
Congressional majority to put America first and stop destructive
Biden-Harris policies.

Paid for by Friends of Bill Posey

P.O. Box 411486, Melbourne, FL 32941-1486

Don't like these emails? Unsubscribe (
https://app.ignitionmail.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-163077-5-28-52-b6bb9428e2e6387-qd66bf347f )

name: Data and Communication Manager
subject: Update: Ecosystem Conservation Efforts Policy Conversation with John Selker is Tuesday, March 22nd at 7pm!
body:
Apologies: **Corrected** zoom link is below

John Selker of Corvallis is running to represent the people of Oregon District 4 in the US Congress since Peter DeFazio announced his plans to retire. John is an entrepreneur, OSU Distinguished Professor, woodworker and problem solver. He is hosting a weekly series of Policy Conversations on Zoom to learn more about what is important to the people of our large and diverse district, and to help people understand John’s thinking on key issues.

**On Tuesday Mar. 22nd at 7 pm** on Zoom, John Selker is hosting the seventh in a series of Policy Conversations, this time focused on Mid-Coast Ecosystem Conservation Efforts & Water Issues featuring Paul Engelmeyer of Yachats.

Paul is the longtime manager of Portland Audubon Society's Ten Mile Creek Sanctuary near Yachats. He also manages several parcels for the Wetlands Conservancy in Beaver Creek, Yaquina Bay and Alsea Bay. Paul has decades of experience working in partnerships to achieve conservation goals. He helped form the Mid-Coast Watershed Council, Siuslaw Forest Alsea Stewardship Group and has worked with the Pacific Fisheries Management Council’s Salmon Advisory Subpanel & Habitat Committee.
Register here for**Zoom link to join:**
<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1wSXosJv8N2bBARS2GfQ2pfOqEDreUBtY/edit>

After registering, you will receive a confirmation email containing information about joining the meeting.

Melanie Place
Data and Communications Manager
[communication@selker4congress.org](mailto:communication@selker4congress.org)
Cell: 541-286-0109
John Selker for Congress Campaign, Candidate 4th House Seat
[Twitter](https://twitter.com/JohnSelker)
[FB](https://www.facebook.com/groups/352472833546656)
[https://selker4congress.org](https://selker4congress.org/)
<https://www.facebook.com/john.selker/videos/253974480183077>

name: Tom Barrett for Congress
subject: Barrett Brigade Newsletter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM BARRETT FOR CONGRESS | [ ](https://mgcp02
body:
Find out what’s going on in the Barrett Brigade | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=62337aac6fa809596f0d6749&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D623355be02bd9a356e85ecde%26ss_email_id%3D62337aac6fa809596f0d6749%26ss_campaign_name%3DBarrett%2BBrigade%2BNewsletter%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-03-17T18%253A15%253A35Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=BFTROYOTA_f4Bgogw8lFwTYgrOk%3D)
---
|
#### **Barrett Named NRCC “Young Gun”**
The National Republican Campaign Committee announced that I am a “Young Gun” for the 2022 election cycle, affirming the importance of my race to winning the Republican Majority. Led by House Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy, the NRCC identifies top tier Republican candidates running in battleground seats across the country, equipping them with the tools needed to win on Election Day.The NRCC knows that all roads to a Republican majority run through Michigan’s 7th district, and I am excited to work with them to deliver results to the people of Michigan.See the story [here](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=62337aac6fa809596f0d6749&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.dailywire.com%2Fnews%2Fmccarthy-announces-recent-additions-to-gop-young-guns-program&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=g9tVvf1GZR21_Ws0HJehAkwSXWw%3D).
---
| [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=62337aac6fa809596f0d6749&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.dailywire.com%2Fnews%2Fmccarthy-announces-recent-additions-to-gop-young-guns-program&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=g9tVvf1GZR21_Ws0HJehAkwSXWw%3D)
---
#### **Inflation hits a 4 decade high**
Inflation just hit a 4 decade high of 7.9%. Economists predict that it’s going to get even worse. The Biden-Pelosi-Slotkin agenda is damaging to Michigan families who are struggling to get ahead. We need real leadership in Washington next year help provide relief for Mid-Michigan families.See more [here](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=62337aac6fa809596f0d6749&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1%2Fposts%2F398373665430379&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=ahvNys4OPB9zsvjIZ4KNalC_Ixw%3D).
---
| [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=62337aac6fa809596f0d6749&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1%2Fvideos%2F378660237107021%2F&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=t-BH-Fh-5HVvT0v1Q9BxFZN4zss%3D)
---
#### **Slotkin is Pelosi’s Congresswoman**
In order to get on the ballot for congress, a candidate must get 1,000 valid signatures from voters residing within their district. Elissa Slotkin has claimed that she will be moving to the district to run for this seat, but when she filed her campaign, she used her old Holly, Michigan address - _which is not in Michigan’s 7th district._Elissa Slotkin can’t even legally sign her own petition because she is not a resident of the district she wants to represent. Slotkin continues to show that she is fighting for Nancy Pelosi, not the people of Michigan.See more [here](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=62337aac6fa809596f0d6749&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1%2Fposts%2F406862714581474&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=xRY9MjTai5X0ScHvWdRs2cTHPY8%3D).
---
---
| [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=62337aac6fa809596f0d6749&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbarrettbrigade1%2Fposts%2F406862714581474&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=xRY9MjTai5X0ScHvWdRs2cTHPY8%3D)
---
#### **Return Your Petitions by March 31!**
To everyone who has helped collect signatures to get Tom on the ballot, THANK YOU! We are nearly at our goal and we could not have done it without your help.**NEXT STEPS** If you still are collecting signatures for Tom, please return your completed petitions to the campaign by March 31st. You can reach out to [alec@tombarrettforcongress.com](mailto:alec@tombarrettforcongress.com) to coordinate a time to drop off, or mail, your petitions back to the campaign.
---
|
---
[_ _ DONATE _ _](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=62337aac6fa809596f0d6749&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fdonate-today&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&l=en-US&s=0FZyZUmBFBOuCakqRlDieTdchBI%3D)

name: Jessica Cisneros
subject: SXSW
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JESSICA CISNEROS FOR CONGRESS** ](https://u1584542
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDJSxiYwIObpoERRcxDTs8R7Pd64c4gzFd01MYfYP5LR-ub1Ks_Aqk9-Fd-ejyFQk56A38KwPLIJv7BQE-9SA1mnYXq2pkEVdtuPVFE39zlnVTa05W9DkmdVdjGGz3D4n_pA4mFkMK18aXjGCYIMBYL9py_qghfAv9UEUlsRsD5g5mJrpU28-ceC4dkDMqzW_pjGhrzcUqhsePtiac3liQvXeNF5uL9ERvR7uIM0BYTvoyrfPuzZhw7Qba4tPkcntM7TuuZdt8_546KOeNqQsx/3kf/SppV-zwQSDelqqs6suZ5gA/h0/VtnfGCwa--HQbpYkVXyMGy_LPrFd-qi9bPFWufd0zY0) Hi Peter, it’s Jessica. This past week, I made a pit stop at SXSW’s “Immigration: The Real Story” session in Austin for a discussion about immigration and the border. [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCAkLjj3ihl-4r0dkZLegUEjYjdLg-h5JBhQLwN8WlxBoeuJE_2RM2Wgomilu3KGlB3ui6hXTrEPpUyuf68cp6KFeM4jDrZxztcDCwQzop5wmuTHhKcnAeE2kzDvmT5IOmGutfSCjrIaGnkoZjbVYDVS-nk8-tqDJwyX8SnNKQuCzqqo9DY5etbcmCGT4Bi-3RTO0HjApc04zWjubE-ytW1NeWFzXJM5NN393fy-lndYD-H-xQQmgLI3GIrhNJFtNo38fa6dQc5iKrynbyfNCc4w/3kf/SppV-zwQSDelqqs6suZ5gA/h1/shYYDRloPtqi3FOF8HxN1gkh2C2XjWAzfbCT9XkdKv4) During this session, I talked a lot about my own experiences growing up on the border as the daughter of Mexican American immigrants and as an immigration and human rights attorney. You see, growing up in Laredo, I saw first-hand that the rules of this country weren’t written for everyone. My experience — along with the struggles of my family and neighbors — are what inspired me to become an immigration and human rights attorney in the first place: so I can protect the rights of immigrants. Conservative politicians like Henry Cuellar have turned their backs on immigrants and created a false narrative that paints them as the problem. While Donald Trump was in office, Cuellar voted to fund his border wall _twice_ and was the only Democrat to support extending the amount of time immigrant children could be detained at the border. Here’s the reality: folks who come to the United States are not what’s causing a crisis — the crisis itself is how we’re handling these human lives. It’s time that we bring in new representation to South Texas who will treat our country’s immigration system with compassion and love. **And once I’m elected to Congress,_that’s exactly what I intend to do._** [_**So if you’re with me, will you make a small contribution today to my campaign? The runoff election is just 2 months away, so it’s important that I get all the support I can from grassroots supporters like you.**_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCAkLjj3ihl-4r0dkZLegUEjYjdLg-h5JBhQLwN8WlxBrxrMGLlj4JjAQWqSMwQIzaTRAvhDFaBun971B3_XFZC_aa4NEV-ik6bJi6m02e4mPv6x4iuJ3vw4oSBrmQC_FQ6lNI8GvAi_tWIdwN9N8cfuGrFjFxVfea6POMd51SCjyJzAFfR7a4Gb9Z_ekviGWXMTEp58X4geCuu2sfqDop7pR9tyXjquQYp7Q5P-hJeLX8j9602_iaXabaAYl02j_lrFwmihkvbzQwFbIYsYRh2Q/3kf/SppV-zwQSDelqqs6suZ5gA/h2/JUbnk5jO34jINZ5WhQMu6h7MoIEJsu2ESndcLVqrJGI) [Contribute now »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCAkLjj3ihl-4r0dkZLegUEjYjdLg-h5JBhQLwN8WlxBpl07XxwunIb2sBIaal7Cufc4fbemN83DBLua4gcDs1jWvO9tr6N8jwxqCNYBW1Ca_FRonyZq_36QTMf-DmH0AxzPHFqYPA2nrD-LiyWsATzeCQbjvduqjn8XSM_BQVf90easiNdN0-29hhaf_GX7YjhVkPaskAdIIsC2JKs4-XMWBvOwC8NuuYCtv3TMyTWfIxPVPn5JeHFhocdGme_FnPsI3ZKLnakW6OkWcvS_ysog/3kf/SppV-zwQSDelqqs6suZ5gA/h3/3HncbX6hKIzPO8ppvLkEPFIVKLUqAwSRBZ3bZJMgv34) I’m running for Congress to create a pathway to citizenship for our undocumented people, revamp the visa system, strengthen family reunification, and create a humane border and immigration policy by scrapping disastrous laws like the 1996 Immigration Act that lays the groundwork for the massive deportations that we’re seeing today. We defied expectations in the Democratic primary when we came within just a small margin of defeating Henry Cuellar, despite being outspent by hundreds of thousands of dollars. And together, we are going to prove that a people-powered campaign like ours can take on a far-right Democratic incumbent and win the runoff election on May 24th. [_**Our campaign needs all the help we can get between now and the next 2 months to bring it home — will you contribute any amount you can afford to give today to help me win?**_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCAkLjj3ihl-4r0dkZLegUEjYjdLg-h5JBhQLwN8WlxBom1Oa6MF0e_CfDMDexHyiV2_QmnNpVYVd8mEWahjUfmtvwfI4Hs28i5gGzxr3meyrht-MBKulEdwZPsjYpd25T-p_MtUWTNT1Zn7C5u4zQO3qHmP5GoqFtScE6yM1Z_TAv-RVTx4ZqTqMq34XDiaXrqUMs6Yd_9wX35mUw6JEQKQLGsBFbQSqCuk4QXZ3oqugV9OVR-cRBPVc6Di6RLFbcPPc-6XHtyRo-p-TenXJf_w/3kf/SppV-zwQSDelqqs6suZ5gA/h4/IlSAvQkQ-d7kYFJyFgOVnZftY-hubipIJ-662f3Xzgo) [Contribute now »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCAkLjj3ihl-4r0dkZLegUEjYjdLg-h5JBhQLwN8WlxBpNoUIZwG0J-iXYSrPVSqLtIglYGCgM9VcHynQMGm_5oErOhKdK8IFhxweG45wc3F_MmWiCzYFcxgFSvCD6KctYSwbvp4R2VR0rhHsY0kiPNY1YvFz5T-3iHevLNXEoyfkCJ4trzF3d7r8Wex5OZNjUuGC7qWX-oXRXwOTg704ACONHJ_PnmgaoreHJXzFKyhNqD1elS-uykmvkbYpQTAXzVRZ0flLw073kVZefBgCkkQ/3kf/SppV-zwQSDelqqs6suZ5gA/h5/rjkc3iG4kU-MFVGJ02bGRjbx3Xn56JE-7UcFsrgGMcM) Juntos, Jessica Cisneros

[Donate »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDJSxiYwIObpoERRcxDTs8R7Pd64c4gzFd01MYfYP5LTuikQc-3vpkvxb8jn5WCNnTI0XhxCmKPaH7E7M8o6iUK7Pqei9bvbmfDpARVFda-nCT-moZXk-yvWvsIDqZnXjAnmKt371NVF9obpFGJbca8hvLEaLascjeUKR20qi15Fez51i_9Rzf0VJKTY8rb-GEy8ygPAHSgeutyAHKXBmJYFStkITl23U8jjJk7nB68bqIzS-me5BXmacvVlZfykwKoZRJwYJMVXsxAbSv0Km-/3kf/SppV-zwQSDelqqs6suZ5gA/h6/G_PADMZXjj_06KSEUdQv7SfxWay7a3RVGOAoCQLdU8c) | To give by check:
PO Box 660
Laredo, TX 78042

clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, it’s Jessica. This past week, I made a pit stop at SXSW’s “Immigration: The Real Story” session in Austin for a discussion about immigration and the border. During this session, I talked a lot about my own experiences growing up on the border as the daughter of Mexican American immigrants and as an immigration and human rights attorney. You see, growing up in Laredo, I saw first-hand that the rules of this country weren’t written for everyone. My experience — along with the struggles of my family and neighbors — are what inspired me to become an immigration and human rights attorney in the first place: so I can protect the rights of immigrants. Conservative politicians like Henry Cuellar have turned their backs on immigrants and created a false narrative that paints them as the problem. While Donald Trump was in office, Cuellar voted to fund his border wall twice and was the only Democrat to support extending the amount of time immigrant children could be detained at the border. Here’s the reality: folks who come to the United States are not what’s causing a crisis — the crisis itself is how we’re handling these human lives. It’s time that we bring in new representation to South Texas who will treat our country’s immigration system with compassion and love. And once I’m elected to Congress,that’s exactly what I intend to do. I’m running for Congress to create a pathway to citizenship for our undocumented people, revamp the visa system, strengthen family reunification, and create a humane border and immigration policy by scrapping disastrous laws like the 1996 Immigration Act that lays the groundwork for the massive deportations that we’re seeing today. We defied expectations in the Democratic primary when we came within just a small margin of defeating Henry Cuellar, despite being outspent by hundreds of thousands of dollars. And together, we are going to prove that a people-powered campaign like ours can take on a far-right Democratic incumbent and win the runoff election on May 24th. Juntos, Jessica Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

Next, it’s a match-up between **Senator Mark Kelly of Arizona and New Hampshire Senator Maggie Hassan.** Both are progressive champions that Republicans are desperate to defeat this year. In Arizona, it’s a pure toss-up. The Republican primary is a real race to the bottom as the candidates try to win over Trump supporters and defeat Mark Kelly. In New Hampshire, Republicans are struggling to come up with a challenger, but Maggie Hassan is very vulnerable this year.

In Wisconsin, the incumbent is Ron Johnson, who you may remember called the deadly insurrection a “peaceful protest.” In North Carolina, Republican Richard Burr is retiring, so we have an open seat that is a prime pick-up opportunity for Democrats. What race are you more interested in? Contribute (even $1!) to cast your vote. Your contributions will go to the eventual Democratic nominee in these races. | = | = Finally, we have two wide-open races in Pennsylvania and Ohio in the Republican-held bracket. In Pennsylvania, TV quack “Dr. Oz” has deep pockets that could help him win the primary. And in Ohio, a crowded field of Republicans are tripping over themselves to gain the support of the MAGA mob. So flipping these seats from red to blue is a huge opportunity for Democrats this year. Which race are you watching closely this year? Contribute any amount to cast your vote. Your contributions will go to the eventual Democratic nominee in these races. | = | = We look forward to seeing which candidates and races receive the most contributions! * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. Why would I do anything to defend freedom | No longer want to receive emails from Leora Levy for U.S. Senate? [
](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=125e4cb2e4234e15ad06a2a4e1751afa&_e=sGW7YNLVwCFT5Ja-21ubQzFqe-5cRDeWrUn1hCJuqjmzZRbwkg4tc1Z8WZKtaeedxNuXfLdWrGx1xK39CKgN7NvXm4qFv15Rc6Wkcaz5UFSiNRwuyCxi27t2vazHmZgQ2HKwHRkwWu2_VJ1K7sh8xTU3snfdhMeIifN85Pdap3bzKLNMFpEKNk-qXWyxRDpuhAxUCWSj4rOljJa4LZLHs-cRQbM2A-_zrLUOdacaEKnjtlW0yebLyIgd1vTSpRapTgI9DCZLqq6ZMqxO05fwWy1gPCSSaP1m_3pfpIx9iXcFHIoYp1UC0NwlmI2232yxulfB1nLS5-HhxkEwvRJyx9TaQ9ch83NxD2U7vgQh_U0WymMH1wKJD5rEZ8WtzV3GyZo_Z_NHC8xEhYOjXASm_tQsFXKpZaXZvbQS7grXRr-CBDZujMmbLgkUCP5odIhMFIwNH4NuCThjCBtMu9OchA%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

People often ask me the question of _**why?**_

_Why I’m running for U.S. Senate?_

_Why I care so much about America?_

_Why would I do _anything_ to defend freedom and protect liberty?_

I’ll tell you why, Peter - I know exactly what it’s like when communism comes knocking on your door. **I escaped communist Cuba with my family in 1960.** In 1940 my mother and her parents escaped the Holocaust.

I came to America as a child, filled with hope and many blessings, and I was able to pursue the American dream because of the opportunity and freedom we are promised in this country. **And now that freedom is being threatened by the radical Democrats, it is my absolute duty to protect that very same freedom I was granted many years ago.**

[**If you want to hear more about why I’m running, and why this race is so imperative to restoring our Nation, tap the link to watch below:**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=125e4cb2e4234e15ad06a2a4e1751afa&_e=sGW7YNLVwCFT5Ja-21ubQzFqe-5cRDeWrUn1hCJuqjmzZRbwkg4tc1Z8WZKtaeedxNuXfLdWrGx1xK39CKgN7NvXm4qFv15Rc6Wkcaz5UFSiNRwuyCxi27t2vazHmZgQ2HKwHRkwWu2_VJ1K7sh8xTU3snfdhMeIifN85Pdap3bzKLNMFpEKNk-qXWyxRDpuhAxUCWSj4rOljJa4LZLHs-cRQbM2A-_zrLUOdacaEKnjtlW0yebLyIgd1vTSpRaptyurUbZL28Ebgs6FHnQWlUJs7SPooXWe5BCC4CCXLu7uhnpZaLispMVNn13c2WCVu60zMHuIS0f50yw401No9WFTXKFgNwoYoSlTpHGjnTc8538ZxZZ6A7IflbvpfeoKhvQbsQuDdWV7c3XpUp7pWmp_kZvjz8KX-4tSIeL3jE7MAGALVDzCu2XApTpTzjzCuxgeE0I0qs1srNOn-SQY_w%3D%3D)

[
](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=125e4cb2e4234e15ad06a2a4e1751afa&_e=sGW7YNLVwCFT5Ja-21ubQzFqe-5cRDeWrUn1hCJuqjmzZRbwkg4tc1Z8WZKtaeedxNuXfLdWrGx1xK39CKgN7NvXm4qFv15Rc6Wkcaz5UFSiNRwuyCxi27t2vazHmZgQ2HKwHRkwWu2_VJ1K7sh8xTU3snfdhMeIifN85Pdap3bzKLNMFpEKNk-qXWyxRDpuhAxUCWSj4rOljJa4LZLHs-cRQbM2A-_zrLUOdacaEKnjtlW0yebLyIgd1vTSpRapYqajDJqbACkPf1HCvVQHaxY6Zdiz0DAKEOsWNtds2WJ8McJbST6o4JhZunC5Vcb1UeQg_UR3mMySXVA4p3mKDw5nZMqNz6XO_7s5RG0AAmD10_gDpNHfslzJupWNDF-F6loDwnNUQkDuobJr0HO9XF950MJOt3qaU11wSekvZC9w8kJ3Qjlil8VJ6lhGagQTjX8dQ2rK5vKDX12qBguy9Q%3D%3D)

I know that you don’t need another greedy, self-serving, politician in Washington who tosses out you and your family’s needs when times get rough. _There are plenty of people like that in the Senate already._

What you do need is someone that is going to fight for neighbors, teachers, police officers, firefighters, farmers, parents; the very people that make our nation so great.

[**I have always felt a calling to give back and serve my country.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=125e4cb2e4234e15ad06a2a4e1751afa&_e=sGW7YNLVwCFT5Ja-21ubQzFqe-5cRDeWrUn1hCJuqjmzZRbwkg4tc1Z8WZKtaeedxNuXfLdWrGx1xK39CKgN7NvXm4qFv15Rc6Wkcaz5UFSiNRwuyCxi27t2vazHmZgQ2HKwHRkwWu2_VJ1K7sh8xTU3snfdhMeIifN85Pdap3bzKLNMFpEKNk-qXWyxRDpuhAxUCWSj4rOljJa4LZLHs-cRQbM2A-_zrLUOdacaEKnjtlW0yebLyIgd1vTSpRapOeZqLqy5jAs7-8oohmElKrA2ZgDzsaN6X83VTRDddUwwWphQP_Y4ID0nLXuBGO01JZuov3sAwt79ZIXwhZ6vKPMP0cEES6QNWsh5J8z8JGZk06QzqusYi38ll-CWCwytzlkfeQPEyhg5W_pyfeV853Z3cxe0tpQSCKFqiYJMLLOnupxqYr6G4dnrj5qpAwpNAO6e00GRijpuhZjZhzV4IQ%3D%3D)

If you agree that America needs a fighter, someone who’s not afraid to stand up to the radical ideals that are plaguing this country, [**then I need you to join my team. Every single dollar my campaign raises is a dollar put towards a better future for this country.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=125e4cb2e4234e15ad06a2a4e1751afa&_e=sGW7YNLVwCFT5Ja-21ubQzFqe-5cRDeWrUn1hCJuqjmzZRbwkg4tc1Z8WZKtaeedxNuXfLdWrGx1xK39CKgN7NvXm4qFv15Rc6Wkcaz5UFSiNRwuyCxi27t2vazHmZgQ2HKwHRkwWu2_VJ1K7sh8xTU3snfdhMeIifN85Pdap3bzKLNMFpEKNk-qXWyxRDpuhAxUCWSj4rOljJa4LZLHs-cRQbM2A-_zrLUOdacaEKnjtlW0yebLyIgd1vTSpRapjcjM-c8I8l3KBLv6fK-IV_usaOT1tUItRYp9DWm1clVoLfoWYHoUG4LEG2AAEj2nFcDNrNHQjBbJvAX1KlDKcqdkmW8z0zIf_1x4kYnCUawVgE1zaeLuIa1xPpp69trw9P7ZZDFc01yp1Aj0uo3gHUCE5hIBrr4GT_-CM1pfDHxE1VI62-axcSJr3rX_z5NYApw1lCVwxmY0g9rvtR-gWQ%3D%3D)

So, when people ask me why I’m running for Senate, I will tell them: it’s because I have a responsibility to this country --_a country that granted me the opportunity to have everything I could ever dream of_ -- and it is my greatest honor, and responsibility to ensure everyone has that same opportunity here in America.

I’m running because the current 'leaders' have sold out freedom for their own political gains.

I’m running because at the end of the day, someone must stand up and fight for this country that we love so much. [**I hope I can count on your support.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=125e4cb2e4234e15ad06a2a4e1751afa&_e=sGW7YNLVwCFT5Ja-21ubQzFqe-5cRDeWrUn1hCJuqjmzZRbwkg4tc1Z8WZKtaeedxNuXfLdWrGx1xK39CKgN7NvXm4qFv15Rc6Wkcaz5UFSiNRwuyCxi27t2vazHmZgQ2HKwHRkwWu2_VJ1K7sh8xTU3snfdhMeIifN85Pdap3bzKLNMFpEKNk-qXWyxRDpuhAxUCWSj4rOljJa4LZLHs-cRQbM2A-_zrLUOdacaEKnjtlW0yebLyIgd1vTSpRapEQ4yEHwCZC-RX3k5hKRNkWeikRj6UQ6g1Y-Il5K7X2eL_ZVjnmCrMeiRFWP4qosLTHpMFS-9zrPT0yzgB-8JRNekNPgegJkLmooOf18KBI58TQ59F6Z6SMoNdsoKrk0ndmbZagguorR1GYTDCLb2yowXsesMtP6xEPenkpLTflM_YkDOMJMdCyMhBubO2-zvdHGHOpJVQDF9EtUJF3fG3Q%3D%3D)

For Freedom,
Leora Levy

P.S. If you want to learn more about my story or why I’m running for Senate, [**tap the secure link to watch now.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=125e4cb2e4234e15ad06a2a4e1751afa&_e=sGW7YNLVwCFT5Ja-21ubQzFqe-5cRDeWrUn1hCJuqjmzZRbwkg4tc1Z8WZKtaeedxNuXfLdWrGx1xK39CKgN7NvXm4qFv15Rc6Wkcaz5UFSiNRwuyCxi27t2vazHmZgQ2HKwHRkwWu2_VJ1K7sh8xTU3snfdhMeIifN85Pdap3bzKLNMFpEKNk-qXWyxRDpuhAxUCWSj4rOljJa4LZLHs-cRQbM2A-_zrLUOdacaEKnjtlW0yebLyIgd1vTSpRapmatnU2dJ4j4trT3PRBBMDLt-Evf_75NWKyf-98dy9l8LSFFMdN9Bx68snBQgPZPQIizE0qLUQ0-GtW8jvbVDguPR3dA4PGRjq_XLZIaKT78XlyONucIuHjNpiMnHostIFUQVjB8nWg0IRld79_EW7mkwuANwofqpw4o1iinBzts4aLwYvvYv_eL9oiotBx5xaMZcIlx2QaR6_qFFWsCwLA%3D%3D)

| | **About Leora**
_I am running to take on the far-left whose policies will make our country look more like the Communist Cuba my family and I escaped in 1960 than the United States we have all known and loved. I am running for Senate to lead the fight for freedom. Joe Biden isn't on the ballot in November, but his policies are. The way to beat back Biden is to beat Dick Blumenthal, and I am the conservative candidate who can get it done._

I’ll tell you why, Peter - I know exactly what it’s like when communism comes knocking on your door. I escaped communist Cuba with my family in 1960. In 1940 my mother and her parents escaped the Holocaust. I came to America as a child, filled with hope and many blessings, and I was able to pursue the American dream because of the opportunity and freedom we are promised in this country. And now that freedom is being threatened by the radical Democrats, it is my absolute duty to protect that very same freedom I was granted many years ago. I know that you don’t need another greedy, self-serving, politician in Washington who tosses out you and your family’s needs when times get rough. There are plenty of people like that in the Senate already. What you do need is someone that is going to fight for neighbors, teachers, police officers, firefighters, farmers, parents; the very people that make our nation so great. If you agree that America needs a fighter, someone who’s not afraid to stand up to the radical ideals that are plaguing this country, So, when people ask me why I’m running for Senate, I will tell them: it’s because I have a responsibility to this country --a country that granted me the opportunity to have everything I could ever dream of -- and it is my greatest honor, and responsibility to ensure everyone has that same opportunity here in America. I’m running because the current 'leaders' have sold out freedom for their own political gains. I’m running because at the end of the day, someone must stand up and fight for this country that we love so much. For Freedom, Leora Levy P.S. If you want to learn more about my story or why I’m running for Senate, | | About Leora I am running to take on the far-left whose policies will make our country look more like the Communist Cuba my family and I escaped in 1960 than the United States we have all known and loved. I am running for Senate to lead the fight for freedom. Joe Biden isn't on the ballot in November, but his policies are. The way to beat back Biden is to beat Dick Blumenthal, and I am the conservative candidate who can get it done. | Paid for by Leora Levy for U.S. Senate, Inc. Contributions to Leora Levy for U.S. Senate, Inc. are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. If this is no longer the best way to reach you or you no longer want to receive any emails from Leora Levy for U.S. Senate....

body:
[1]Erica Smith

Can you
believe it? We’re officially two months away from the 2022 Democratic
Primary in North Carolina.

Here’s what I know for sure: We’re the ONLY campaign that can prevent
Sandy Smith and her QAnon allies from representing NC-01 in Congress.

And while Sandy turns to dark money mega-donors — I proudly turn to you.

So, I’m humbly asking: [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/44881?refcode=em20220317-1002&t=1001&akid=1002%2E3698%2EFKJTRt ]Will you chip in $20.22 to help us win this
primary? Every grassroots donation will make the difference in these final
two months.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/44881?refcode=em20220317-1002&t=1020&akid=1002%2E3698%2EFKJTRt ]Donate $20.22

Republicans haven’t represented North Carolina’s 1st District since 1882 —
but redistricting has turned this seat into one of the most competitive in
the country.

Now, far-right extremists like Madison Cawthorn and Roger Stone are
zeroing in on our race and are backing our top GOP opponent, Sandy Smith.

There’s no way I’m letting insurrectionist traitor Sandy Smith be our next
representative — but I can’t do it alone.

I’m running to give working families the representation they deserve in
Congress. That’s why our campaign doesn’t accept a cent from super PACs,
corporations, or the fossil fuel industry. We’re funding this campaign the
right way — by the people.

So please, if you’ve
been waiting for the right moment to support our campaign, today is the

help us win our competitive primary and ensure we have the resources to
overcome the deep-pocketed GOP in November?

Together, we’re going to win this seat, protect our Democratic House
majority, and deliver change for the communities and people that need it
most.

Let’s do this!

Erica

Friend,

I am officially announcing my endorsement of Nathan Dahm for US Senate!

[](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=149808&L=81502&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9kYWhtZm9yc2VuYXRlL2Jtd2FyZA==)
[**(Click here to watch the full endorsement video)**](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=149808&L=81502&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9kYWhtZm9yc2VuYXRlL2Jtd2FyZA==)
Meet Nathan Dahm – The Proven Republican Fighter running for the United States Senate in Oklahoma’s special election.

Why am I endorsing Nathan Dahm?

Nathan Dahm is a liberty warrior who isn’t afraid to fight for our America-First movement, the Constitution, and our rights to live freely. Here are just a few of the reasons Nathan Dahm has my full and total endorsement:

* He stood with me and AGAINST Anthony Fauci’s insanity since day one
* He is a Pro-Life warrior who has taken action to protect the lives of the unborn
* He is a #2A champion that implemented Constitutional Carry in Oklahoma
* He understands the importance of closing our border and making America First again
* He will stand with me in the US Senate to fight for an America-First foreign policy
* He believes in the Bill of Rights and is a strict Constitutionalist

Nathan is a great Senator in Oklahoma and a true patriot. He will serve as one of my greatest allies when he’s elected to the United States Senate.
[**I told Nathan I would help him raise $25,000 when I announced my endorsement. I am asking you to chip in $20.22, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount by clicking here >>>**](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=149808&L=81502&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9kYWhtZm9yc2VuYXRlL2Jtd2FyZA==)
_What’s different about Nathan Dahm?_

Nathan’s record PROVES he is a hardcore constitutional conservative who is not afraid to take on the corrupt Republican Establishment in Oklahoma and WIN.
[](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=149808&L=81502&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9kYWhtZm9yc2VuYXRlL2Jtd2FyZA==) **I am selective with my endorsements.** I do not waste time with Establishment frauds, candidates with zero chance of success, or people who don’t respect and uphold the Constitution.

Nathan Dahm is the Proven Republican FIGHTER we need in the United States Senate.

You and I don’t need anymore do-nothing politicians who sit in Washington quietly, vote with the Establishment 100% of the time, and disrespect the Constitution and the vision of our Founding Fathers.

We need FIGHTERS! Leaders who will stand up for liberty and drain the swamp.

I believe Nathan is a hero of the America-First movement and will become one of your favorite Republican liberty fighters in Washington.

**REMINDER: I promised Nathan I would help him raise $25,000 when I announced my endorsement. I am counting on your help to reach this goal in the next 72 hours. Please donate using one of the links I’ve copied below:**
[**Donate $20.22 >>**](https://for.az.kelliward.com/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=22208987&N=149808&L=81503&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9kYWhtZm9yc2VuYXRlL2Jtd2FyZD9hbW91bnQ9MjAuMjI=)
