clean_body: Nathan Dahm is a liberty warrior who isn’t afraid to fight for our America-First movement, the Constitution, and our rights to live freely. | | | | == | | == Friend, I am officially announcing my endorsement of Nathan Dahm for US Senate! == == Meet Nathan Dahm – The Proven Republican Fighter running for the United States Senate in Oklahoma’s special election. Why am I endorsing Nathan Dahm? Nathan Dahm is a liberty warrior who isn’t afraid to fight for our America-First movement, the Constitution, and our rights to live freely. Here are just a few of the reasons Nathan Dahm has my full and total endorsement: He stood with me and AGAINST Anthony Fauci’s insanity since day one He is a Pro-Life warrior who has taken action to protect the lives of the unborn He is a #2A champion that implemented Constitutional Carry in Oklahoma He understands the importance of closing our border and making America First again He will stand with me in the US Senate to fight for an America-First foreign policy He believes in the Bill of Rights and is a strict Constitutionalist Nathan is a great Senator in Oklahoma and a true patriot. He will serve as one of my greatest allies when he’s elected to the United States Senate. == What’s different about Nathan Dahm? Nathan’s record PROVES he is a hardcore constitutional conservative who is not afraid to take on the corrupt Republican Establishment in Oklahoma and WIN. == I am selective with my endorsements. I do not waste time with Establishment frauds, candidates with zero chance of success, or people who don’t respect and uphold the Constitution. Nathan Dahm is the Proven Republican FIGHTER we need in the United States Senate. You and I don’t need anymore do-nothing politicians who sit in Washington quietly, vote with the Establishment 100% of the time, and disrespect the Constitution and the vision of our Founding Fathers. We need FIGHTERS! Leaders who will stand up for liberty and drain the swamp. I believe Nathan is a hero of the America-First movement and will become one of your favorite Republican liberty fighters in Washington. REMINDER: I promised Nathan I would help him raise $25,000 when I announced my endorsement. I am counting on your help to reach this goal in the next 72 hours. Please donate using one of the links I’ve copied below: = = == == I plan on updating Nathan with a list of new supporters in the next few days. As a personal favor to me, I hope you will make an urgent donation to Nathan’s campaign, so I can add you to that list. Thank you for everything. In liberty, Rand Paul United States Senator | | Dr. Kelli Ward 1990 McCulloch Blvd D-228 Lake Havasu City, AZ 86403 (C)2018 - 2022 , All Rights Reserved PAID FOR BY KELLI WARD | | |

| Fellow American,

In May 2021 I predicted that gas would hit $7/gallon under Sleepy Joe. _Guess what?_ _I was right!_ I hate to say it, but I was right.

**It’s painful to see the STRONG America we build together look so weak on the world stage - but that’s what we get when DEMOCRATS are in charge.**

**I’d like to hear back from you by 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT** so don’t wait – let us know if you want us back in office.

clean_body: | Fellow American, I’ve got one question for you in light of the recent events happening in America and across the world: Do you MISS ME YET? In May 2021 I predicted that gas would hit $7/gallon under Sleepy Joe. Guess what? I was right! I hate to say it, but I was right. It’s painful to see the STRONG America we build together look so weak on the world stage - but that’s what we get when DEMOCRATS are in charge. and the AMERICA FIRST policies my team and I put into place during our FOUR GLORIOUS years in the White House. I’d like to hear back from you by 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT so don’t wait – let us know if you want us back in office. I’d ask my supporters the same question I’m asking you now on Twitter, but Jack DORSEY banned me because he didn’t like what I had to say! Wonder why he hasn’t banned Putin yet ... Thanks for your support, Donald Trump If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. subject: President Biden is sounding the alarm

Friend: If Democrats lose a single Senate seat in November, we'll lose our majority – and _any_ chance of moving our bold agenda forward. With the GOP back in power, our democracy could be threatened like never before.
**But Mitch McConnell and his right-wing allies are doing everything they can to retake Senate control – and the GOP has announced a record-breaking war chest of OVER $41 MILLION to do just that!**
**That's why President Biden is sounding the alarm to rally grassroots folks like YOU to join us in this critical fight to defend the Senate:**

name: James Marter
subject: Friends, A VERY important message...
body:
| [](https://ho941.keap-link009.com/v2/click/9db6af2cff1a449795d9c70ae8199c29/eJyNkEELgkAQhf_LnC1NRcpbSIRYHaLOsaxTLenuMjsGEf731opOBV3nvfke792BUQvNZQ05nM0snUAAhFJZhZoLo1nIp5jE2TRKA2iUvizJdBby-7ffjz5csySLAuCbRe_YbedFVW6Wh1W5qbzTCvIR_2DSSTb9YBbrebmCvv_JxVbx4urRDnKmDoc-tfKdeE_NEMFsXR6GDmVHOBYaa8NjadqwFcRIo6OhkTT6ROhcGEdx7KHCWtT1e48Kby90_wA__Wfb)
---
| Hi Friends, This is a critical time in the campaign and I'm the only one in the race with the tools to unseat Lauren Underwood! No other campaign has put together anything close to what my campaign brings to the table:
1. **Endorsements**
2. **Principled Record**
3. **Grassroots Support**
4. **Campaign Infrastructure**

**Can you help with a financial donation right now? The right candidate winning the primary, will be the #1 factor in flipping this seat.****Your help can put this seat in the win column![Click Here](https://ho941.keap-link012.com/v2/click/bc34a2f772a158c201ec40012a6bbce6/eJyNkMEKwjAQRP9lz9VqrUV7E5FSqh5EzxLSVYNtEjZbQaT_bqqiFwWvO7NvmLkBoxaa8xJSOJlpPIQACKWyCjXPjWYhH-IoSiaDOIBK6XNGprGQ3r79vvXumozGkwD4atE7tpvZvMjX2X6ZrwvvtIJ8xD-YeJh8MIvVLF9C2_7kYq14cfFoBylTg12fUvlOvKOqi2C2Lg1Dh7Ih7AuNpeG-NHVYC2Kk3sFQTxp9JHQujAZR5KHCWtTla48Cr090ewdGDmfi).** Take a closer look and share this information with friends:
1. **I'm****endorsed****by respected experts**. I know how we can lower energy costs, lessen our tax burden, improve our economy and secure our borders. Experts recognize that I'll support policies that increase national security, counter terrorism, improve foreign relations and address the needs in healthcare, education, law and order and homeland security. I'll fight for life, religious liberty, election integrity, human rights and our Constitution. Many of my supporters are front line fighters against the divisive and dangerous policies of the Radical Left. They'll have an ally with me in Congress.

2. **My****record****is a principled one**. One primary opponent has been carrying water for Adam Kinzinger, letting him lie to us all on his radio show. Another acts like he wants to join the House Freedom Caucus then "blasts" House Freedom Caucus Member, Mary Miller for endorsing me! Others may represent whoever hands them the biggest check. Not me. I'm running to represent _YOU_ in Congress!

3. **The****grassroots****support Marter for Congress**. I just released dozens more personal endorsements by leaders, influencers, precinct committeeman and elected officials. People committed to making a difference are joining my fight to flip this seat. I've built this support by opposing the most harmful elements within our own party, like current China lobbyist Mark Kirk and the Republican-hating Adam Kinzinger. People KNOW with certainty: I'll do what I say.
4. **My campaign "infrastructure" is necessary to win** and only I have it. I'm currently the Kendall County GOP Chairman, a county entirely in the new 14th District. I'm also the Deputy of the 14th Congressional District on the GOP State Central Committee and a local elected official in my home town of Oswego. Instead of pockets of support, I have layers and layers, at all levels, to help reach the voting public.

**You can't win this seat without these components and only I have them.** The Underwood Campaign has responded to my campaign alone, for calling her out on the issues. They know I'm her biggest threat and now her friends in the media are joining in. **Can I depend on you to help me get my message out so we can reverse the failures of the Democrats' policies?**
---
| | [Yes Jim! I want to help Flip IL 14!](https://ho941.keap-link004.com/v2/click/33e2f39609db17163c78c3b7ea8551a3/eJyNkMEKwjAQRP9lz9VqW4v2VkSkVD2IniWkqwbbJGy2gkj_3VTFk4LXndk3zNyBUQvNRQUZnM0sGUMAhFJZhZrnRrOQTzGO0ukoCaBW-rIk01rI7t9-P3p_TeNJGgDfLHrHbpvPy2KzPKyKTemdVpCP-AeTjNPpB7NY58UKuu4nFxvFi6tHO8iYWuz7VMp34j3VfQSzdVkYOpQt4VBorAwPpWnCRhAjDY6GBtLoE6FzYTSKIg8V1qKu3nuUeHuhuwdEUmfg)
---
| **With your support _right now_ , we can make sure we don't repeat the previous mistakes and send someone who will lose in the General Election!** **We're approaching a crucial end-of-quarter-deadline.** **Please be as generous and sacrificial as you can.** **There is so much at stake!** I'm grateful for your support. Let's win this! Jim
---
| | | **James Marter**
Republican for Congress
info@marter4congress.us
(815) 585-8006 | #ReplaceUnderwood
[www.marter4congress.us](http://www.marter4congress.us)

| Peter,

My opponent has made no effort to hide who her allies are. First she supported the campaign of her former field director, who was one of the Jan. 6 insurrectionists, then she received thousands of dollars in campaign contributions from people who participated in a concerted effort to overturn a free and fair election.

[_**If you’re able, I hope you will contribute today to ensure I have the resources to defend my seat against this extremism.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43087499/335648298/-1220490354?refcode=BLU-SWC-20220317-z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDgzZDUwZS00M2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RwIuG7KWbuFI8sNbEPKy7W0KskovNS4qkO4FiegeQn4=)

**Now Scheller is appearing at fundraising events alongside Lauren Boebert,** who you might know from her work spreading misinformation about the coronavirus pandemic, promoting conspiracy theories about a stolen election, and most recently heckling President Joe Biden during his State of the Union address while he was talking about his dead son, Beau.

It is all too clear the kind of company Lisa Scheller keeps. **She is too extreme for Pennsylvania and too dangerous for Congress.**

I defeated her in one of the closest House races in the country in 2020 and I know I can do it again this year — as long as I have support from people like you. First she supported the campaign of her former field director, who was one of the Jan. 6 insurrectionists, then she received thousands of dollars in campaign contributions from people who participated in a concerted effort to overturn a free and fair election. = | = Now Scheller is appearing at fundraising events alongside Lauren Boebert, who you might know from her work spreading misinformation about the coronavirus pandemic, promoting conspiracy theories about a stolen election, and most recently heckling President Joe Biden during his State of the Union address while he was talking about his dead son, Beau. It is all too clear the kind of company Lisa Scheller keeps. She is too extreme for Pennsylvania and too dangerous for Congress. I defeated her in one of the closest House races in the country in 2020 and I know I can do it again this year — as long as I have support from people like you. = | | | = | = | = | = | = With gratitude, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. name: Tim Ryan
subject: $5 for 5 reasons
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43087681/335649230/1918576256?refcode=EM_FR_220317RyanGrassroots_N_TR_90DO_8_NG_TESTA_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWQ3NDdlNS00M2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sclxFiVQo1b0GMyYUpPbMQil3nNzJL01dkgAahYpKKY=) Peter — [**_I’m about to ask you to chip in $10 toward Shontel Brown's and my grassroots campaigns._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43087682/335649231/1918576256?refcode=EM_FR_220317RyanGrassroots_N_TR_90DO_8_NG_TESTA_l1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWQ3NDdlNS00M2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sclxFiVQo1b0GMyYUpPbMQil3nNzJL01dkgAahYpKKY=) But first, I want to tell you why I’m confident we can prove the skeptics wrong and win this battleground race.
1. **Republican Senator Rob Portman is retiring, leaving Ohio’s Senate seat wide open.** Republicans are fighting it out in a messy and expensive primary—giving us a stronger chance of flipping this seat blue.
2. **Ohio already has a Democratic Senator.** Sherrod Brown has proven that Ohioans want to elect a Senator who puts workers first.
3. **A recent poll has me within single digits of my Republican opponents.** It’s still early in the race, and the more we get our message out, the more voters we’ll win over.
4. **Working people are fed up and ready for change.** I’ve been traveling all over the state, and Ohioans are sick of handouts for big corporations and billionaires—they want good-paying jobs, health care they can afford, and a fair shot for their kids to succeed.
5. **We have grassroots momentum.** While my rich Republican opponents are propping up their campaigns with millions of their own dollars, we’re powered by folks who chip in $5, $25, or $100 at a time.

So, Peter, we have a real path to winning this race—but it will take everything we have to pull it off.

[**_Here’s my ask: Will you split $10 or more between Shontel Brown and me to help us keep up our grassroots energy and hit our fundraising goals?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43087683/335649232/1918576256?refcode=EM_FR_220317RyanGrassroots_N_TR_90DO_8_NG_TESTA_l2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWQ3NDdlNS00M2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sclxFiVQo1b0GMyYUpPbMQil3nNzJL01dkgAahYpKKY=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43087684/335649233/1918576256?refcode=EM_FR_220317RyanGrassroots_N_TR_90DO_8_NG_TESTA_b1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWQ3NDdlNS00M2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sclxFiVQo1b0GMyYUpPbMQil3nNzJL01dkgAahYpKKY=) Together, I know we can get this done.

—Tim | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**

name: Fetterman for U.S. Senate
subject: Sprinting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Today marks two months until the primary election.
#
Derek,
Today marks just **two months** until our primary election.
That means we have:
2️⃣ months to reach as many PA voters as possible.
2️⃣ months left to keep our ads on the air.
2️⃣ months to grow this movement to record-breaking volumes.
2️⃣ months to sprint through the finish line and win this primary.
Can you help John and our team get it done?
[**_We can’t do it without you, Derek. Can you make your first donation of $5 right now to help us sprint through the finish line and win this primary?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45424?amount=5&refcode=em20220317-5013&t=1&akid=5013%2E434096%2Ev748NP)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45424?amount=5&refcode=em20220317-5013&t=20&akid=5013%2E434096%2Ev748NP)**
We know our message of progress, hope, and determination speaks to the people of PA — just like it has in every county John + Gisele have visited on this campaign. The polls prove it, our petitioning results prove it, and the size of our grassroots movement prove it: **John is the only candidate who can beat the GOP + their money machine in November.**
**[That’s why it’s so important that you make a donation of $5 today so we can sprint through the finish line in May and carry our momentum to November.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45424?amount=5&refcode=em20220317-5013&t=21&akid=5013%2E434096%2Ev748NP)**
Thank you for your constant support and enthusiasm as we enter the last two months before the primary. Let’s win this, together.
—John Fetterman for U.S. Senate
P.S. Not only is our primary in two months from today, but our last quarterly public FEC filing deadline before the primary is in less than two weeks. Pundits, our opponents, and the GOP super PACs will be watching our numbers to see the strength of our movement. We can’t afford to slow down — **[can you rush a donation today to help us end the quarter as strong as possible?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/45424?refcode=em20220317-5013&t=22&akid=5013%2E434096%2Ev748NP)**

name: Team Maggie
subject: Why this matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Let us take just a moment to explain why this race matters.
| | | Look, we know you've heard from our team a lot recently, but this is really important for you — one of our top supporters — to hear. You see, we're falling short of our daily fundraising goal. And, our team really relies on these daily fundraising goals to ensure that we have the resources needed to win in a swing state like New Hampshire.

Let us take just a moment to explain why this race matters. We know that the GOP only needs one seat to take back the Senate majority, and with the millions they're spending against Senator Hassan, it's clear that she's their top target.

**This race is _already_ close, so we can’t afford to fall behind: A poll shows Maggie statistically tied with her Republican opponent, and her race was moved to toss-up status. **

Losing in New Hampshire means losing the Senate majority, and we can't let that happen. **That's why your grassroots support matters so much.**

[**Please, if defending the Senate and protecting Senator Hassan's seat matters to you, will you donate $5 now to get us back on track with our fundraising?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43087845/335649891/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=mh-jtk779-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjQ0MTE5OC00NGE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9BF031nTEVMn17hlxqCT4WSelvdbKLx9rrbVOZ8atg8=)

We'd be so grateful.
— Team Maggie

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: BREAKING: I’m calling for President Biden to take these executive actions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
These actions would lower health care costs, cancel federal student loan debt, expand worker power, raise wages, advance immigrants’ rights, combat the climate crisis, and so much more.
#
Peter,
Over the past year, Democrats in Congress and the White House have worked to not only recover from the pandemic and Trump years, but to deliver greater equity and economic security for people across the country. Tremendous progress has been made, but that work is far from done.
**That’s why the Congressional Progressive Caucus, which I proudly Chair, released a list of executive actions President Biden can and should take right away to deliver for our families, our communities, and our planet.**
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10945?refcode=em20220317-1113&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1113%2E420207%2E1WKBz1)
These executive actions would activate agencies across the federal government to **lower health care costs, cancel federal student loan debt, expand worker power, raise wages, advance immigrants’ rights, combat the climate crisis,** and so much more.
[**Democrats must use all the tools available to affect change for the people — that means legislation _and_ executive action. President Biden must use his executive power to effect change. If you’re with me and ready to see Democrats deliver major victories for the people, please chip in $3 now to fuel my calls for action.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10945?refcode=em20220317-1113&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1113%2E420207%2E1WKBz1)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10945?refcode=em20220317-1113&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1113%2E420207%2E1WKBz1)**
If President Biden takes the actions we’re recommending, here are just some of the positive outcomes we'll see:
* 38 million people will pay less money for their prescription drugs
* 43 million borrowers will be relieved of the heavy burden of student loan debt
* Millions of workers will get a raise after we increase the overtime eligibility threshold
* Millions of workers will get paid sick leave and vacation time
* Immigrants coming from countries in crisis will immediately be offered refuge
* Reducing mass incarceration and stopping the expansion of private prisons for immigrant detention
* Closing loopholes to make sure Wall Street is paying their fair share of taxes
* Investments in clean energy, clean air, and clean water to save lives and our planet

There is so much we can do right now to help families struggling to pay their bills and crises that threaten our communities and our planet.
[**Help fuel our work to make these executive actions a reality with a contribution today. We can only do this with all of your support — and together, we WILL deliver for the people! Can you chip in?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10945?refcode=em20220317-1113&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1113%2E420207%2E1WKBz1)
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/10945?refcode=em20220317-1113&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=1113%2E420207%2E1WKBz1)**

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220317-1113-footer&t=24&refcode2=1113_420207_1WKBz1&akid=1113%2E420207%2E1WKBz1)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=25&akid=1113%2E420207%2E1WKBz1)

body:
Let's stop them |

---
| | Dear ,
They can feel the heat and now they are going crazy. They want me in jail.

**[Can you believe it?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=cca8948b7c&e=44b8c466b0)**

The media is so scared of the success of the election integrity movement they are lying their way through accusations of TREASON.

Yes, Treason.

Apparently, wanting free and fair elections for all is TREASON!
_There is a word for someone who tries overturn the outcome of a duly certified election, but it is not “patriot.”_

_It’s traitor._
**This comes from an assassination piece written by AZ Central.**

Don’t get me wrong, I could fill a bathtub with all the lies and attacks they’ve written about me. But this crosses a line.

**I am Pro America. Period.**

**I am Pro Elections. Period.**

**_And Donald Trump won the election in Arizona in 2020. Period._**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f01fe8c60a&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| How long can we stand for this?

They further “report”:

_The other group of fake electors, headed by Arizona GOP Chairwoman Kelli Ward, has also avoided any real trouble, although Ward, Arizona state Rep. Mark Finchem and a few others have been subpoenaed by the Select Committee to Investigate the January 6th Attack on the United States Capitol._

_There's a word for them. It's not 'patriot'_

_So far, the only people who have paid a price for the post-election coup attempts and the aftermath of the Jan. 6 insurrection are the taxpayers footing the bills for all of the investigations and court cases._

_In other words, us._

_The post-election legal challenges that made outrageous, unproven claims about voter fraud were tossed by judges again and again._

_The sham election audit conducted in Arizona by the Cyber Ninjas, at the behest of Republican state Senate President Karen Fann, has been thoroughly debunked and disproven, another enormous waste of money._

**Apparently, investigating irredeemably compromised elections is “treason.”**

No surprise from the same people who want to Defund the Police and let illegal immigrants invade our border.

_This is one clear and consistent theme. The Left does not care about the integrity of America. They want open borders and rigged elections. This is the only way they can stay in power._

**But enough is enough.**

[We have our end of quarter deadline in just two weeks and we HAVE to raise at least $52,000 to reach our end of quarter goal.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3c698137ed&e=44b8c466b0) This is what it takes to fight against those who would call real Patriots traitors.

[_Can you help me with a generous donation today? We have to reach our goal!_

_Donate $25, $50, $100, or $250 and we can knock this goal out of the park and make sure Arizona is the GOLD STANDARD of Election Integrity!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4fa0eaed7f&e=44b8c466b0)

Thank you for your support!
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=dac611004c&e=44b8c466b0)

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Fifteen Minutes
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
I know that doesn’t sound like an extraordinary amount of time.
#
Peter–
I have 15 minutes of free time in my schedule today. I know that doesn’t sound like much, but with a job like mine a lot can happen in 15 minutes.
With this time, I want to tell you about what’s at stake this year, and ask you to split a donation between me, Catherine Cortez Masto, Maggie Hassan, Raphael Warnock, and Patty Murray. Each of our races are critical to control of the Senate.
If you’ve already heard enough, you can make a donation using this link: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-220317-core-four](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43088216/335651906/-1843018560?refcode=pm_em_220317_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTkxYjRmZC00NWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=50fK9QhH_Sd-OzGijd1_HY4glkz3mIYinZusb01bPE4=)**
If you haven’t, let me explain: Catherine, Maggie, Raphael, and I each won our previous elections in large part because we ran the biggest grassroots campaigns our states had ever seen. Millions of people were a part of them.
But now all of us have a new mission: Re-election. If a single one of us loses, Mitch McConnell will be Senate Majority Leader again.
And right now, polls in Arizona, Nevada, New Hampshire, and Georgia are really tight. Millions of dollars in attack ads are already running in our states, and CNN has repeatedly named us in its lists of the most likely seats to flip in 2022.
If we’re going to win again, it’s going to take a similar level of grassroots support from people like you.
So please:
**[Will you chip in $5 to help us hold control of the Senate? We can’t win without your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43088217/335651907/-1843018560?refcode=pm_em_220317_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTkxYjRmZC00NWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=50fK9QhH_Sd-OzGijd1_HY4glkz3mIYinZusb01bPE4=)**
Thank you again. For everything.
Mark Kelly

**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43088218/335651908/-1843018560?refcode=pm_em_220317_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTkxYjRmZC00NWE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=50fK9QhH_Sd-OzGijd1_HY4glkz3mIYinZusb01bPE4=)**

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *
PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

Hello,
Right now, Ukrainians are bravely defending their country with Iowa-made weapons. Russian armored columns are getting stopped in their tracks with American Javelin missiles – crucial parts of which are made right here in Iowa.
**But if it were up to Donald Trump, Ukraine would be on its own against his pal Putin – still waiting for American military aid until President Zelensky agreed to open a sham investigation into Joe Biden.**
And my opponent Chuck Grassley was one of 52 Republican senators who chose blind loyalty to Trump over helping Ukraine defend itself against Russia.
When I defeat Chuck Grassely this November, I will be the most senior military person ever-elected to the Senate. I understand the real threat Russia poses and the importance of NATO, and I’ll ensure Iowa continues to help Ukraine against Putin’s war-crime invasion.
If our campaign is successful in turning Iowa blue, Democrats are guaranteed to hold onto our majority in the Senate. But the polls are showing a very close race, and McConnell’s Super PACs are about to spend millions against me.
**We need to raise $20,000 before midnight tonight, and right now we’re still falling short. The only way we’ll defeat Chuck Grassley and protect our Senate majority is if grassroots donors like you give right now:**

In recent weeks, millions of Americans have depended on the USPS to ship COVID-19 tests provided by the Biden administration to keep them and their families safe. But this critical public service was thrown under the bus by the Trump administration.
**FIRST:** Trump BLOCKED USPS funding in the middle of the pandemic and handpicked the Board of Governors who selected Trump megadonor Louis DeJoy to be postmaster general.
**THEN: ** DeJoy started cutting USPS hours and facilities – delaying the delivery of Medicare prescriptions, Social Security benefits and groceries.
**NOW:****DeJoy is at it again, this time enacting plans that reduce post office hours, increase prices and MASSIVELY slow down deliveries – including of the Biden administration's free COVID-19 tests, a key part of our country's pandemic response.**

clean_body: Friend – did you see our urgent poll? The postmaster general, Trump lackey Louis DeJoy, is sabotaging the U.S. Postal Service, and, because we need to know what you think, we are EXTENDING the poll. Americans count on the USPS to deliver critical supplies – from Social Security checks to free COVID-19 tests. But DeJoy is sabotaging the delivery system for both, and you haven't let us know what you think about it. Our EXTENDED poll closes at midnight tonight, so please, let us know immediately: SHOULD LOUIS DEJOY BE REMOVED AS POSTMASTER GENERAL? | | | | Thank you for your response, friend. – Lopez Polling Team \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: USPS Alert Date: Wed, March 16, 2022 Subject: Feedback form for dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | | | BREAKING: TRUMP MEGADONOR AND POSTMASTER GENERAL LOUIS DEJOY SABOTAGING USPS, LEADING TO SLOW DELIVERY OF COVID-19 TESTS SHOULD LOUIS DEJOY BE REMOVED AS POSTMASTER GENERAL? | | | | Deadline: 11:59 p.m. | Completion rate in 18326 : 99.01% Friend, the U.S. Postal Service is a critical public service, delivering everything from daily mail to lifesaving medical supplies. But this critical public service was thrown under the bus by the Trump administration. FIRST: Trump BLOCKED USPS funding in the middle of the pandemic and handpicked the Board of Governors who selected Trump megadonor Louis DeJoy to be postmaster general. THEN: DeJoy started cutting USPS hours and facilities – delaying the delivery of Medicare prescriptions, Social Security benefits and groceries. NOW:DeJoy is at it again, this time enacting plans that reduce post office hours, increase prices and MASSIVELY slow down deliveries – including of the Biden administration's free COVID-19 tests, a key part of our country's pandemic response. We need action NOW to remove DeJoy and save the Postal Service. But we can't stop him without grassroots support, so we need to hear from 54 more people in 18326 by midnight tonight. name: Team Nikki
subject: Check this out, Peter!
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter,

Last summer, Nikki launched this campaign to bring something new to Florida — to put an end to DeSantis’ authoritarian regime and start focusing on the issues that matter most to Floridians, from rebuilding a strong economy to fighting climate change.

Every day, people across Florida are making it clear that they’re ready for something new. And every day, our momentum is growing. So far, we’ve earned endorsements from A TON of Florida leaders and organizations who know that Nikki is the right person to bring something new to our state.

And today, we’re asking you to join all of the community leaders, local officials, and change-makers who are standing with Nikki and help us keep up our momentum. Click here to chip in $10 today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?refcode=309endorsements]

We’re so grateful to have the support of the people who know Florida best — the people who have fought for years to make our lives better and move our state in the right direction.

But, ultimately, the support that matters most is yours, Peter. If you’re ready for something new, click here to stand with Nikki and chip in $10 today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?refcode=309endorsements]

Thank you for your support.

— Team Nikki

Friends, Congressman Tom McClintock may have run for the hills when this district became purple, but he’s still trying to tip the scales. **McClintock just announced he’s endorsing Sheriff Scott Jones****** — _aka the “mini-Trump” of Sacramento_ — to replace him in Congress. McClintock isn’t the first pro-Trump congressman to endorse Sheriff Jones — he already has the support of Representatives Doug LaMalfa and Darrell Issa, who **both voted against certifying the 2020 election** hours after the January 6 attack on the Capitol. name: Casey Wardynski
subject: Ending the Biden Border Crisis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CASEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
President Biden is failing America at the border. Read more >>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/6904bab0076fc57a/491f1987c12d8ad8c3d6b838967d376c/36963)
---
Peter, When I served as the Assistant Secretary of the Army for President Trump, I worked tirelessly to help secure our southern border. In fact, my office changed the hiring rules and got boots on the ground in record time to start construction. By making America First a priority, we were able to secure 450 miles of the border. **On Day One in Congress, I will propose a bill to finish the job.**** ** Under President Biden, there is a crisis at our southern border. By refusing to secure the border, we are putting our national security at risk by allowing criminals to cross into America undeterred. Coyotes are putting lives at risk, drug and human trafficking is rampant, and we’ve tied the hands of border agents to do their jobs. I am 100% committed to securing our border and ENDING Biden’s Border Crisis, but I can’t do it without you. Please [**rush a donation now**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8d038be997897f30041ad8cde91a9694/36963/6904bab0076fc57a/e555049521555c59c3d6b838967d376c/36963) to help me win this race, and get to work securing the border on Day One.

name: Team Booker
subject: 2 months until Primary Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

🗓️ In exactly two months from today — May 17, 2022 — our campaign will
face its first big election year milestone: Kentucky’s Democratic Party
primary election.

🗓️ What’s more, the deadline to register to vote in this primary election
is in exactly one month and one day from today — April 18, 2022.

These two critical dates coming up just around the corner are incredibly
important to the success of our movement and Charles’ candidacy.

Registering as many voters as we can is especially important in Kentucky,
where voter turnout can make or break the results of a race. And the
outcome from the primary election will determine once and for all if
Charles will face Rand Paul in November and change the course of
leadership in our Commonwealth.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220317?refcode=em20220317-1660&t=1001&refcode2=1660_346206_UbyKOb&akid=1660%2E346206%2EUbyKOb ]Lexington Herald Leader
[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220317?refcode=em20220317-1660&t=1002&refcode2=1660_346206_UbyKOb&akid=1660%2E346206%2EUbyKOb ]KY Republicans are closing the voter registration gap. How will it
change elections?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220317?refcode=em20220317-1660&amounts=5.17&t=1003&refcode2=1660_346206_UbyKOb&akid=1660%2E346206%2EUbyKOb ]No matter what, we need to bring our A-game over the next two months.
That’s why we’re asking you today,
Peter. Will you please chip in
$5.17 (or more) so we can be ready to tackle anything and everything
between now and Primary Day on May 17?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220317?refcode=em20220317-1660&amount=5.17&t=1022&refcode2=1660_346206_UbyKOb&akid=1660%2E346206%2EUbyKOb ]Contribute $5.17 →

Kentucky is hungry for the bold, progressive vision that Charles Booker is
fighting for this election. From passing Medicare for All to electing a
Senator that understands firsthand what it’s like to stand in the
unemployment line — we have a historic opportunity to enact meaningful
change and center everyday people in our politics.

But it’s critical we continue growing this momentum leading up to the
election. We need to make sure we have the grassroots power to overcome
Rand’s dark money, spread our progressive message, and get voters
registered and out to the polls to vote. And we now only have two more
months to do it.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220317?refcode=em20220317-1660&t=1023&refcode2=1660_346206_UbyKOb&akid=1660%2E346206%2EUbyKOb ]If you’re ready like we’re ready to rise up in this fight and push
hard for the next two months to send Charles to the U.S. Senate, can we
count on you to rush a $5.17 donation right now to our campaign?

Remember, the deadline to register voters in Kentucky is on April 18 — and
the primary election is on May 17, so we haven’t got much time left.
Please chip in $5.17, $5, or anything you can.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220317?refcode=em20220317-1660&amount=5.17&t=1024&refcode2=1660_346206_UbyKOb&akid=1660%2E346206%2EUbyKOb ]Contribute $5.17 →

More soon,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220317-1660-footer&t=1025&refcode2=1660_346206_UbyKOb&akid=1660%2E346206%2EUbyKOb

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1660%2E346206%2EUbyKOb

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

clean_body: | | | Things will get very bad if the GOP wins back Congress | | | Team, did you see the extreme far-right platform a major GOP leader unveiled this week? | ?linkid=2&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-over-70-election-bills-have-been-filed-in-az-2&emailreferrer=email1454490_subject1922495&emailsubject=gop-releases-far-right-platform-for-if-they-win-back-congress This proposal is truly unbelievable. Buried within run-on sentences where every GOP buzzword is used is a very, very dangerous proposal to end all federal laws after 5 years. That means if Republicans take control of Congress, they will pass a law that sunsets everything not in the Constitution in 2028. Take a minute and think about what that means Republicans will be repealing. Let’s take a quick look at what the GOP wants to repeal in five short years. The Civil Rights Act Americans with Disabilities Act Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security Voting Rights Act and too many more to list. Team, this platform is one of the most extreme proposals the GOP has ever put out. Rest assured that if they win back control of Congress, they will pass these initiatives. We can’t let that happen. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Sincerely, Arizona Dems For up-to-date COVID-19 information and guidance, visit ** Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. body:

name: Ryan McLaren, Welch for Vermont
subject: Building the type of grassroots coalition that wins a Senate seat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Things are sure to pick up steam from here on out.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=136%2E61531%2EHcQJLb)
Hello,
I’ll keep this short. [**Can you donate $15 right away to help win in Vermont and protect our Senate majority?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1536?t=3&akid=136%2E61531%2EHcQJLb)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

---
| [$3](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1536?t=14&amount=3&akid=136%2E61531%2EHcQJLb)
---
| [$15](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1536?t=16&amount=15&akid=136%2E61531%2EHcQJLb)
---
| [$28](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1536?t=18&amount=28&akid=136%2E61531%2EHcQJLb)
---
| [$50](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1536?t=20&amount=50&akid=136%2E61531%2EHcQJLb)
---
| [$100](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1536?t=10&amount=100&akid=136%2E61531%2EHcQJLb)
---
| [OTHER](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1536?t=12&akid=136%2E61531%2EHcQJLb)
---

---
Already this month, we’ve seen Senate Republicans identify Vermont as a seat they’ll target—and we have to be prepared.
Peter is the best candidate to fill this seat. We need his leadership and progressive values in the Senate, but that doesn’t guarantee that we’ll come out ahead. Excellent progressive candidates have been defeated at the polls by deep-pocketed conservatives in the past, and we’re doing all we can to ensure that doesn’t happen with this race.
We’re not just looking to meet this month’s fundraising goal. We’re hoping to eclipse it—because that’s how you build the type of grassroots coalition that wins a Senate seat. And we’ve got a much better shot at doing that with support from folks like you spread throughout the month, not just in the days approaching the deadline.
[**In order to hold off Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans, the earlier we can build our momentum, the better. So, please continue investing in Peter’s Senate campaign by pitching in $15 or anything else you can give right away.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1536?t=7&akid=136%2E61531%2EHcQJLb)
Thank you!
Ryan
Campaign Manager, Team Welch

---
| [DONATE ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pwfv-em-22mar?refcode=em_20220317_f_r_mm3&refcode2=136_61531_HcQJLb&akid=136%2E61531%2EHcQJLb)
---

---

name: Team Slotkin
subject: Elissa’s brand of leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220317&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220317&amount=28]
Team,
Some elected officials always seem to be in the spotlight. Maybe they’re yelling on the House floor (empty of everyone but TV cameras), tweeting something provocative to dominate a news cycle, shouting during the State of the Union, launching a personal campaign against the President, or even picking a fight with another member on the Capitol steps. Lately, it seems all too common for a member of Congress to generate headlines for something truly ridiculous.
That’s never been Elissa’s style. She believes that hard work gets results. Showing off, playing games, or scoring cheap political points does not.
Putting your nose to the grindstone and getting things done isn’t always flashy and it won’t always trend on Twitter. But it is how tangible, pragmatic solutions to our toughest problems are often made.
Elissa’s heading into the toughest House race in Michigan, and one of the toughest in the entire country. If you’re interested in seeing Elissa’s type of leadership remain in Congress, consider making a contribution below to help her keep working on the issues that actually matter to Michigan’s families.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220317&amount=28]

subject: TODAY is the LAST DAY to sign Tanya's ballot petition online!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Tanya for Arizona
body:
Sign Tanya's petition today to show the Democrats that we mean business. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/91fd6049658d/team-tanya-alert-former-senator-jon-kyl-endorses-tanya-wheeless-6801017?e=bd2b55b0e3)
---
| | |
---
| | | Hi friend,

**Today is the _LAST DAY_ to sign Tanya's petition to help her qualify for the ballot and show Greg Stanton and the DCCC that we mean business.**

We need your help!

**If you haven't signed Tanya's petition yet, you can sign it [HERE](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=25bc514d48&e=bd2b55b0e3).** Please forward this email to friends, family, and neighbors and ask them to sign as well.

If the website doesn't allow you to sign online, **NO SWEAT**. That just might mean you are in the new district and can only sign a paper petition.

If you aren't sure if you live in Tanya's district and need to sign a paper petition, you can check [HERE](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=899ac6d804&e=bd2b55b0e3). If you are in CD4, you can sign a paper petition. If that is the case, just hit reply and let our team know and we can coordinate a time to stop by and let you sign the petition.

If you have any questions about petitions, reach out to our team by replying to this email or texting or calling us at 480-420-7822.

Let's win this!

Thanks,
Team Tanya
---

name: V. Demings
subject: the GOP is stacking the cards against me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Please, let me explain
| | |
---
I'm worried, friend. With hours left to meet tonight's fundraising goal, **I'm still falling $7,481 short.** Please, let me explain why this is such a dire moment:
**I'm neck and neck with Marco Rubio in the race that will determine Senate control, and****CNN contributors like James Carville have "zero doubt" that I CAN win.**
The problem is that the GOP is stacking the cards against me because they KNOW this race is Democrats' best chance to expand our Senate majority. Far-right outside groups are dumping millions into Florida, and the chair of the RNC just attacked me _personally._
**I'm looking at my fundraising numbers now, and I won't be able to defend myself from these GOP attacks if I don't reach my goal in the next few hours.**
**[Missing this goal and falling behind in this race could mean handing the Senate right back to Mitch McConnell, so I have to ask: Will you donate $5 right now to help me defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43089138/335656004/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2664-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDZmZDlmOS00Y2E2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=evPQ1qT4LzPlNLKza3EV90uP9hF59Vl9c6RZyMdCzdA=)**

clean_body: Jane Timken needs your help now! | Friend, We’re not going to keep you, but here are the facts: ● Jane Timken has less than 50 days until her election day and still is running low on resources to ensure a victory for President Trump’s America First Agenda. ● Her opponents are looking for ways to attack her in the days leading up to the election and she needs to ensure she has the ability to fight back. ● ANY DONATION MADE TODAY WILL GO DIRECTLY TO STOPPING THOSE ATTACKS AND SECURING A VICTORY FOR THE AMERICA FIRST AGENDA! | | We’re counting on you to get Jane over the hump and secure a HUGE VICTORY FOR OHIO AND AMERICA. | | | | | Thank you for stepping up when Jane and our campaign need it most! subject: Miss me yet?

body:
| Peter,

I’ve got one question for you in light of the recent events happening in America and across the world: **_ Do you MISS ME YET? _**

In May 2021 I predicted that gas would hit $7/gallon under Sleepy Joe. _Guess what?_ _I was right!_ I hate to say it, but I was right.

**It’s painful to see the STRONG America we build together look so weak on the world stage - but that’s what we get when DEMOCRATS are in charge.**

[**< < MISS ME YET? LET ME KNOW >>**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=ca591f43ec204b40915ff485d24a26b9&_e=gutiQPmHxYNMsC2qEJNHKdrLSaf1Lk_AVx_31BPjj_-Gw03ldFY-hLWZLmf8rftmxcmThzkNV31_yIS5j-T_zUgEPsTnsjUdAo94Edy7JFVVUrXhG5vC1xhEXLd2fQOqiygpMQxrzGq2csGiqSxVmRJ4mir7CcFL-C4oMZJowevdxjM_LG2X3ksi6PWjYvyv9HvkinMoHEqaUWobXrxdMdi1VanYhGC0XX02GWsa2cQMlqDsFEMLpFHrFqGc5zIE3Qc2kenYtkmSieTqV9Z_k3GmeICjVYuaEho-21iqDzAZ3w5MkA-xCfA9tA3qxGOmDZQGZTCI1cHxS6nGXDlYOUPKZtpg8KSqrz9tAaoGafL52ap1jhPSXbouw738pGPyQflPiCxVlHWTexm2tbZDT3zMMDdKVsEQj72nLZbPZt0HK-VSnbaYAXl-6yrs-M1Q6CBkklXzhY4Hlzv531yFJ0rwfGhxe_RE4o57oq8P7jo%3D)

**I’d like to hear back from you by 11:59 p.m. TONIGHT** so don’t wait – let us know if you want us back in office.

clean_body: It’s not too late... | Friend – we may have fallen short of our mid-month goal by $6,955 the other night, but it’s not too late to get back on track... The Texas conservatives who offered to 200% match all contributions before the mid-month deadline have agreed to extend their match for ONE MORE HOUR to help us make up this shortfall and win 1 of the 5 seats needed to end Pelosi’s majority. Thank you for your continued support! \- Wesley Sent from my iPhone \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Wesley Hunt Date: Tue, March 15, 2022 Subject: Tonight’s make-or-break moment To: dpwillis67@gmail.com The 1st quarter of the election year. | Friend, I have some good news and some bad news... First, the bad: With the mid-month deadline TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M., we’re already pacing $39,185 behind our goal for the FIRST FEC quarter of 2022. But now, for the good news: Generous Texas conservatives have offered to 200% MATCH all contributions made before tonight’s deadline. Friend, the fate of Pelosi’s majority will be decided right here in Texas by our brand-new 38th congressional district. It’s why hitting our first fundraising goal of the general election is so important. If Pelosi sees even the slightest sign of weakness from our Q1 numbers, she’ll view it as the lifeline she so desperately needs... ... And she’ll pour her entire war chest into our new district to prop up her liberal puppet. But after Facebook shut off our fundraising ads on the very same day we won the Republican nomination, I won’t sugarcoat it, we’re facing an uphill battle. Now more than ever, I’m counting on grassroots patriots like YOU to take advantage of this matching opportunity and ensure we come out of tonight’s mid-month deadline on track. name: =?utf-8?Q?Charlie=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Charlie issues a statement on Wolf and Shapiro's attack on election integrity.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Charlie For Governor**
body:
| | | [ ](https://charlieforgovernor.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f407e0a8a35bc04db6508d81&id=59453a9f20&e=df21354de5)
---
| **STATEMENT BY CHARLIE GEROW, REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE FOR GOVERNOR, ON THE WOLF-SHAPIRO ATTACK ON ELECTION INTEGRITY**
Senator Chris Dush (R-Jefferson), Chair of the Senate Intergovernmental Operations Committee recently filed a petition to compel the Pennsylvania Department of State to comply with a subpoena for information relevant to the committee’s election investigation is a reminder that the Wolf Administration and Attorney General Josh Shapiro fully intend to oppose election integrity in Pennsylvania.

Dush said, “Throughout the past several months since our investigation began, the Wolf Administration, Senate Democrats and Attorney General Shapiro have unfairly denied a co-equal branch of government the tools necessary to repair the vulnerabilities of our election system.”

Senator Dush is right. An attack on Pennsylvania election integrity by Governor Wolf and Josh Shapiro could not be a more serious issue. When a sitting governor and attorney general are complicit in denying one of the most fundamental rights of its citizens - to have an honest and fair election - they cannot be allowed to get away with this.

Sadly, Pennsylvania has a long history of voter fraud in our election process. A reminder:

* In 2020 a Philadelphia Democratic Election Judge was indicted and convicted, in the words of the U.S. Justice Department, “for his role in accepting bribes to cast fraudulent ballots and certifying false voting results during the 2014, 2015, and 2016 primary elections in Philadelphia.”

* Also in 2020, former Philadelphia Democratic Congressman Michael “Ozzie” Myers was indicted for, again in the words of the Justice Department, “conspiring to violate voting rights by fraudulently stuffing the ballot boxes for specific candidates in the 2014, 2015, and 2016 primary elections, bribery of an election official, falsification of records, voting more than once in federal elections, and obstruction of justice.”

* In 2012, _The Philadelphia Inquirer_ [headlined this](https://charlieforgovernor.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7f407e0a8a35bc04db6508d81&id=40216c8970&e=df21354de5) a few days after the Obama-Romney election.

“In 59 Philadelphia voting divisions, Mitt Romney got zero votes

It’s one thing for a Democratic presidential candidate to dominate a Democratic city like Philadelphia, but check out this head-spinning figure: In 59 voting divisions in the city, Mitt Romney received not one vote. Zero. Zilch.”

Which is to say, this is a statistical impossibility without voter fraud.

* In 2008 there was this in October in the middle of the Obama-McCain contest. In a press conference at the Pennsylvania State Capitol held by retired Pennsylvania Supreme Court Justice Sandra Newman, then-Dauphin County District Attorney Edward Marsico, and the then-Pennsylvania Republican State Chairman Rob Gleason, Gleason said:

“Between March 23rd and October 1st, various groups, including ACORN, submitted over 252,595 registrations to the Philadelphia County Election Board” with 57,435 rejected for faulty information.

“Most of these registrations were submitted by ACORN, and rejected due to fake social security numbers, incorrect dates of birth, clearly fraudulent signatures, addresses that do not exist, and duplicate registrations. In one case, a man was registered to vote more than 15 times since the Primary election.

Voter fraud is no longer just a Philadelphia problem, as “ACORN was targeting key counties across the state.”

In other words? In Pennsylvania, voter fraud — which is genuine voter suppression — is as common as winter snow in Erie.

Yet in the face of all of this documented evidence of voter fraud - a serious attack on election integrity in Pennsylvania - exactly as the two Senators say, “the Wolf Administration, Senate Democrats and Attorney General Shapiro have unfairly denied a co-equal branch of government the tools necessary to repair the vulnerabilities of our election system.”

This is unacceptable and is, on the face of it, exactly why it is time to end the corrupt Democrat rule in Harrisburg. ###
---

clean_body: | | | | STATEMENT BY CHARLIE GEROW, REPUBLICAN CANDIDATE FOR GOVERNOR, ON THE WOLF-SHAPIRO ATTACK ON ELECTION INTEGRITY Senator Chris Dush (R-Jefferson), Chair of the Senate Intergovernmental Operations Committee recently filed a petition to compel the Pennsylvania Department of State to comply with a subpoena for information relevant to the committee’s election investigation is a reminder that the Wolf Administration and Attorney General Josh Shapiro fully intend to oppose election integrity in Pennsylvania. Dush said, “Throughout the past several months since our investigation began, the Wolf Administration, Senate Democrats and Attorney General Shapiro have unfairly denied a co-equal branch of government the tools necessary to repair the vulnerabilities of our election system.” Senator Dush is right. An attack on Pennsylvania election integrity by Governor Wolf and Josh Shapiro could not be a more serious issue. When a sitting governor and attorney general are complicit in denying one of the most fundamental rights of its citizens - to have an honest and fair election - they cannot be allowed to get away with this. Sadly, Pennsylvania has a long history of voter fraud in our election process. A reminder: In 2020 a Philadelphia Democratic Election Judge was indicted and convicted, in the words of the U.S. Justice Department, “for his role in accepting bribes to cast fraudulent ballots and certifying false voting results during the 2014, 2015, and 2016 primary elections in Philadelphia.” Also in 2020, former Philadelphia Democratic Congressman Michael “Ozzie” Myers was indicted for, again in the words of the Justice Department, “conspiring to violate voting rights by fraudulently stuffing the ballot boxes for specific candidates in the 2014, 2015, and 2016 primary elections, bribery of an election official, falsification of records, voting more than once in federal elections, and obstruction of justice.” In 2012, The Philadelphia Inquirer a few days after the Obama-Romney election. “In 59 Philadelphia voting divisions, Mitt Romney got zero votes It’s one thing for a Democratic presidential candidate to dominate a Democratic city like Philadelphia, but check out this head-spinning figure: In 59 voting divisions in the city, Mitt Romney received not one vote. Zero. Zilch.” Which is to say, this is a statistical impossibility without voter fraud. In 2008 there was this in October in the middle of the Obama-McCain contest. In a press conference at the Pennsylvania State Capitol held by retired Pennsylvania Supreme Court Justice Sandra Newman, then-Dauphin County District Attorney Edward Marsico, and the then-Pennsylvania Republican State Chairman Rob Gleason, Gleason said: “Between March 23rd and October 1st, various groups, including ACORN, submitted over 252,595 registrations to the Philadelphia County Election Board” with 57,435 rejected for faulty information. “Most of these registrations were submitted by ACORN, and rejected due to fake social security numbers, incorrect dates of birth, clearly fraudulent signatures, addresses that do not exist, and duplicate registrations. In one case, a man was registered to vote more than 15 times since the Primary election. Voter fraud is no longer just a Philadelphia problem, as “ACORN was targeting key counties across the state.” In other words? In Pennsylvania, voter fraud — which is genuine voter suppression — is as common as winter snow in Erie. Yet in the face of all of this documented evidence of voter fraud - a serious attack on election integrity in Pennsylvania - exactly as the two Senators say, “the Wolf Administration, Senate Democrats and Attorney General Shapiro have unfairly denied a co-equal branch of government the tools necessary to repair the vulnerabilities of our election system.” This is unacceptable and is, on the face of it, exactly why it is time to end the corrupt Democrat rule in Harrisburg. ### | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2021 Charlie For Governor. name: Team AOC
subject: Police budgets are at some of highest levels in U.S. history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
It’s time we have a real discussion regarding public safety and how to most effectively reduce harm.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220317-2873-header&t=1&akid=2873%2E2526796%2EtdQzc4)
Let’s talk about public safety.
Some politicians are exploding funding for surveillance programs and worse under the guise of ‘fund the police,’ when in fact police budgets are already at some of their highest levels in U.S. history. This is happening because polling has become more important than outcomes. And the saddest part is that the communities _actually_ struggling with public safety (and not just hearing about it on TV) don’t get the real data-driven investments they need to reduce harm.
Playing political football with people’s safety results in a lack of serious policy discussions or evidence-based solutions. If you look at NYC, what are the evidence-based reasons for resuming unjust torture practices in the form of solitary confinement at Rikers? Where’s the evidence to support reviving the plainclothes unit, a special “anti-crime” unit where police officers dress as civilians? Despite being 6% of the force, the plainclothes unit was responsible for 31% of fatal shooting incidents over 20 years.1
Unfortunately, **when communities that struggle the most with public safety don’t receive the investments necessary to reduce violence and harm, then the harm continues.** Politicians then advocate again for non-evidence based policy and the cycle continues...rinse, repeat.
That’s why Alexandria is fighting for honest, evidence-based conversations and solutions surrounding public safety.
A data-driven approach to reducing youth violence has been deployed right here in the Bronx. Stand Up to Violence (SUV), a cutting edge program run out of Jacobi Hospital, uses therapists, doctors and community leaders to address the generational trauma and mental health challenges at the source of so much violence. **So far, it has reduced recurrence of violence among participants by more than 50%.** And Alexandria recently fought for and won additional funding so that the program could continue to grow!
If we want to reduce the number of people in our jails, the answer is not to build more of them. **It’s time to support our communities, not throw them away.**
[Alexandria is working towards advancing evidence-based solutions and conversations surrounding public safety. Can you make a $3 donation — or whatever you can afford — so that Alexandria can continue fighting for our communities?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220317?refcode=em20220317-2873-P_FND_EXP_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2873_2526796_tdQzc4&akid=2873%2E2526796%2EtdQzc4)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220317?refcode=em20220317-2873-P_FND_EXP_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2873_2526796_tdQzc4&akid=2873%2E2526796%2EtdQzc4)**
Thank you,
Team AOC

* * *
1 - [The Intercept](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/10460?t=22&akid=2873%2E2526796%2EtdQzc4)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220317?refcode=em20220317-2873-P_FND_EXP_GRM&t=23&refcode2=2873_2526796_tdQzc4&akid=2873%2E2526796%2EtdQzc4)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220317-2873-P_FND_EXP_GRM&t=24&akid=2873%2E2526796%2EtdQzc4)**

subject: From 8 points to 27 points
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rod Dorilas for Congress
body:
If this is true, Dems face a wipeout. This is INCREDIBLE, especially when President Trump went from receiving 6% of the black vote in 2016 and 8% of t |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.electroddorilas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_s=31fb93049a58454eba5b2412804e6744&_t=hcE6eXoHldfL9v9WLdd6fy0D7dxwOSGobBgno8-3k6hx-sRD1TrBoJw7fsuYgZWNzme9g6gIJoZ13-K2eRH6RRxDNRIyABwu2ayAesf385CB_gWgzAK0sz9qOzM11DQexT95jBQFR9yDoRfsacq5T6ic-54laeavTYNaLCE7wt0%3D).

[](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=31fb93049a58454eba5b2412804e6744&_e=VYeG3SvkB6gKcg-IlPUa5JkRYNxpU6Mtjn4YF82W78zPDrH0qDJPlfvD0aZGz9y1G98Sca4qMhV2ZpZspCE-hAotutASy5tfhDeVHcmLYqB1wYNOwyc3L5d3V2SSfHpO1fm5QvyyD1D6Ffd2vpFvzbn74qNhVQKx_0tu-HDtutdegCgPv1Hi9eMXzM7VTzbyxGkvkedpnCFUq6_6DPILjLy_XY-f8eIP3pb3FD9f9OnChFquhxpOQBwhwzsDVWfwVEC8KzJ_FqeakoH0QkVI046865ONXZaRjP8yv97Hit1XOOeykobmnvKkhMzNUSRlzb6Hb9pvFmOR04b8r6fcLcxhjGAv84F4SiSUAgUY76ouxd4PVSGq9f2lKucPdpPtCvgvQDmHcQKwg_iVSSBqWP_jBUnvNRMpTfTmqarJfNT-no0kKmgYbEO4ETYWpx5loaclqlf0dmngQP5JHurm1Q%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American,

According to a WSJ poll out last week, “ _**support for a Republican candidate rose to 27% among black voters, up from 12% in November**_.”

This is **INCREDIBLE** , especially when President Trump went from receiving 6% of the black vote in 2016 and 8% of the black vote in 2020.

If Republicans end up getting even close to 27% of the black vote in 2022, Dems will have to do some serious introspection.

As a first-generation American and son of Haitian immigrants, I can attest to this: **America the beautiful doesn’t care about the color of one’s skin**. But for generations, Black Americans have voted for Democrats by default, falling in line with the voting patterns of our parents and our grandparents.

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

While millions of Americans are realizing that Joe Biden and the radical Left have brought our nation to the brink of ruin, I am working day and night to SAVE OUR NATION. Team, If you're getting tired of hearing about it, believe me, I'm getting tired of talking about it--but we need to discuss redistricting. Last night, the third set of legislative maps were ruled unconstitutional. The Supreme Court called out Sec. LaRose and his colleagues for their extreme partisanship, stating the evidence clearly shows the Republican Commissioners' "intent to maintain as much of an advantage as possible for members of their political party."

A few weeks ago Sec. LaRose disregarded the fact that these maps weren't yet approved, directed boards of election to prepare ballots anyway, and used it as leverage to try and force the Court's hand to rule in their favor. Thankfully, the will of the voters prevailed but this decision all but confirms that a May 3 primary will be impossible. What does this mean? There will be two terrible consequences:
1. By putting partisanship over people LaRose will force the primary date to move, which will **cost hardworking Ohioans tens of millions of dollars** that we don't have to waste.
2. By putting ultra-conservatives over constituents, LaRose is sowing confusion that will **decrease turnout and could disenfranchise military voters. **

The only way to fix this is by ditching an ultra-partisan, self-serving politician for a pragmatist who will put the best interest of the people first. [That's what I intend to do as Secretary of State. That is why I am running and it's why I'm asking, please consider donating to help my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43083359/335631384/1967714237?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTM5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGQ4ODc0Yi0zMmE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e8UOQqg9r3L-H003IMzZf0u8JjXJ4nEVHJ1MX3plKjY=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will process automatically.

| | Dear Peter, Today is the two month mark. In two months we’ll be awaiting the results. **Oregon’s future is at stake and the choice in the Primary is clear: do we want change or more of the same? That means we need to do everything we can to get our message out and _reach every single voter._** **[Your $25 contribution today gives us the resources we need to win on May 17th.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43083367/335631421/1542981758?refcode=em031722&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTI2Zjk2Ny0zMmE2LWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BH6jEzpEPkG0Y_aknsT7Y0kZcwPfaP73JIGGREqdzA4=)** **If you want change in Oregon, then now is the time.** Tobias Read is the only candidate for Governor with a comprehensive plan to combat surging homicides and violent crime. He’s the only candidate with a vision for our public schools and for early childhood. subject: Mike Pence’s $10M ad blitz

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220317?refcode=lpfe220317_m [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220317?refcode=lpfe220317_m]
Hi — it’s Erin, Lizzie’s Political Director. I want to make sure you saw the news:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220317?refcode=lpfe220317_m [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220317?refcode=lpfe220317_m]
An outside group with ties to former Vice President Mike Pence spent $10 million on its first ad blitz of the election, and it targets 16 House Democrats — including Lizzie.
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220317?refcode=lpfe220317_m]
Lizzie is an incredibly effective leader in Congress, working to expand access to affordable health care and lower prescription drug costs, protect reproductive rights and access to reproductive care, and protect voting rights and our democracy.
Big-money groups are spending millions of dollars to stop Lizzie from getting things done and delivering meaningful results for Texans.
The first FEC deadline of the election year is at the end of this month, and your contributions help us respond to the dishonest attacks, set the record straight, and share Lizzie’s work with voters. Please contribute any amount you can before the deadline. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220317?refcode=lpfe220317_m]
Thanks,
Erin
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
Lizzie Fletcher for Congress
3262 Westheimer Road, PMB 636
Houston, TX 77098
United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ingrid=20Centurion?=
subject: Mace wants a war
body:
Remove incompetent Congressmen and Congresswomen | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/webvortex/its-official-shes-off-and-running-8858417?e=bb02dd73bf)
---
| | | [ ](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=7554edd41b&e=bb02dd73bf)
---
| | | [Please Donate](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=da8289175f&e=bb02dd73bf "Please Donate")
---
| The RINO swamp is trying to march us straight into World War III— and that’s why we need candidates like me to stand up and say “NO!” My name is Ingrid Centurion. **I’m a Hispanic retired Army pilot, a pro-Trump, America-First candidate** **running for Congress in South Carolina’s 1****st****district against RINO Nancy Mace, who betrayed our country and our President. ** I served our country as a combat pilot. My husband was in Army infantry. My sons both serve now. One is in the National Guard and Army ROTC and the other is an Army field artilleryman. We know what war costs. And I won’t so casually demand the US march into World War III like my opponent RINO Nancy Mace. **_She’s a rabid anti-Trumper, she’s fundraising with Liz Cheney, and now she’s calling for US military involvement in Ukraine._** **We have an End-of-quarter deadline in TWO WEEKS. It is SO important we reach our goal and keep up with RINO Nancy Mace. Help me by donating today! ** **Nancy Mace went on Fox News last week and demanded the US and Biden start World War III:** She’s calling for a no-fly zone alongside fellow RINO warmongers Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger. **A no-fly zone would call for the US to intercept and shoot down Russian jets as well as neutralize their anti-air defense. In other words, it would demand a direct military confrontation with a nuclear power, threatening to nuke the world right now. ** RINO Nancy Mace has never served a day in her life. She likes pretending she did, pointing out she went to a military school. But she has no idea what the human costs of such a military conflict would be. That’s why we need veterans in DC who have served, understand the consequences, and will avoid forever wars. **The RINO swamp is flooding this district with cash—and I depend on donations from patriots like YOU. Help me defend our country by donating today! ** **Help me meet my end-of-quarter fundraising goal before its too late! ** [***DONATE TODAY!***](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=f9d82638ad&e=bb02dd73bf)
Thank you and God Bless,
---
|
---
| **Ingrid Centurion
Republican Candidate for Congress, SC-01

_America First conservative Republican.
Entrepreneur, Army veteran, wife & mother_

_P.S. -- We need Republicans who speak, act and vote in the House the same way they campaign!_**
---
| Find out more on Ingrid's [campaign website](https://centurionforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=986079a9d70593df507cfab3a&id=2d609f0e3a&e=bb02dd73bf).
---

---
---
---

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Garrett=20Soldano?=
subject: "Michigan First"? Not under Whitmer...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARRETT SOLDANO FOR MICHIGAN
body:
She submitted her signature petitions today, Peter | | | [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=5fe44d6012&e=fe4b890356)
---
| Patriot -

Today, Gretchen Whitmer submitted her petition signatures to get on the ballot for Governor - __**nearly two months after our grassroots warriors delivered over 20,000 signatures to Lansing.**__

She's officially running for re-election \- not to serve the people, but to advance her own power and political ambitions. Right out of the gate, she's already slandering her opponents and pushing a false narrative. Check out what her team is sending around 👇🏼
---
| [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=7089d30ca0&e=fe4b890356)
---
| | **_I can't believe she has the gall to call our movement "extremists."_**

Michigan won't forget it was Gretchen Whitmer who:
* [Forced COVID infected patients into nursing homes](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=cac0a18843&e=fe4b890356)
* [Locked down our economy and killed hundreds of small businesses](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=5a9041261f&e=fe4b890356)
* [Shut down our schools, masked our babies and created a mental health crisis amongst our youth](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=1352aee074&e=fe4b890356)
* [Fought to Shut Down Line 5 and raise the gas tax as Michiganders suffer](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=2b459b2245&e=fe4b890356)

Folks, we already know Whitmer is going to lie, pander and do anything to keep her job. I mean, look at the signs she was giving out today at the Capitol:
---
| [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=8929d47063&e=fe4b890356)
---
| _She sure wasn't the first candidate to submit petitions_ \- that was our own volunteer crew and phenomenal supporters in January who allowed us to be the **FIRST campaign** to submit signatures to be on the ballot for Governor.

We were also the **FIRST campaign** \- Republican or Democrat - to hit the airwaves with our "[Real Deal" TV Ad](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=349b4e8c18&e=fe4b890356) last fall.

We were the **FIRST campaign** to hold large rallies around the state.

We were the **FIRST campaign** to launch a grassroots field program.
**And it's all because of the power of WE THE PEOPLE!**
---
| [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=280f81b9a4&e=fe4b890356)
---
[ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=7dfa6be4f2&e=fe4b890356)
---
| That slogan - Michigan First - means nothing, Governor, when every policy disaster you've forced on the citizens of our state has put **MICHIGAN LAST!**

I've been in this fight for almost two years now. And as I've travelled all across Michigan, attending over 100 events in over 50 counties, there is one thing that always brings a smile to my face - when Mama Bears and Papa Bears bring their children to our events and inspire them to carry the torch of freedom in their generation.

My friend from yesterday's event in Lapeer wanted an autographed shirt to show his friends at school - what a smart and patriotic young man! 👇🏼
---
| [ ](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=c39774aed4&e=fe4b890356)
---
| This is what our movement is all about, folks. Taking back our government so we can pass on a free and prosperous Michigan to our kids and grandkids.

Keep fighting, Peter.**I believe that we will win!**
---
| [](https://GarrettForMichigan.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0473a6037c1be0f2423e4fd&id=18ee8a4216&e=fe4b890356)
---
| Garrett Soldano
Republican for Governor
---
|
